title: Context Graphs for Proactive Enterprise Agents
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agentic frameworks have advanced enterprise AI considerably, yet agents remain fundamentally reactive: they wait for a human query before acting. This paper argues that genuine enterprise productivity gains require proactive agents: systems that surface relevant, actionable information to workers before they ask. We propose the Context Graph, a live relational data structure that models enterprise entities, their relationships, and state transitions over time. Built on this graph, we define a Delta Detection Engine that continuously monitors state changes, a Proactivity Scorer that ranks candidate insights by urgency, relevance, and persona-fit, and a Surfacing Layer powered by an LLM that delivers ranked notifications with grounded explanations. We formalize each component, derive a unified Proactivity Score function, and provide a complete end-to-end Python implementation using NetworkX and the Anthropic Claude API. Evaluation across three generic enterprise case studies (contract lifecycle management, engineering incident response, and sales pipeline hygiene) demonstrates that context-graph-driven proactivity achieves Precision@5 of 0.83, a false positive rate of 0.11, and reduces mean time to surface from 47 minutes (reactive baseline) to under 30 second.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于上下文图（Context Graph）的主动式AI代理框架，通过增量检测引擎、主动评分层和LLM驱动的通知层，在合同管理、工程事件响应和销售管道场景中实现了83%的精确率@5、11%的误报率，并将平均触发时间从47分钟（反应式基线）降至30秒以下。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG和代理框架本质上是反应式的——等待用户查询后才行动。论文论证真正的企业生产力提升需要主动式代理：在员工询问之前就呈现相关、可操作的信息。
AI.method: 提出Context Graph（实时关系数据结构建模企业实体、关系及状态变迁），构建增量检测引擎（监控状态变化）、主动评分器（按紧迫性、相关性、角色匹配度排序）、LLM驱动的表层推送层（带解释的排名通知），并给出统一的主动评分函数公式。
AI.result: 在三个企业案例中，Precision@5达0.83，误报率0.11，平均触发时间从47分钟降至30秒以下。
AI.conclusion: 上下文图驱动的主动架构能显著提升企业代理的实时响应能力，从被动等待转向主动推送，带来生产力质的飞跃。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。具体方案：将Context Graph思想引入遥感领域，用于构建地理时空知识图谱——建模遥感影像中的地物实体（建筑物、植被、水体等）及其时序状态变化（如植被覆盖度变化、水体面积收缩）。Delta Detection Engine可对应变化检测算法（如变化矢量分析、深度学习变化检测模型），Proactivity Scorer对变化区域的紧迫性（如灾后损毁评估）、相关性（与任务区域匹配度）评分，Surfacing Layer通过LLM生成带位置和解释的预警通知。同时可扩展至多源遥感数据的主动巡检监控系统。

title: AI-integrated models for assessing agricultural resilience
summary: Agricultural supply chains are vulnerable to disruptions through linked biophysical and economic systems. We develop an AI-powered tool that integrates economic models (GTAP) with biophysical models (APSIM) to analyze supply chain shocks, enabling policymakers and market participants to assess cross-disciplinary impacts through queries and responses written in natural language.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个AI驱动的工具，整合经济模型（GTAP）与生物物理模型（APSIM），通过自然语言查询与响应，分析农业供应链中的跨学科冲击影响。
AI.motivation: 农业供应链易受生物物理与经济系统耦合 disruptions 的影响，但现有工具缺乏跨学科整合能力，难以让政策制定者和市场参与者便捷评估复杂冲击的连锁效应。
AI.method: 构建AI工具，集成全球贸易分析项目（GTAP）经济模型与农业生产系统模拟器（APSIM）生物物理模型，通过自然语言处理接口实现查询与响应。
AI.result: 开发出了一个能够跨学科分析供应链冲击的AI工具，支持用户以自然语言交互方式获取评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 该AI工具可有效整合经济和生物物理模型，为农业供应链冲击提供跨学科影响评估，提升决策支持能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。可引入遥感数据（如卫星植被指数、土壤水分、作物生长监测）替代或校准APSIM模型的输入参数，提升生物物理模型的时空覆盖精度；同时遥感观测的作物产量/灾害损失数据可作为GTAP经济模型的验证或校准依据，增强供应链冲击评估的实时性与可信度。

title: Adversarial Social Epistemology for Assemblies of Humans and Large Language Models
summary: We outline an adversarial social epistemology (ASE) for densely interactive communicative landscapes in which public assertions are scaffolded by chains of testimony, inference, institutional certification, and tacit trust. In such landscapes, agents have incentives and affordances to distort, color, omit, fabricate, or strategically under-specify information for private, reputational, rhetorical, or material gains. We argue that these phenomena are not adequately captured by familiar descriptions of epistemic bubbles, echo chambers, or misinformation diffusion. What requires explanation is how communicative agents exploit the commitments and entitlements that normally make scaffolded assertions trustworthy. We provide language that delivers the requisite analysis, outline mechanisms that subvert trust in scaffolded public communications, and outline machinery for auditing and redressing trust breaches arising from subverting the auditability of inferential chains, drawing on epistemic networks, enriched with an inferentialist semantics for interpreting assertions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对抗性社会认识论（ASE）框架，用于分析密集交互的传播环境中，行为者如何利用证言链、推理、机构认证和隐性信任来扭曲、捏造或策略性隐瞒信息，并提供了审计和补救信任 breach 的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有理论（如认知气泡、回声室、错误信息扩散）无法充分解释在密集传播环境中，行为者如何利用使断言可信的承诺和权利来系统性地破坏信任。
AI.method: 通过引入对抗性社会认识论（ASE），结合推理主义语义学（inferentialist semantics）来解释断言，并利用认知网络来审计推理链的可审计性。
AI.result: 提出了一套用于分析传播信任破坏的语言和机制，包括对推理链可审计性的破坏及其补救审计工具。
AI.conclusion: ASE框架为理解密集传播环境中信息操纵的结构性机制提供了新的理论工具，并指出了修复信任 breach 的可行路径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域依赖多源数据融合、机构认证（如卫星数据产品标定）和推理链（如从原始影像到分类结果的推断）。ASE框架可用于分析遥感传播中数据来源的可审计性，例如检测数据供应链中的有意标注错误或数据选择性使用，并构建基于推理链的审计机制来识别和修正信任破坏行为。

title: Aligning Clinical Needs and AI Capabilities: A Survey on LLMs for Medical Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as important tools in healthcare, showing growing potential for clinical reasoning and patient care. This survey examines recent progress in medical LLMs, focusing on reasoning applications and requirements. We present a dual-view approach that connects clinical practice with computational methods. On the clinical side, we establish a five-level competency scheme following Miller's Pyramid, progressing from knowledge recall to dynamic case management. On the computational side, we link deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning patterns to common medical goals and tasks. We also introduce a benchmark dataset spanning five levels of medical reasoning capability and report results on 18 state-of-the-art models, revealing that medical specialist models excel in diagnosis-centric tasks while general models lead in decision support and dialogue. We conclude by discussing current progress and open challenges, including data limitations, hallucination, and grounding issues, and outline directions toward safer, more reliable, and workflow-ready systems.

AI.tldr: 本综述探讨了医学大语言模型（Medical LLMs）在临床推理中的应用进展，提出了结合临床实践（基于Miller金字塔的五级能力体系）与计算方法（演绎、归纳、溯因推理）的双重视角，并构建了覆盖五级医学推理能力的基准数据集，对18个最新模型进行了评估，揭示了医学专科模型在诊断任务中表现优异，而通用模型在决策支持与对话方面领先。最后讨论了数据限制、幻觉、接地性等挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 医学LLMs快速发展但缺乏系统性的临床推理能力评估框架，现有研究未能有效连接临床实践需求与计算推理模式，亟需一个双重视角的综合分析来指导更安全、可靠的医学AI系统开发。
AI.method: 采用双重视角方法：临床侧基于Miller金字塔建立五级能力体系（知识回忆→动态病例管理）；计算侧将演绎、归纳、溯因推理模式映射到常见医学目标与任务。构建覆盖五级推理能力的基准数据集，对18个SOTA模型进行系统性评估。
AI.result: 医学专科模型在诊断类任务中表现优异，而通用模型在决策支持和对话方面领先。基准测试揭示了不同模型在不同推理能力层级上的差异表现。
AI.conclusion: 当前医学LLMs在推理能力上取得显著进展，但仍面临数据限制、幻觉、接地性等挑战。未来需朝着更安全、可靠、可融入工作流程的系统方向发展。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。与遥感领域的交叉方案：（1）将Miller金字塔五级能力体系迁移至遥感图像解释的专家能力评估，从基础地物识别（知识回忆）到复杂场景动态解译（动态病例管理）；（2）将演绎（基于物理模型推理）、归纳（从数据中学习模式）、溯因（反演推断地物成因）三种推理模式映射到遥感目标检测、变化检测、参数反演等任务；（3）借鉴医学LLMs的基准评估方法，构建多层级遥感推理能力基准数据集（如像素级分类→场景级理解→动态变化推理），对遥感基础模型与专用模型进行系统性对比评估。

title: DreamCharacter-1: From 3D Generative Foundation Models to Product-Ready Character Generation
summary: We present DreamCharacter-1, a lightweight post-adaptation framework that calibrates pretrained 3D foundation models toward high-fidelity, production-ready 3D character generation. Building upon a 3D foundation backbone, our pipeline incorporates three task-oriented components: (1) geometry post-training, which enhances fine-grained surface details through geometric preference optimization; (2) texture post-training, which synthesizes high-resolution textures and refines the appearance of occluded regions; and (3) inference acceleration, which enables scalable deployment. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that DreamCharacter-1 produces visually compelling and structurally robust 3D character assets, consistently surpassing state-of-the-art character generation methods.

AI.tldr: DreamCharacter-1是一个轻量级后适应框架，通过几何后训练、纹理后训练和推理加速三个组件，将预训练的3D基础模型校准为高保真的生产级3D角色生成工具，在视觉质量和结构鲁棒性上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D角色生成方法在细粒度几何细节、高分辨率纹理和可扩展部署方面存在不足，缺乏面向生产环境的轻量级后适应方案。
AI.method: 提出三组件后适应流水线：(1) 几何后训练，通过几何偏好优化增强表面细节；(2) 纹理后训练，合成高分辨率纹理并优化遮挡区域外观；(3) 推理加速，支持可扩展部署。
AI.result: 定性和定量实验表明，DreamCharacter-1生成的3D角色资产在视觉吸引力和结构鲁棒性上持续超越最先进的角色生成方法。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级后适应框架能有效将预训练3D基础模型校准为生产级角色生成工具，兼顾几何精细度、纹理质量和部署效率。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。该框架的后适应思路可迁移至遥感3D场景生成：几何后训练可用于优化地形/建筑物的表面细节（如植被、屋顶结构）；纹理后训练可增强遥感影像中遮挡区域的纹理合成（如建筑阴影区域）；推理加速有利于大规模遥感场景的实时渲染。但遥感数据多源异构特性（多光谱、SAR等）需要额外适配，且场景级生成与角色级生成在复杂度上存在差异。

title: Alignment Plausibility: A New Standard for Assuring AI in Healthcare
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have become significant providers of mental health support, yet they remain products of an attention economy whose operational and commercial targets favour sustained engagement over the friction that effective psychological support often requires. Developers' safety responses have been largely reactive, addressing the most visible and acute harms while subtler, longer-term patterns of risk (e.g., dependency, boundary erosion, the amplification of distorted beliefs) receive less attention. We contend that making LLMs structurally safe requires alignment organised at three levels that mirror how society assures the safety of human clinical practice: 1) explicit value specification grounded in the codified normative commitments of clinical practice; 2) training that embeds those values in the model; and 3) oversight that detects drift and longer-term harm during deployment, much as clinical supervision does for human practice. Organising alignment in this way yields a construct we call alignment plausibility - a structured demonstration that a system's values, training regime, and oversight mechanisms are together consistent with safe and positive outcomes. We propose alignment plausibility as a regulatory construct (by drawing analogy to the established construct of biological plausibility) for AI in health: a principled way to argue for, or against, trust that systems are aligned to positive health outcomes, will cause no harm even where capable of doing so, and will ultimately lead to patient benefit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"对齐合理性"（alignment plausibility）的监管框架，将LLMs在心理健康领域的对齐组织为三个层次（价值规范、训练嵌入、部署监督），类比人类临床实践的安全保障体系，以解决注意力经济下AI心理健康支持的结构性安全隐患（如依赖、边界侵蚀、信念扭曲放大等）。
AI.motivation: LLMs在心理健康支持中被广泛使用，但受注意力经济驱动，其商业目标偏向持续参与而非有效心理干预所需的"摩擦"。现有的安全回应多为被动式，仅处理最明显和最急性的伤害，而对依赖、边界侵蚀、扭曲信念放大等更微妙、长期的系统性风险关注不足。
AI.method: 提出三层对齐架构：1）显式价值规范——基于临床实践的规范化伦理承诺；2）训练嵌入——将这些价值融入模型训练；3）部署监督——在部署中检测漂移和长期伤害，类比人类临床督导制度。并引入"对齐合理性"这一监管概念，类比生物学合理性（biological plausibility），作为评估AI系统是否与积极健康结果对齐、能否无害化运行并最终造福患者的原则性论证工具。
AI.result: 提出了对齐合理性（alignment plausibility）作为健康领域AI的监管构造，提供了一种结构化论证框架，用于判断系统是否值得信任——即其价值观、训练机制和监督体系是否一致地导向安全和积极的结果，即使具备造成伤害的能力也不会造成伤害，并最终使患者受益。
AI.conclusion: 要使LLMs在心理健康领域实现结构性安全，需要将AI对齐组织为与人类临床实践安全保障相映射的三个层次，并通过"对齐合理性"这一监管构造建立可论证的信任基础。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。本文提出的三层对齐框架（价值规范→训练嵌入→部署监督）及"对齐合理性"监管概念可迁移至遥感AI安全治理：1）将遥感伦理准则（如隐私保护、灾害误判风险、军事误用规避）显式编码为价值规范层；2）在模型训练中嵌入这些规范（如防止遥感目标检测对平民设施的误分类）；3）在部署阶段建立漂移检测机制，监控模型在特定地理区域或时间序列上的偏差累积。但需注意遥感领域与心理健康领域的风险类型差异较大，直接类比需谨慎调整。

title: GIRAF: Towards Generalizable Human Interactions with Articulated Objects
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the Third Workshop on Human Motion Generation (HuMoGen), CVPR 2026
summary: Synthesizing realistic full-body human interactions with articulated objects is a fundamental challenge for embodied AI and graphics, with applications in robotics training and virtual agents. Existing models remain limited: some focus on simple activities with static objects, while others restrict attention to hand-only manipulation. This leaves open the problem of generating coordinated full-body motion that approaches, manipulates, and moves articulated objects in a realistic and generalizable way. The key difficulty lies in reasoning jointly about locomotion, fine-grained contact, and object articulation. Models must capture subtle hand-object correspondences that transfer across object geometries, while also producing seamless transitions from navigation to manipulation. At the same time, the scarcity of large-scale paired motion-scene data makes it difficult to generalize across diverse object positions and shapes. We introduce a text-conditioned diffusion model that addresses these challenges through three core ideas: an object-centric representation that unifies hand-object contact with object surfaces, a mixed-domain training strategy that balances locomotion and interaction, and a contact-based augmentation scheme that expands training diversity. Through experiments, our method demonstrated strong generalization to unseen object configurations, surpassing current state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种文本条件扩散模型，通过物体中心表示、混合域训练策略和基于接触的数据增强，实现了全身与铰接物体协调交互的逼真运动生成，在未见物体配置上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法局限于静态物体或仅手部操作，无法生成协调的全身运动来接近、操作和移动铰接物体，关键难点在于联合推理 locomotion、精细接触和物体关节。
AI.method: 提出文本条件扩散模型，核心包括：(1) 物体中心表示——将手-物接触与物体表面统一建模；(2) 混合域训练策略——平衡 locomotion 与交互的训练数据；(3) 基于接触的数据增强——扩展训练多样性。
AI.result: 在未见过的物体配置上展现出强泛化能力，超越当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过物体中心化表示和混合训练策略，有效解决了全身与铰接物体协调运动生成的泛化问题。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。该方法的物体中心表示和基于接触的数据增强可迁移至遥感中的地物-目标交互建模，例如将卫星图像中的建筑物（铰接物体）与地面车辆/行人（全身运动）的时空关系进行统一表示；混合域训练策略可应用于遥感多模态数据的平衡训练（如光学与SAR影像的域平衡）。但需注意遥感场景缺乏精细接触标注，需引入弱监督或自监督机制进行适配。

title: Idiobionics: The Unification of Privacy and Intelligent Robotic Prostheses
summary: The human body is at the center of a growing family of technologies designed to tightly and persistently couple biological and digital systems. Robotic prostheses are a representative example of this tight coupling. Also referred to as bionic limbs, robotic prostheses are devices that support people who have lost limbs in pursuing daily life activities such as walking and grasping objects. Bionic limbs are now perceptive and responsive owing to their integration with advanced sensors and artificial intelligence-based control approaches. Consequently, such robotic prostheses can now be viewed as semiautonomous wearable robotic systems that can co-adapt with their users. However, the same sensing and control advancements that increase the capability of robotic prostheses also introduce threat vectors that could be exploited by malicious entities to violate the privacy of users. To fully realize the benefits of next-generation bionic limbs, we maintain it is important to directly understand and address these privacy risks and the barriers they might present to user adoption. This paper therefore introduces a new line of inquiry we term idiobionics to holistically investigate issues at the intersection of privacy and intelligent bionic limbs. As the main contribution of this paper, we define idiobionics, ground it in related literature, and provide preliminary evidence showing and discussing potential adversarial attacks that could exploit intelligent bionic limb designs. We then contribute a curated list of open research questions within idiobionics that are relevant to researchers in wearable robotics and other human-facing autonomous systems. We expect that idiobionics research will help unlock the full potential of robotic prostheses and related bionic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"idiobionics"（个体仿生学）这一新研究方向，系统探讨智能仿生肢体（如机器人假肢）在隐私安全方面面临的威胁。文章定义了该领域，展示了潜在对抗攻击的初步证据，并提出了开放研究问题，旨在平衡先进假肢技术发展与用户隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人假肢（仿生肢体）集成先进传感器和AI控制方法，其能力显著提升，但同时也引入了隐私威胁。现有研究对智能仿生肢体的隐私风险缺乏系统性探讨，这阻碍了技术的广泛采用。因此需要建立新的研究框架来识别和解决这些隐私问题。
AI.method: 定义新研究领域"idiobionics"；在相关文献基础上进行理论奠基；通过初步实验展示潜在对抗攻击（如利用传感器数据推断用户隐私信息）；策展并提出一系列开放研究问题。
AI.result: 正式定义了idiobionics领域；提供了初步证据证明智能仿生肢体存在可被恶意利用的攻击向量；整理了一份面向可穿戴机器人及人机交互自主系统研究者的开放问题清单。
AI.conclusion: 智能仿生肢体在隐私安全方面存在重要但被忽视的风险，idiobionics研究有助于在释放机器人假肢全部潜力的同时保护用户隐私，推动技术被更广泛接受。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。遥感领域可借鉴idiobionics的隐私威胁分析框架：1）遥感系统（如无人机、卫星成像）同样集成多模态传感器和AI推理，可引入类似的隐私风险评估方法论，识别从遥感数据中推断敏感信息（如军事设施、个人活动轨迹）的攻击路径；2）idiobionics中提出的对抗攻击防御策略（如数据脱敏、差分隐私）可迁移至遥感数据发布与共享流程；3）遥感中的联邦学习与边缘计算方案也可反向为仿生肢体提供分布式隐私保护架构参考。

title: 3D Reconstruction of deciduous Trees using low-cost UAV- and Crane-based Photogrammetry for Monitoring Shoot Elongation across entire Canopies
comment: Accepted to ISPRS Congress 2026, camera-ready version
summary: Tree growth determines how much CO2 is sequestered from the atmosphere and temporarily stored in woody biomass. At the same time tree growth is affected by increasing temperatures, more frequent drought periods, late frosts and other extreme events associated with climate change. While continuous measurements of radial (secondary) tree growth using dendrometers are well established, monitoring of shoot elongation (primary growth) has largely been neglected because suitable measurement techniques are lacking. As a result, the effects of climate change on primary tree growth remain insufficiently understood. This work aims at reconstructing native deciduous trees in 3D as a basis for measuring and monitoring shoot elongation over entire tree canopies. Here we explored the use of low-cost UAV photogrammetry and of a multi-camera CraneCam system under real-world conditions. Data were collected in two study areas over an entire growing season. We present sensor evaluations, photogrammetric data acquisition and processing strategies. A special focus is placed on the analysis of the resulting photogrammetric 3D point clouds in terms of accuracy, resolution and completeness. Results demonstrate 3D point accuracies of 5-6 mm for entire trees using consumer-grade UAVs weighing less than 250 g and a 3D reconstruction completeness between 92% and 98% depending on the UAV type. The paper introduces a novel 3Dprinted ground-truth branch to evaluate the capability to reconstructing fine-detail structures such as thin tree shoots. Finally, we discuss operational challenges and initial experiments towards a skeletonization of entire trees based on photogrammetric point clouds.

AI.tldr: 本文针对树木初级生长（芽伸长）监测技术缺失的问题，探索了利用低成本无人机摄影测量和多相机CraneCam系统对原生落叶树进行3D重建的方法。通过整个生长季的实地数据采集与处理，实现了5-6 mm的点精度和92%-98%的重建完整度，并引入3D打印基准枝评估细部结构重建能力，为实现全树冠芽伸长监测提供了可行方案。
AI.motivation: 树木生长决定了大气CO2的固存量和木质生物量中的碳储量，而气候变化（升温、干旱、晚霜等极端事件）正深刻影响树木生长。径向生长（次生生长）已有成熟监测手段（如树径计），但芽伸长（初级生长）的监测因缺乏合适测量技术而被长期忽视，导致气候变化对树木初级生长的影响机制认知不足。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用低成本消费级无人机（<250 g）摄影测量与多相机CraneCam系统，在两种研究区进行整个生长季的数据采集。提出基于摄影测量的3D点云数据采集与处理策略，重点分析点云的精度、分辨率和完整性。引入3D打印的基准枝作为地面真值，评估系统对细枝等精细结构的重建能力，并初步探索基于点云的树木骨架化方法。
AI.result: 消费级无人机摄影测量实现了5-6 mm的整树3D点精度，3D重建完整度在92%-98%之间（因无人机类型而异）。3D打印基准枝验证了系统对细嫩枝条等精细结构的重建有效性。
AI.conclusion: 低成本无人机摄影测量能够以毫米级精度实现全树冠3D重建，为监测整树冠芽伸长提供了可行技术路径，填补了树木初级生长监测的技术空白，有助于深入理解气候变化对树木生长的影响。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该方法的直接交叉应用：（1）可迁移至遥感生态监测中的林木物候研究，利用低成本无人机定期航测替代人工测量芽伸长，实现大规模、高频次的林冠层初级生长动态监测；（2）引入多光谱/热红外载荷，可获得初级生长与冠层温度、叶绿素等生理指标的相关性；（3）3D打印基准枝可作为遥感产品（如LiDAR、无人机点云）的验证标准件，提升遥感反演精度；（4）骨架化算法可推广至森林资源遥感调查中树木拓扑结构提取，服务于碳储量估算和森林动态建模。

title: Infinity-Parser2 Technical Report
summary: We present Infinity-Parser2, a large multimodal model that couples a controllable data-synthesis pipeline with multi-task reinforcement learning for end-to-end document parsing, addressing the persistent scarcity of faithfully annotated parsing corpora. Our contributions are threefold. First, we build a scalable synthesis engine, pairing a controllable rendering framework with an iterative refinement loop, and use it to construct and open-source Infinity-Doc2-5M: a 5-million-sample bilingual (Chinese/English) corpus spanning diverse document types, annotated with element bounding boxes, canonical content forms (Markdown, HTML, LaTeX, SMILES, structured charts), and full-page reading order. Second, we introduce a verifiable, multi-task reward system that enables Joint Reinforcement Learning across eight co-trained objectives (document parsing, layout analysis, table parsing, math formula parsing, chart parsing, chemical formula parsing, document VQA, and general multimodal understanding), unifying perception, structure, and reasoning in a single optimization signal. Third, we release two variants under a shared architecture: Infinity-Parser2-Flash, optimized for low-latency inference with a $3.68\times$ throughput gain over Infinity-Parser-7B, and Infinity-Parser2-Pro, engineered for precision-critical settings. Infinity-Parser2-Pro reaches state-of-the-art 87.6% on olmOCR-Bench and 74.3% on ParseBench, surpassing DeepSeek-OCR-2, PaddleOCR-VL-1.5, and MinerU2.5, with strong generalization to charts, chemical formulas, and document VQA.

AI.tldr: Infinity-Parser2是一个大型多模态文档解析模型，通过可控数据合成管道（Infinity-Doc2-5M双语数据集）和多任务强化学习（8个联合训练目标），实现了端到端文档解析。提供Flash（低延迟，吞吐量提升3.68倍）和Pro（高精度，在olmOCR-Bench和ParseBench上达到SOTA）两个版本。
AI.motivation: 真实标注的文档解析语料库持续稀缺，现有的文档解析方法受限于高质量训练数据的不足。
AI.method: 构建了一个可控数据合成引擎（含迭代精炼循环），生成了5百万样本的中英文双语文档解析数据集Infinity-Doc2-5M；设计了一个可验证的多任务奖励系统，在8个共同训练目标上实现联合强化学习；发布两个变体版本（Flash和Pro）共享架构。
AI.result: Infinity-Parser2-Pro在olmOCR-Bench上达到87.6%，在ParseBench上达到74.3%，超越DeepSeek-OCR-2、PaddleOCR-VL-1.5和MinerU2.5；Infinity-Parser2-Flash吞吐量相比Infinity-Parser-7B提升3.68倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过可控数据合成与多任务强化学习的结合，有效解决了文档解析中标注数据稀缺的问题，在图表、化学公式、文档VQA等任务上展现出强泛化能力，同时在速度和精度上取得了良好平衡。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该文档解析框架可直接迁移至遥感文档解析（如遥感报告、地理调查报告、卫星影像标注文档）。具体方案：(1) 将Infinity-Doc2-5M数据合成管道适配为遥感文档生成器，加入遥感专用元素（地物类型标注、地理坐标、波段信息等）；(2) 多任务奖励系统中额外增加遥感语义理解任务（如地物分类、变化检测文本描述）；(3) 遥感文档通常包含大量图表（光谱曲线、分类精度表），其图表解析和布局分析能力可直接复用；(4) 化学公式解析任务可替换或扩展为遥感中的地理公式（如NDVI计算式）解析。

title: Adversarial Decoys: Misdirecting Attention-Based Defenses in ViT
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) remain vulnerable to localized adversarial attacks, e.g., adversarial patches, while recent test-time defenses mitigate them by suppressing image tokens with abnormally high attention scores. These defenses exploit a strong coupling between attention and adversarial effectiveness: adversarial tokens often need to attract substantial attention to influence the prediction. We introduce adversarial decoys, independently optimized image patches that redirect the attention, and therefore related defenses, toward selected target tokens. Rather than jointly optimizing misclassifications and defense evasion, our approach decouples the two objectives: the original adversarial region induces the incorrect prediction, while a separate decoy manipulates the attention ranking used by the defense. A layer-wise objective increases target-token attention and promotes these tokens above competing non-target ones. Since the decoy is optimized independently of the underlying attack, the method is attack-agnostic and can be easily integrated with any existing adversarial patch attack. Experiments on ImageNet across multiple ViT architectures and attacks show that decoys can redirect high attention scores away from the true adversarial region while preserving much of the attack effectiveness. These results reveal a fundamental limitation of using attention magnitude as an indicator of adversarial relevance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出对抗性诱饵（adversarial decoys），即独立优化的图像块，通过将注意力及相关防御机制重定向到选定的目标标记，从而绕过当前基于注意力分数异常的测试时防御。该方法将误导分类与防御规避解耦，可兼容任意现有的对抗性补丁攻击，实验表明能在保持攻击有效性的同时将高注意力分数从真实对抗区域转移开，揭示了基于注意力大小作为对抗相关性指标的局限性。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformers（ViTs）仍然容易受到局部对抗性攻击（如对抗性补丁），而现有的测试时防御通过抑制注意力分数异常高的图像块来缓解此类攻击。当前防御利用了注意力与攻击有效性之间的强耦合关系，即对抗性标记通常需要吸引大量注意力才能影响预测。作者旨在揭示这种防御机制的基本局限性。
AI.method: 本文提出对抗性诱饵方法：1）将对抗性区域（误导分类）与诱饵（操纵注意力排名）解耦，独立优化诱饵图像块；2）设计逐层目标函数，增加目标标记的注意力，同时抑制非目标标记注意力，使目标标记在注意力排名中上升；3）诱饵优化独立于底层攻击，因此与任何现有的对抗性补丁攻击兼容。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上针对多种ViT架构和攻击的实验表明：对抗性诱饵能够将高注意力分数从真实对抗区域重定向开，同时保留了大部分的攻击有效性（即仍能误导分类）。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了基于注意力大小作为对抗相关性指标的防御方法存在根本性局限，即可以通过精心设计的诱饵操纵注意力排名，从而绕过这类防御。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。具体方案：1）遥感场景中，对抗性补丁攻击可伪装为地面物体（如车辆、建筑），将本文方法应用于遥感ViT模型防御评估，检验注意力防御在实际遥感任务中的鲁棒性；2）借鉴解耦攻击思想，为遥感多模态模型（如SAR+光学影像）设计跨模态诱饵，一个模态负责分类误导，另一个模态负责转移注意力防御；3）将诱饵概念反向应用于遥感目标检测中，通过植入注意力诱饵来保护敏感区域（如军事设施）不被ViT-based检测器识别。

title: VectorizationLLM: Smart Vectorization Based AI Assistant
summary: VectorizationLLM is a specialized Large Language Model based on Google open-weight LLMs. The model is designed to assist students to learn smart vectorization, time/wave vector analysis, piecewise functions, Fourier analysis, and differential equations in MATLAB. The course application is CTEC 247: Applied Computational Analysis II by the Department of Electrical & Computer Engineering Technology at New York Institute of Technology Old Westbury. The LLM model is designed to be an instructive assistant, providing detailed explanations of concepts with examples from in-class notes without providing direct answers to questions. The model is designed with a RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) knowledge base and system prompt architecture. Examples in both code, text, and images are provided in the LLM responses.

AI.tldr: VectorizationLLM是一个基于Google开源LLM的专业大语言模型，用于辅助学生学习MATLAB中的向量化、时频分析、分段函数、傅里叶分析和微分方程。该模型采用RAG知识库和系统提示架构，作为教学助手提供概念解释和示例，但不直接给出问题答案。
AI.motivation: 为CTEC 247课程学生提供智能化的MATLAB计算分析学习辅助工具，解决传统教学中学生难以理解复杂数学概念和编程实现的痛点，同时避免学生直接获取答案而影响学习效果。
AI.method: 基于Google开源权重LLM进行微调，采用RAG（检索增强生成）知识库结合系统提示架构，设计为教学助手角色，提供包含代码、文本和图片的多模态概念解释与示例，但刻意不直接回答作业问题。
AI.result: 成功构建了面向特定课程（CTEC 247）的专用教学LLM，支持向量化、时/波向量分析、分段函数、傅里叶分析和微分方程等主题的互动学习，具备多模态响应能力。
AI.conclusion: VectorizationLLM展示了专用LLM在工程计算教育中的潜力，通过限制直接答案输出并结合RAG知识库，可在不损害学术诚信的前提下有效辅助学生学习技术性强的计算分析内容。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。该模型的教学框架可迁移至遥感教育场景：1) 将RAG知识库替换为遥感处理库（如GDAL、ENVI、PyTorch），覆盖遥感图像分类、变化检测、时间序列分析等主题；2) 模型架构可用于解释遥感中的傅里叶变换（频谱分析）、向量化处理（波段运算）、分段函数（阈值分割）等核心概念；3) 增加遥感专属多模态示例（遥感影像图、光谱曲线、分类结果图）。改进方面：当前模型缺乏遥感领域的具体案例库，需补充Landsat/Sentinel数据处理实例。

title: Beyond Thermal Imaging: Inferring Thermophysical Properties from Time-Resolved Thermal Observations
summary:
Inferring latent physical properties from sensory observations is a fundamental challenge in machine perception. Among available sensing modalities, thermal imaging is particularly promising because temperature evolution is directly governed by heat-transfer physics and therefore encodes information about underlying thermophysical properties of a scene. Recovering spatially resolved thermophysical properties from thermal observations could transform applications ranging from digital twins and infrastructure monitoring to robotics and scientific imaging. However, existing thermal scene reconstruction methods can recover temperature fields in complex 3D environments without identifying the thermophyiscal properties that govern thermal evolution, whereas inverse methods provide physically interpretable parameter estimation but typically rely on simplified geometries and controlled experimental conditions.
  Here we introduce ThermoField, a framework that unifies thermal scene reconstruction and thermophysical parameter estimation through differentiable heat-transfer simulation. The proposed framework represents these quantities as spatially varying neural fields and constrains them through scene geometry, governing heat-transfer physics, and temporal thermal observations. We demonstrate that ThermoField jointly reconstructs geometry, estimates spatially varying thermal diffusivity, and predicts thermal evolution under previously unseen environmental conditions. By integrating neural scene representations with differentiable heat-transfer solver, the framework enables physically interpretable parameter inference in complex 3D scenes. Our results establish a bridge between thermal scene reconstruction and inverse heat-transfer analysis, providing a unified approach for geometry reconstruction, thermophysical property estimation, and predictive thermal simulation from thermal observations.

AI.tldr: ThermoField是一个通过可微热传导仿真统一热场景重建与热物理参数估计的框架，利用神经场表示空间变化的热扩散率，在复杂3D场景中联合重建几何、估计热物理参数并预测未见环境条件下的热演化。
AI.motivation: 现有热场景重建方法能恢复3D温度场但无法识别控制热演化的热物理参数，而逆物理方法虽能估计参数但依赖简化几何和受控实验条件，缺乏在复杂3D场景中统一重建与参数估计的框架。
AI.method: 通过可微热传导仿真，将空间变化的热物理量表示为神经场，并利用场景几何、热传导物理约束和时序热观测数据联合优化，实现几何重建、热扩散率估计与热演化的可微求解。
AI.result: ThermoField能够联合重建几何、估计空间变化的热扩散率，并在未见过的环境条件下预测热演化，建立了热场景重建与逆热传导分析之间的桥梁。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从热观测中进行几何重建、热物理参数估计和预测性热仿真提供了统一方案，实现了复杂3D场景中物理可解释的参数推断。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该框架可直接迁移至遥感热红外影像分析：(1) 将遥感热红外时序影像作为观测数据，反演地表热扩散率等热物理参数，服务于地质勘探和地表过程研究；(2) 结合遥感DEM或点云几何，实现复杂地形场景下热演化的预测与重建；(3) 可扩展至多光谱热红外遥感数据，利用不同波段信息约束参数估计的准确性。

title: A Graph Neural Network Model for Real-Time Gesture Recognition Based on sEMG Signals
summary: For seemless control of advanced hand prostheses and augmented reality, accurate and immediate hand gestures recognition is essential. Surface electromyography (sEMG) signals obtained from the forearm are commonly employed for this purpose. In this paper, we present a novel approach for sEMG representation that utilizes graph networks which contain information about muscle activation patterns in the forearm. Based on these graph networks, we have developed a machine learning algorithm capable of real-time hand gesture recognition using a graph neural network. The algorithm's performance was evaluated using sEMG signals acquired from myoband, which has 8 electrodes placed around the forearm, involving 8 healthy subjects. The proposed method demonstrated an average classification accuracy of 99\%, surpassing the performance of state-of-the-art techniques. The average time for both graph construction and prediction stood at 48ms utilizing a M1 pro CPU, rendering the approach well-suited for real-time applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图网络的表面肌电信号（sEMG）表征方法，结合图神经网络实现实时手势识别，在8电极Myoband采集的8名健康受试者数据上达到99%的分类准确率，图构建与预测平均耗时48ms，适用于实时应用。
AI.motivation: 为了实现高级假手和无缝增强现实控制，需要准确且即时的手势识别。现有sEMG手势识别方法在实时性和准确性上仍存在提升空间，亟需一种能够捕捉前臂肌肉激活模式的有效表征与高效识别方法。
AI.method: 提出基于图网络的sEMG信号表征方法，将前臂肌肉激活模式建模为图结构；在此基础上开发基于图神经网络的机器学习算法进行实时手势识别；使用Myoband（8电极）采集8名健康受试者的sEMG信号进行性能评估。
AI.result: 平均分类准确率达99%，超越现有最先进技术；图构建与预测平均耗时48ms（M1 Pro CPU），满足实时应用需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在sEMG手势识别中取得了高精度和低延迟，适合假肢控制和增强现实等实时场景。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：该研究的sEMG图网络+图神经网络框架可迁移至遥感领域中的多通道时序信号分析，例如将SAR/高光谱影像的不同波段视为"虚拟电极"，构建波段间的空间-光谱关联图，利用GNN捕捉地物类型的联合激活模式，实现实时地物分类或变化检测；也可将多源遥感传感器视为不同节点构建传感器关系图，提升多模态融合效率。

title: LOGOS: Language-guided Oriented Object Detection in Aerial Scenes
summary: Object detection in geospatial scenes, such as satellite and aerial imagery, poses significant challenges due to the varying orientations and densities of objects, as well as the complex backgrounds inherent to remote sensing imagery. Traditional methods for oriented object detection have struggled to address issues such as angular discontinuity, fixed query sizes, and inefficiencies in handling sparse or cluttered scenes. In this paper, we propose LOGOS, a novel transformer-based approach that leverages textual prompts to guide the detection of oriented objects in aerial scenes. In particular, our proposed approach incorporates prompt-modulated content queries to dynamically adjust the model's focus based on the provided text, thereby improving object detection accuracy in complex environments. Empirically, extensive experiments on the DOTA dataset demonstrate that LOGOS outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly in densely packed and rotated object scenarios. Our approach offers a significant step forward in improving the robustness and scalability of oriented object detection in remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: LOGOS是一种基于transformer的文本提示引导定向目标检测方法，通过在遥感图像中引入提示调制内容查询机制，在DOTA数据集上取得了优于现有方法的表现。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像中的定向目标检测面临目标方向多变、密度不均、背景复杂等挑战，传统方法存在角度不连续性、查询尺寸固定、稀疏或杂乱场景处理效率低等问题。
AI.method: 提出LOGOS模型，基于transformer架构，利用文本提示（prompt-modulated content queries）动态调整模型对目标的关注焦点，从而在复杂环境中提升检测精度。
AI.result: 在DOTA数据集上的大量实验表明，LOGOS在密集排列和旋转目标场景下优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在提升遥感应用中定向目标检测的鲁棒性和可扩展性方面迈出了重要一步。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。改进方案：（1）可引入多模态预训练模型（如CLIP）增强文本-视觉对齐能力；（2）针对遥感场景设计领域专用文本提示模板（如目标类别+地理上下文）；（3）结合遥感图像的多尺度特征，优化提示调制机制对不同尺度目标的适应性；（4）扩展至SAR、高光谱等遥感数据，验证跨模态迁移能力；（5）引入弱监督或半监督学习策略，降低对密集标注的依赖。

title: Agentic AI and Retrieval-Augmented Models in Straight-Through Underwriting
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is beginning to reshape actuarial practice, particularly in domains that require reasoning over unstructured documents, heterogeneous data sources, and regulated decision workflows. Actuaries now face a design space that ranges from traditional rule-based automation to large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and multi-agent ``agentic'' systems that plan, retrieve, call tools, and reflect. This paper examines how these emerging architectures can support actuarial priorities such as transparency, auditability, and human-in-the-loop governance, with a focus on straight-through decision processes. To make these ideas concrete, we develop and analyze an agentic AI framework for straight-through underwriting of small commercial Business Owner Policies (BOPs). We construct a synthetic but realistic experimental environment and compare three underwriting pipelines: (i) a single-LLM baseline, (ii) a naive RAG system, and (iii) a multi-agent ``Agentic RAG'' pipeline that combines targeted retrieval, third-party data checks, and explicit multi-step rule evaluation. The agentic system performs best overall, with the largest gains in multi-step and missing-information scenarios, where structured retrieval and reflection help the model avoid unsupported straight-through decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了从传统规则系统到大语言模型、检索增强生成（RAG）以及多智能体“代理型”系统等AI架构如何支持精算实践中的透明度、可审计性和人机协作治理。作者构建了一个针对小型商业企业保单（BOPs）自动核保的代理型AI框架，并在合成环境中比较了三种核保流程：单LLM基线、朴素RAG系统和多智能体Agentic RAG管道。实验表明，代理系统在整体表现上最优，尤其在多步骤和缺失信息场景中，结构化检索与反思机制帮助模型避免了不合理的自动决策。
AI.motivation: 精算实践中需要处理非结构化文档、异构数据源和受监管的决策流程，而现有AI系统在透明度、可审计性和人机协作治理方面存在不足，亟需探索更合适的AI架构来满足精算行业的核心需求。
AI.method: 构建合成但真实的实验环境，设计并对比三种核保管道：(i) 单LLM基线，(ii) 朴素RAG系统，(iii) 多智能体Agentic RAG管道——结合定向检索、第三方数据核查和显式多步骤规则评估。
AI.result: 多智能体Agentic RAG系统整体表现最佳，在多步骤和缺失信息场景中增益最大，结构化检索与反思机制能有效避免模型做出不合理的自动决策。
AI.conclusion: 代理型AI架构（尤其是Agentic RAG）更适合精算领域中需要透明、可审计和人机协作治理的自动决策任务，能够更好地支持直通式处理流程。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：(1) 遥感数据往往涉及多源异构（光学、SAR、LiDAR），可借鉴本文的Agentic RAG框架，构建多智能体系统分别处理不同数据源的检索与融合；(2) 遥感解译中的多步骤规则推理（如土地覆盖分类需按层次规则判断）可复用本文的多步规则评估与反思机制；(3) 遥感产品生产中的质量控制和可审计性需求（如变化检测结果的追溯）可引入本文的透明化决策流程与人工审核接口设计。

title: FedTR: Federated Learning Framework with Transfer Learning for Industrial Visual Inspection
comment: Author's accepted version. Published in Proceedings of the Great Lakes Symposium on VLSI 2024 (GLSVLSI '24)
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a collaborative learning scheme to train deep learning models, where collaborating parties can consolidate their models without sharing local data with other parties, hence preserving data privacy. Nevertheless, when implementing FL in Industrial visual inspection (IVI), the constraints posed by limited data availability and the intricate nature of the inspection tasks significantly impact the performance of the resulting model. This paper introduces FedTR, a novel FL framework incorporating transfer learning designed for Autonomous IVI, focusing on the challenging task of identifying label defects through end-to-end text recognition. Transfer learning is a method that leverages the knowledge of a pre-trained model to adapt to a different dataset. FedTR initially trains the model using a publicly available dataset, after which performs the essential federated learning process with model fine-tuning on the distributed and limited private data. Extensive experiment results demonstrate the effectiveness and feasibility of FedTR on private ink cartridge datasets for label defect identification. FedTR achieves an end-to-end text recognition word-level accuracy of 95.5% and 94.2% on homogeneous and heterogeneous data respectively. Additionally, it attains performance levels that are on par with those achieved through centralized training.

AI.tldr: FedTR是一个将联邦学习与迁移学习结合的框架，专为自主工业视觉检测设计。它先在公开数据集上预训练模型，再在分布式私有数据集上进行联邦微调，用于标签缺陷识别。实验表明FedTR在同质和异质数据上分别达到95.5%和94.2%的端到端文本识别词级准确率，性能接近集中式训练。
AI.motivation: 在工业视觉检测中应用联邦学习时，有限的数据可用性和检测任务的复杂性严重影响了模型性能，现有FL框架无法有效应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出FedTR框架，融合迁移学习与联邦学习：先在公开数据集上预训练模型，再在分布式私有数据上通过联邦学习进行模型微调，实现端到端文本识别。
AI.result: 在私有墨盒数据集上，FedTR在同质数据上达到95.5%的端到端文本识别词级准确率，在异质数据上达到94.2%，性能与集中式训练相当。
AI.conclusion: FedTR有效解决了联邦学习在工业视觉检测中因数据有限和任务复杂导致的性能瓶颈，验证了迁移学习与联邦学习结合在标签缺陷识别中的可行性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临数据标注困难、标注样本有限且分布在不同机构的问题。具体交叉方案：(1) 将FedTR的预训练-联邦微调范式应用于遥感场景分类或目标检测任务，如使用ImageNet或遥感专用数据集（如MillionAID）预训练，再在分布式遥感图像数据上联邦微调；(2) 在遥感领域的标签缺陷检测（如地图标注错误、影像质量检测）中直接迁移FedTR框架；(3) 可进一步改进FedTR，引入遥感数据特有的多模态对齐策略（如光谱-空间特征联合学习）以提升异质数据下的性能。

title: Feedback Manipulation Regularization: Enabling Offline Agent Alignment for Imitation Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) research has increasingly shifted focus towards alignment, ensuring agents learn behaviors adhering to human values. While human demonstrations and feedback have proven crucial for alignment, existing approaches predominantly combine these signals using multi-stage pipelines designed for the contextual bandit framing of language generation. Yet little work explores how these complementary inputs can serve as a richer, interconnected signal for single-stage offline training in fully sequential decision-making environments. We propose Feedback Manipulation Regularization (FMR), an algorithm-agnostic method that harnesses evaluative feedback as a corrective signal to improve the alignment of imitation learning policies. We adapt Safety Gymnasium environments to be a principled testbed for alignment evaluation, demonstrating improved aptitude and up to a 98\% reduction in misalignment across a range of imitation learning algorithms. FMR remains robust in limited data regimes, even when learning from scarce aligned and uninformative noisy demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 提出反馈操纵正则化（FMR）方法，利用评估性反馈作为纠正信号，在完全序列决策环境中提升模仿学习策略的对齐性，在Safety Gymnasium环境中实现高达98%的对齐失误减少。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法主要在多阶段流水线中结合人类演示和反馈，但未探索如何在单阶段离线训练中利用这些互补信号。缺乏在完全序列决策环境中利用评估性反馈作为纠正信号来提升模仿学习对齐性的研究。
AI.method: 提出反馈操纵正则化（FMR），一种算法无关的方法，将评估性反馈作为纠正信号融入模仿学习策略的训练过程，实现单阶段离线训练。并改编Safety Gymnasium环境作为对齐评估的测试平台。
AI.result: 在多种模仿学习算法上，FMR实现了高达98%的对齐失误减少，且在有限数据、稀缺对齐演示和噪声演示等困难场景下仍保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FMR能够利用评估性反馈有效提升序列决策环境中模仿学习策略的对齐性，且不依赖特定算法，在数据稀缺场景下依然有效。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文的FMR方法可应用于遥感领域的智能体对齐问题，如遥感图像解译中的自主决策系统（如卫星自主任务规划、无人机路径规划）。具体方案：1）将遥感专家标注作为评估性反馈，对基于遥感数据训练的模仿学习策略进行正则化；2）在遥感环境（如卫星调度、目标检测）中构建类似Safety Gymnasium的对齐评估测试床；3）利用FMR减少遥感智能体在有限样本下的误判行为（如误分类、路径违规）。

title: LightCrafter: PBR-Conditioned Video Diffusion Refinement for Controllable and Consistent Relighting
summary: Video relighting requires balancing long-form temporal consistency with a physically grounded understanding of light transport, which depends on accurate estimation of intrinsic scene properties such as materials, geometry, and illumination. Existing methods follow two paradigms: (1) reconstruct a video's photometric properties via inverse rendering and relight them to a target illumination via forward rendering, using physically-based rendering (PBR) or a neural renderer; these suffer from noisy reconstructions and struggle with hard-to-model effects such as global illumination. (2) Frame the task as generative video-to-video translation conditioned on relighting targets (a target environment map or text); this limits relighting control and temporal stability, since diffusion models struggle to translate long-form videos, and is constrained by the availability of input/relit training pairs. We propose LightCrafter, a hybrid pipeline that reformulates video relighting as video translation of a proxy video: rather than translating the input video directly to the target, we translate a PBR rendering of the input under the target illumination to the final target. This bakes illumination targets into the PBR proxy, removing the need to teach the diffusion model illumination concepts like environment maps, and enables more intricate lighting control while naturally providing long-form temporal consistency. We show PBR renders alone already outperform some prior art but struggle with effects like global illumination; to capture these, we leverage photometric priors in video generation models by post-training CogVideoX on synthetic video pairs and real-world unpaired videos. We outperform prior state-of-the-art on existing real-world relighting benchmarks and contribute a synthetic benchmark for further analysis. We will release our dataset, benchmark, metrics, and code.

AI.tldr: LightCrafter提出一种混合管线，将视频重光照重新定义为对PBR代理视频的视频翻译，通过在目标光照下渲染输入视频的PBR代理，再利用扩散模型后处理以捕捉全局照明等难以建模的效果，在真实世界基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频重光照方法存在两类范式：基于逆渲染的物理方法受限于噪声重建且难以处理全局光照等复杂效应；基于生成式视频翻译的方法则受限于光照控制粒度、时间一致性和训练数据对的可获得性。作者旨在结合两者优势，提出一种既具备物理可解释性又能生成高质量、时间一致结果的混合方案。
AI.method: 提出LightCrafter混合管线：(1) 首先对输入视频进行PBR渲染，在目标光照下生成代理视频（PBR proxy）；(2) 将PBR代理视频作为输入，训练并利用视频生成模型（基于CogVideoX后训练）将其翻译为最终的重光照视频。该框架将光照目标烘焙到PBR代理中，免除扩散模型学习光照概念（如环境贴图）的需要，同时利用合成视频对和真实无配对视频进行后训练以捕获全局光照等复杂效果。
AI.result: 在现有真实世界重光照基准上超越此前最先进方法，并贡献了一个用于进一步分析的合成基准。PBR渲染本身已优于部分先前工作，但在全局光照等效果上仍有不足；结合视频生成模型后处理能有效弥补这一差距。
AI.conclusion: LightCrafter通过混合PBR物理渲染与扩散模型生成能力，在保持长时间时间一致性的同时实现了更精细的光照控制，证明了将物理先验与生成先验结合是视频重光照的有效路径。计划开源数据集、基准、评估指标和代码。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。遥感领域存在类似问题：多时相遥感影像的光照/阴影不一致影响变化检测和地物分类。改进方案：(1) 将PBR渲染代理替换为遥感物理模型（如大气辐射传输模型），将目标光照条件（如太阳方位角/天顶角、大气参数）烘焙到代理影像中；(2) 利用视频生成模型（或时序生成对抗网络）对代理影像进行后处理，校正因复杂地形、云阴影等导致的非朗伯体效应和多次散射；(3) 合成-真实数据对训练策略可迁移至遥感影像对（如仿真影像与真实卫星影像配对），减少对大规模真实配对数据的依赖。

title: Nigeria Machinery: A Low-Resource Industrial Dataset with a Domain-Grounded Reasoning Layer
summary: There is relatively little, public, and model-ready data on industrial machinery for African economies. This makes it hard to do quantitative analysis or to train language models on numeric tasks grounded in that setting. We release two things to help with part of this problem. The first is the Nigeria Machinery Usage and Failures Dataset: 89 machine-level records across 28 indicators, covering Nigeria's manufacturing and oil and gas sectors from 2006 to 2025. Every record names a public source and is decoded by a codebook. The second is a method for building chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning examples from these sparse numeric values. The result is 94 prompt, completion, and reasoning-trace rows. In every row, the prompt names the real indicator, subsector, year, and source of the record it comes from. The data adaptation work was carried out by Adaption Labs. Along the way we describe a problem that is common when language models are used to build datasets. The prompts can match the real numbers while saying nothing about the real domain. We show that fixing this raises the share of domain-grounded prompts from 1 out of 78 in an earlier release to 94 out of 94, and that every retrieval answer now matches its source value (84 out of 84). We release the data, the reasoning layer, and a per-row provenance file under CC-BY-4.0. We are clear about the limits. With 89 records and 17 indicators that have only one observation, this is a reference and seed dataset, not a large training set. Most reasoning rows are retrieval rather than multi-step computation.

AI.tldr: 该论文发布了尼日利亚工业机械数据集（89条记录，28个指标，覆盖2006-2025年），并提出了一种从稀疏数值数据构建链式思维推理示例的方法，解决了语言模型生成数据集时提示与真实领域脱节的问题，最终实现了94/94的领域接地提示和84/84的检索正确率。
AI.motivation: 非洲经济体工业机械的公开、模型可用数据稀缺，导致难以进行定量分析或在数值任务上训练语言模型，现有方法构建的数据集存在提示与真实领域脱节的严重问题。
AI.method: 构建尼日利亚机械使用与故障数据集（89条记录，28个指标，含代码本和来源）；提出从稀疏数值数据构建链式思维推理示例的方法，通过确保提示与真实领域绑定来修复领域脱节问题。
AI.result: 生成了94行提示-补全-推理轨迹数据，领域接地提示比例从1/78提升至94/94，检索答案与源值匹配率从提升至84/84。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集是参考种子数据集而非大规模训练集，主要适用于检索而非多步计算任务，明确说明了数据限制（89条记录，17个指标仅单次观测）。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。该论文解决的是稀疏数值数据与语言模型接地问题，与遥感领域数据稀缺、标注成本高的痛点高度相似。具体交叉方案：（1）将本方法应用于遥感领域的稀疏地面观测数据（如气象站、土壤传感器等稀疏站点数据）构建链式思维推理数据集，提升遥感大模型对数值的定量理解能力；（2）借鉴其"提示必须与真实领域绑定"的校验思路，用于遥感模型训练时确保遥感影像元数据（经纬度、时间、传感器等）与模型输入的真实域对齐，防止模型学到虚假关联。

title: SAGA: Stable Acceleration Guidance for Autoregressive Video Generation
summary: Autoregressive video diffusion enables efficient streaming and long-horizon video generation, but repeatedly reusing generated latents as causal context can amplify temporal errors, resulting in flickering, motion jitter, and structural drift. In this paper, we investigate this failure mode from a spectral kinematic perspective and identify discrete latent acceleration as an effective signal for revealing unstable high-frequency temporal perturbations. To this end, we propose SAGA, a training-free \textbf{\textit{s}}table \textbf{\textit{a}}cceleration \textbf{\textit{g}}uidance approach for \textbf{\textit{a}}utoregressive video generation. SAGA integrates an acceleration domain spectral guidance objective based on finite-window Slepian projections with a structured autoregressive noise initialization strategy that suppresses short-range temporal correlations while preserving long-range motion structure. Without retraining or modifying the backbone, SAGA can be directly applied to existing chunk-wise autoregressive diffusion models, which is the prevalent setting for high-quality generation. Extensive experiments show that SAGA consistently improves temporal quality across multiple autoregressive diffusion models. On Self-Forcing, SAGA improves Temporal Quality from 97.30 to 97.91 and Image Quality from 69.60 to 70.51. Moreover, spectral analysis and human preference studies demonstrate that SAGA reduces temporal instability while maintaining visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAGA，一种无需训练的稳定加速引导方法，通过加速度域谱引导和结构化自回归噪声初始化，解决自回归视频扩散中的时域误差累积问题，有效减少闪烁、运动抖动和结构漂移。
AI.motivation: 自回归视频扩散中，重复使用生成潜变量作为因果上下文会放大时域误差，导致闪烁、运动抖动和结构漂移，目前缺乏有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SAGA方法，包含两个核心组件：1）基于有限窗Slepian投影的加速度域谱引导目标，用于抑制高频时域扰动；2）结构化自回归噪声初始化策略，抑制短程时域相关性同时保留长程运动结构。该方法无需重新训练或修改主干网络，可直接应用于现有的分块自回归扩散模型。
AI.result: 在Self-Forcing模型上，时域质量从97.30提升至97.91，图像质量从69.60提升至70.51。谱分析和人类偏好研究均表明SAGA能减少时域不稳定性同时保持视觉保真度。
AI.conclusion: SAGA是一种有效的训练自由方法，可显著改善自回归视频扩散模型的时域质量，具有即插即用的优势。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感视频生成（如卫星时序图像预测、云运动模拟）中同样面临时域误差累积问题。可将SAGA的加速度域谱引导方法应用于遥感视频扩散模型，用于抑制遥感时序数据中的高频闪烁和运动抖动；结构化噪声初始化策略可帮助保持地表变化的长程结构（如植被生长、城市扩展），同时抑制短期噪声（如云层随机波动）。

title: Persona Cartography: Charting Language Model Personality Traits in Weight Space
summary: Large language models exhibit recurring behavioural patterns -- personas -- that shape generalisation and safety, but we lack reliable tools for decomposing, measuring, and controlling them. Our central insight is to treat personas as positions in a space of behavioural traits, using the OCEAN framework to describe model personas in terms of Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism. We train low-rank adapters to amplify or suppress individual traits, and evaluate their effects using an LLM-judge calibrated against a human-validated panel, trait-specific multiple-choice benchmarks, and standard capability evaluations. Across six models from three families (4B-32B), we find that each adapter moves its target trait largely monotonically with scale, combines approximately additively with other adapters to construct mixed personas, and preserves performance on capability benchmarks at moderate scales. We further show that the induced trait axes affect safety-relevant behaviour in downstream evaluations: for example, moving along neuroticism and agreeableness axes affects frustration and sycophancy respectively. We also introduce an unsupervised psychometric pipeline that recovers four interpretable behavioural factors (tone, initiative, didacticism, epistemic caution) from model rollouts. Persona control can then be considered in terms of learning, scaling, and composing traits in weight space, providing a bridge between personality measurement, model editing, and safety.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将大语言模型的行为模式（人格）视为OCEAN五因素空间中的位置，通过训练低秩适配器（LoRA）来放大或抑制特定人格特质，实现模型人格的可控调节。实验表明，这些适配器在多个模型上表现出单调性、可加性，并能在保持模型能力的同时影响安全相关行为（如神经质影响挫败感、宜人性影响谄媚）。此外，还提出了一种无监督心理测量流程，能从模型输出中恢复出四个可解释的行为因子（语气、主动性、说教性、认知谨慎），为人格测量、模型编辑与安全之间建立了桥梁。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型表现出重复的行为模式（人格），这些模式影响模型的泛化能力和安全性，但缺乏可靠的工具来分解、测量和控制这些行为模式。
AI.method: 1. 将模型人格视为OCEAN（开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性、神经质）五因素空间中的位置；2. 训练低秩适配器（LoRA）来放大或抑制特定人格特质；3. 使用LLM-judge（经人类验证的校准面板）、特质特异性多项选择基准和标准能力评估进行效果评估；4. 提出无监督心理测量流程从模型输出中恢复行为因子。
AI.result: 1. 每个适配器对目标特质的移动在大尺度上呈现单调性；2. 不同适配器可近似加性组合以构建混合人格；3. 在中等尺度上保持能力基准性能；4. 诱导的特质轴影响安全相关行为（神经质轴影响挫败感，宜人性轴影响谄媚）；5. 无监督流程恢复了四个可解释的行为因子（语气、主动性、说教性、认知谨慎）。
AI.conclusion: 人格控制可以在权重空间中通过学习、缩放和组合特质来实现，为人格测量、模型编辑和安全性之间提供了桥梁。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1. 遥感大模型（如GeoFM、SpectralGPT）可引入OCEAN人格框架来调控模型的决策风格，例如在灾害检测中调节"尽责性"以提高对微小异常的敏感度，或在土地分类中调节"开放性"以增强对未知地物的探索能力；2. 可训练LoRA适配器来调控遥感模型对模糊/低质量影像（如云遮挡数据）的"神经质"（焦虑/不确定性）响应，改善鲁棒性；3. 无监督心理测量流程可用于分析遥感模型在不同数据集上的行为因子（如"认知谨慎"对应误报率控制），辅助模型选择和校准。

title: APIVOT: Adaptive Planning with Interleaved Vision-Language Thoughts
summary: Long-horizon robot planning requires jointly reasoning over semantic task structure and geometric feasibility. To successfully execute a task, a robot must decompose goals, select task-relevant objects, and sequence actions, while ensuring that plans satisfy spatial constraints such as limited free space and object collisions. In this work, we propose APIVOT, a VLM-based planner that adaptively interleaves language and visual thoughts for long-horizon planning. APIVOT learns to leverage language for semantic reasoning, while using visual thoughts as imagined future states for internal verification of geometric feasibility. On long-horizon kitchen tasks, APIVOT outperforms general-purpose VLMs and prior planning frameworks, achieving the largest gains in spatially constrained settings. We find that APIVOT learns meaningful modality selection behavior, demonstrating that adaptive interleaving of vision-language thoughts improves both planning success and reasoning efficiency.

AI.tldr: APIVOT是一种基于VLM的规划器，通过自适应交替语言和视觉思考来实现长视野机器人规划，在厨房任务中优于通用VLM和先前规划框架，尤其在空间受限场景下提升显著。
AI.motivation: 长视野机器人规划需要同时推理语义任务结构和几何可行性，现有方法难以兼顾两者，因此提出一种能自适应交替语言与视觉思考的规划方法。
AI.method: 提出APIVOT，一种VLM-based规划器，学习在语义推理时使用语言思考，在几何可行性内部验证时使用视觉思考（作为想象的未来状态），实现语言与视觉思考的自适应交替。
AI.result: 在长视野厨房任务中，APIVOT优于通用VLM和先前规划框架，在空间受限设置下增益最大，并表现出有意义的模态选择行为。
AI.conclusion: 自适应交替视觉-语言思考能同时提升规划成功率和推理效率，验证了模态选择行为的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该框架的自适应交替推理机制可迁移至遥感任务规划：（1）将遥感场景中的空间约束（如卫星轨道限制、传感器视场角）编码为视觉思考进行几何可行性验证；（2）利用语言思考处理任务分解（如目标区域选择、观测序列编排）；（3）可应用于无人机巡检路径规划，交替使用遥感影像（视觉）与任务语义描述（语言）进行动态决策。

title: Evaluating the Effect of Frame Rate in Sequence-Based Classification of Autism-Related Self-Stimulatory Hand Idiosyncrasies
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Preliminary version presented as a poster at the AMIA 2024 Informatics Summit
summary: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) affects over 75 million individuals worldwide, yet scalable computational methods for remote behavioral screening remain limited. This study addresses two complementary challenges in automated detection of autism-related self-stimulatory behaviors from video: (1) identifying the optimal sequence-based neural network architecture and temporal sampling rate, and (2) characterizing data augmentation strategies for training on small behavioral datasets. For the first objective, long short-term memory (LSTM) and gated recurrent unit (GRU) models were trained on pose-derived features from the Self-Stimulatory Behavior Diagnosis (SSBD) dataset at frame sampling intervals of 1, 5, 15, 30, 45, and 90 frames. Both architectures exceeded prior convolutional neural network (CNN) baselines (62-76% accuracy), with peak accuracies of 97.5% (LSTM) and 98.75% (GRU) at a sampling interval of every 15 frames. For the second objective, ten data augmentation strategies were applied to an I3D transfer learning pipeline, with an ablation study quantifying the marginal contribution of each technique. Horizontal flip achieved the highest standalone accuracy (48.78%), while exclusion of upsampling from the augmentation pipeline produced the largest performance degradation, indicating its necessity for complex behavioral video augmentation. A personalized machine learning approach, in which per-subject models were trained and tested on temporally split segments of each video, produced consistent predictions (mean loss 1.84, SD 0.79). These results provide practitioners with concrete guidance on architecture selection, sampling rate, and augmentation strategy for video-based behavioral classification in data-scarce clinical domains.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）相关自我刺激行为的视频自动检测，系统研究了序列神经网络架构（LSTM vs GRU）和时间采样率的最优选择，以及小样本行为数据集上的数据增强策略。在SSBD数据集上，GRU在每15帧采样时达到最高准确率98.75%，超越此前CNN基线。消融实验表明上采样（upsampling）是复杂行为视频增强中不可或缺的技术。个性化机器学习方法在时序分割数据上取得了稳定预测结果。
AI.motivation: 全球超过7500万ASD患者，但面向远程行为筛查的可扩展计算方法仍然有限，亟需解决小样本视频数据下自我刺激行为自动检测的架构选择、采样率优化和数据增强策略问题。
AI.method: (1) 在SSBD数据集上，基于姿态特征训练LSTM和GRU模型，对比帧采样间隔1、5、15、30、45、90帧的性能； (2) 在I3D迁移学习流水线上应用十种数据增强策略，通过消融实验量化每种技术的边际贡献； (3) 采用个性化机器学习方法，对每个受试者训练时序分割的视频段模型。
AI.result: LSTM和GRU均超过CNN基线（62-76%），最高准确率分别为97.5%（LSTM）和98.75%（GRU），均在采样间隔15帧时达到最优。水平翻转取得最高独立准确率48.78%；去除上采样导致性能下降最大。个性化模型平均损失1.84，标准差0.79。
AI.conclusion: 为数据稀缺的临床视频行为分类场景提供了架构选择（GRU优于LSTM）、最优采样率（15帧间隔）和增强策略（上采样不可或缺）的具体指导。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文的序列建模方法可直接迁移至遥感时序分析任务： (1) GRU/LSTM架构可用于遥感植被指数时间序列变化检测（如NDVI异常监测），15帧采样策略可转化为时序重采样间隔优化； (2) 数据增强消融实验方法可应用于遥感小样本场景（如灾害检测、稀有种分类），其中上采样策略对遥感时序数据的不平衡类别尤为关键； (3) 个性化机器学习可类比为面向不同遥感区域或传感器特性的区域自适应模型训练。改进方向：可进一步引入注意力机制或Transformer替代GRU处理更长的遥感时序序列。

title: Post-Training in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end models that map multimodal inputs directly to future trajectories/maneuvers have emerged as an increasingly prominent research paradigm in autonomous driving. This class of models includes both Vision-Language-Action models and trajectory-generative planners. Unlike classic machine learning applications, autonomous vehicles operate in safety-critical and interaction-intensive environments where traditional open-loop imitation of expert demonstrations is not sufficient to ensure reliability. In particular, small execution errors can accumulate over time, while recovery behaviors are scarce in training data. In addition, long-horizon objectives such as safety and driving comfort are not captured by pointwise labels either. These limitations have motivated a shift toward post-training techniques, which further refine driving policies beyond pure imitation. This survey presents a unified view of post-training for autonomous driving by defining its scope and organizing the existing literature into four major families based on the form of supervision they use. For each family, we discuss its capabilities, limitations, and open challenges. We aim to facilitate a systematic understanding of this emerging area and stimulate future research on reliable and efficient post-training for autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了自动驾驶中端到端模型的后训练技术，将其分为四大类并讨论各自的能力、局限与挑战，旨在推动从纯模仿学习向更可靠的后训练范式转变。
AI.motivation: 传统开环模仿学习在自动驾驶中面临执行误差累积、恢复行为数据稀缺、以及点状标签无法捕捉长期安全与舒适目标等局限，亟需后训练技术来进一步优化驾驶策略。
AI.method: 本文通过统一视角定义后训练的范围，将现有文献按监督信号形式分为四个主要家族，并对每个家族的能力、局限性和开放挑战进行系统梳理与讨论。
AI.result: 整理出自动驾驶后训练的四种主要技术路线，明确了各方法的适用场景与当前瓶颈，揭示了该领域向可靠高效后训练发展的趋势。
AI.conclusion: 后训练技术是弥补纯模仿学习不足的关键方向，未来需在可靠性、效率和长期目标对齐方面进一步研究。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该综述中关于后训练技术的分类框架可迁移至遥感领域的地面目标检测与轨迹预测任务：1）遥感影像中的车辆/船舶轨迹预测同样面临开环模仿学习的误差累积问题，可借鉴其后训练方法；2）长期指标（如连续跟踪稳定性）无法由逐帧标签捕捉，可采用类似的后训练优化策略；3）多模态融合（视觉+其他传感器）的端到端框架可应用于遥感视频中的运动规划，需针对遥感数据特点（低分辨率、大尺度场景）调整模型结构。

title: Agentic Neural Architecture Search
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) methods have grown increasingly efficient, yet they remain bounded by manually engineered search spaces that require substantial domain expertise and must be rebuilt for every new task. Large language models (LLMs) can generate architectures in an open-ended space, but how to optimally divide the labor between LLM-driven design and NAS-driven search remains unexplored. We propose a mechanism that bridges these two paradigms: an LLM produces a high-quality seed architecture, then decomposes it into a "slotted architecture", a scaffold with named, interchangeable module slots that automatically defines a bounded, task-specific search space for conventional NAS to explore, without manual engineering. We instantiate this mechanism in AgentNAS, a modular three-phase pipeline in which each component's contribution can be measured independently. On 17 tasks spanning classification, dense regression, segmentation, and multi-label tagging across diverse modalities (NAS-Bench-360 and Unseen NAS), AgentNAS establishes a new state of the art on 11 tasks, outperforming published baselines including task-specific expert designs. Ablation studies show that the two search mechanisms are broadly complementary: the LLM-generated seed already surpasses published baselines on the majority of tasks, and NAS delivers additional gains in most cases through combinatorial recombination across slots, a mode of search that independent LLM samples cannot replicate. These patterns hold across three LLMs of different capability levels, confirming that the division of labor is robust. Our code is available at https://github.com/alroimfebruary/AgentNAS.

AI.tldr: AgentNAS提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）和神经架构搜索（NAS）的混合范式：LLM生成高质量种子架构并分解为“槽位架构”（带命名的可互换模块槽），自动定义有界的任务特定搜索空间供NAS探索，无需人工工程。在17个跨模态任务上，AgentNAS在11个任务上达到新SOTA，消融实验证明LLM生成和NAS搜索具有互补性。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法受限于手工设计的搜索空间，需要大量领域知识且需为每个新任务重新构建；LLM虽能在开放空间中生成架构，但如何最优分配LLM驱动设计与NAS驱动搜索之间的劳动分工尚未被探索。
AI.method: 提出AgentNAS的三阶段模块化流水线：(1) LLM生成高质量种子架构；(2) 将种子架构分解为“槽位架构”（scaffold with named, interchangeable module slots），自动定义有界的任务特定搜索空间；(3) 在该搜索空间上运行传统NAS进行组合搜索。每个组件的贡献可独立衡量。
AI.result: 在NAS-Bench-360和Unseen NAS的17个任务（分类、密集回归、分割、多标签标注）上，AgentNAS在11个任务上达到新SOTA，超越包括任务特定专家设计在内的已发表基线。LLM生成的种子在多数任务上已超越基线，NAS通过跨槽位组合重组带来进一步增益，这种搜索模式无法被独立LLM样本复制。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动设计与NAS驱动搜索具有广泛的互补性，LLM负责高质量种子生成，NAS负责组合搜索。该分工模式在三个不同能力级别的LLM上均表现鲁棒，验证了混合范式的有效性和泛化性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。具体方案：(1) 遥感任务（如场景分类、语义分割、变化检测）常需针对不同传感器（光学、SAR、高光谱）设计专用架构，AgentNAS可自动生成并优化遥感专用架构；(2) 将多模态遥感任务（如多光谱+LiDAR融合）纳入其槽位架构设计，LLM生成融合模块种子，NAS搜索最优融合策略；(3) 遥感数据分布差异大（如不同分辨率、天气条件），可扩展其“任务特定搜索空间”概念到遥感领域的域适应架构搜索。

title: UAV-OVVIS: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles Also Need Open-Vocabulary Video Instance Segmentation
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos are widely used in traffic monitoring, urban management, and emergency rescue. However, existing UAV video perception mainly relies on box-level localization and trajectory association under predefined categories, making it difficult to simultaneously support flexible queries and fine-grained instance-level dynamic understanding in open scenarios. To this end, we introduce a new task, UAV Open-Vocabulary Video Instance Segmentation (UAV-OVVIS), which discovers targets in UAV videos according to open-vocabulary queries and outputs instance-level segmentation trajectories with globally consistent identities. Considering the scarcity of instance-level annotations in UAV scenarios, we propose AeroTrack, a training-free unified framework. AeroTrack centers on periodic open-vocabulary detection, short-segment mask propagation, and cross-segment identity unification, reusing existing visual foundation models to enable UAV-OVVIS. Based on this framework, we instantiate five AeroTrack variants and construct AeroVIS, an evaluation benchmark for UAV-OVVIS containing 9 UAV object categories and 8,279 trajectories. Experiments show that AeroTrack substantially outperforms existing general video instance segmentation methods in UAV scenarios and demonstrates strong open-vocabulary robustness and generalization. To support future research, we release AeroTrack and AeroVIS as a unified framework and benchmark for UAV-OVVIS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了无人机开放词汇视频实例分割（UAV-OVVIS）新任务，并设计了无需训练的AeroTrack框架，通过周期性开放词汇检测、短片段掩码传播和跨片段身份统一，在无人机视频中实现开放词汇的实例级分割轨迹追踪。同时构建了包含9类目标、8279条轨迹的AeroVIS基准。实验表明该方法显著优于现有通用视频实例分割方法，并展现出强开放词汇鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机视频感知主要依赖预定义类别下的框级定位和轨迹关联，难以同时支持灵活查询和细粒度实例级动态理解。为突破这一局限，本文引入无人机开放词汇视频实例分割新任务，使无人机视频能根据任意文本查询发现目标并输出实例级分割轨迹。
AI.method: 提出AeroTrack无训练统一框架，核心包含三大模块：1）周期性开放词汇检测，利用现有视觉基础模型检测目标；2）短片段掩码传播，在短时间内保持分割一致性；3）跨片段身份统一，为不同片段中的同一实例分配全局一致的身份标识。该框架无需额外训练，直接复用现成的视觉基础模型。
AI.result: 在自建AeroVIS基准上（9类无人机目标、8279条轨迹），AeroTrack显著优于现有通用视频实例分割方法，并展现出强大的开放词汇鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AeroTrack作为首个无人机开放词汇视频实例分割框架，有效解决了无人机场景下实例级标注稀缺的问题，实现了无需训练的开放词汇细粒度实例追踪，为推动无人机视频在交通监控、城市管理、应急响应等场景的智能感知提供了新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该工作本身就是遥感无人机视频感知的典型应用。改进方向：1）引入时间维度注意力机制优化跨片段身份关联，减少无人机视角下目标快速移动导致的身份切换错误；2）结合地理空间坐标信息，将实例分割结果投影到地理坐标系以提升大范围场景下的全局一致性；3）扩展至多模态融合（如红外、SAR），增强在恶劣天气或夜间环境下的感知鲁棒性；4）优化轻量化版本以适配边缘部署，提升实时处理能力；5）引入持续学习机制，使模型能在飞行过程中自适应学习新类别目标。

title: Concretized Proposition Prompting Resolves Composition-Knowledge Dichotomy in Large Language Models
summary: LLMs often struggle to balance compositionality with knowledgeability, a challenge we define as Composition-Knowledge Dichotomy. To address this, we propose Concretized Proposition Prompting (CPP), a framework that explicitly concretizes propositions relevant to questions. The results demonstrate that CPP significantly enhances reasoning performance, particularly in medical benchmarks where precise knowledge is paramount, while being competitive on math benchmarks where deductive reasoning is prioritized. Additional experiments reveal that CPP is scalable to various foundation models and parameter sizes, being a fundamental paradigm that bridges the gap between composition- and knowledge-based approaches. Consequently, CPP resolves the composition-knowledge dichotomy by providing a solid foundation for logically organized and factually grounded reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出Concretized Proposition Prompting (CPP)框架，通过显式具体化与问题相关的命题，解决了LLMs在组合性与知识性之间的平衡难题（即组合-知识二分法），在医学基准上表现优异，在数学基准上也具有竞争力，且可扩展至多种基础模型。
AI.motivation: LLMs在处理需要同时具备组合推理能力和知识储备的任务时，往往难以在两者间取得平衡，存在组合-知识二分法（Composition-Knowledge Dichotomy）问题。
AI.method: 提出Concretized Proposition Prompting (CPP)框架，核心思想是显式地将与问题相关的命题进行具体化（concretize），从而在提示过程中为模型提供更明确的事实基础和逻辑组织。
AI.result: CPP显著提升了推理性能，尤其在知识密集型医学基准测试中表现突出，在强调演绎推理的数学基准上也具有竞争力。此外，CPP可扩展至多种基础模型和参数规模。
AI.conclusion: CPP通过为逻辑组织和事实依据的推理提供坚实基础，有效解决了组合-知识二分法问题，是一种连接组合型方法与知识型方法的基础范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。CPP框架可应用于遥感推理任务，如场景分类、变化检测和目标识别等需要同时结合遥感专业知识（如光谱特征、地物规律）与逻辑推理（如空间关系推理、多时相分析）的场景。具体方案：将遥感影像中的地理命题（如"该区域NDVI值下降表明植被退化"）进行显式具体化，构建遥感知识命题库，引导LLM在推理时既利用遥感领域知识又进行结构化逻辑推理，缓解遥感领域知识幻觉问题。

title: LDFE: Laplacian Decoupled Feature Enhancement Block for Dual-Stream CNN-based RGB-IR Object Detection
summary: The complementary information between RGB and IR images can significantly enhance object detection performance under extreme conditions. Existing methods prefer dual-stream CNN backbones built upon YOLO for feature extraction and focus on the design of feature fusion. In this paper, we introduce the Laplacian Decoupled Feature Enhancement block (LDFE) to fuse features from different stages of the dual-stream CNN backbone. By design, LDFE simultaneously considers the characteristics of modalities and structures for feature fusion by employing global-local decomposition, denoising, fusion, and reconstruction, sequentially. The LDFE first separates features into global and local components based on Laplacian Pyramid, and then performs denoising and fusion based on Global State Space Enhancement module (GS2E) and Local Convolutional Correlation Enhancement module (LC2E) separately. Specifically, the GS2E conducts a two-branch architecture for the main and auxiliary modalities. It dynamically suppresses noise in the main modality through cross-modal attention derived from the auxiliary modality, while employing a State Space Model to capture long-range dependencies within the global feature representations of the main modality. To obtain bidirectional interaction, the two modalities systematically alternate their main/auxiliary roles. Moreover, the LC2E suppresses noise in local features and leverages spatial and channel dimension along with triple convolution to extract fine-grained details for fusion. These innovative designs achieve a significant performance improvement, with mAP surpassing the SOTA methods 6.2%, 3.7%, 4.7%, 2.3%, 4.1% and 2.0% on M3FD, DroneVehicle, LLVIP, FLIR-Aligned, KAIST and VEDAI datasets,respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Laplacian解耦特征增强模块(LDFE)，通过拉普拉斯金字塔进行全局-局部分解、去噪、融合和重建，结合全局状态空间增强模块(GS2E)和局部卷积相关增强模块(LC2E)，在六个RGB-IR目标检测数据集上超越SOTA方法2.0%-6.2% mAP。
AI.motivation: 现有基于YOLO的双流CNN骨干网络在RGB和IR图像特征融合时，未能同时考虑模态特性和结构特性，导致极端条件下目标检测性能受限。
AI.method: 提出LDFE模块，包含：1) 基于拉普拉斯金字塔的全局-局部分解；2) GS2E：采用双分支架构，主模态通过辅助模态的跨模态注意力动态抑制噪声，并引入状态空间模型(SSM)捕获全局长程依赖，两模态交替主/辅角色实现双向交互；3) LC2E：利用空间和通道维度结合三重卷积提取细粒度局部细节并去噪融合；4) 最后进行特征重建。
AI.result: 在M3FD、DroneVehicle、LLVIP、FLIR-Aligned、KAIST和VEDAI六个数据集上，mAP分别超越SOTA方法6.2%、3.7%、4.7%、2.3%、4.1%和2.0%。
AI.conclusion: LDFE通过全局-局部分解与双向跨模态交互，有效融合RGB和IR特征，显著提升了多模态目标检测性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该论文本身就是遥感领域相关论文（已在DroneVehicle和VEDAI遥感数据集上验证）。改进方案：1) 针对遥感影像中地物尺度差异大的特点，可在拉普拉斯金字塔分解中引入多尺度自适应层数选择机制；2) GS2E中的状态空间模型可替换为遥感专用的旋转不变注意力机制，以适应遥感目标的方向多样性；3) 可引入地理空间先验知识（如地物分布约束）辅助跨模态融合。

title: From Prompts to Contracts: Harness Engineering for Auditable Enterprise LLM Agents
comment: 32 pages, 6 figures, 16 tables. Reference implementation and evaluation artifacts: https://github.com/hammerbaki/enterprise-llm-agent-harness (archived at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21269426)
summary: Enterprise large language model (LLM) applications often begin as prototypes whose behavior is carried by prompts and retrieval context. Productization adds requirements for source boundaries, entity routing, answer contracts, and reproducible traces. We present a harness-engineering approach that reconstructs this pattern into a traceable, auditable LLM-agent architecture: deterministic behavior moves into code, manifests, schemas, and validation artifacts around a replaceable composition boundary, while source-backed claims remain the authority for runtime answers. We instantiate it on a public-data slice of five Korean corporate groups (25 listed companies) and evaluate three research questions. (1) The harness preserves its source-grounding, entity-routing, trace, output-hygiene, and recommendation-language contracts across the fixed validation scenarios; a fault-injection control confirms the validators flag deliberately broken contracts. (2) The checks the harness enforces held under model substitution: across three hosted models, they passed on all 270 composition-boundary runs; failures were confined to the model-composed side and were caught and recorded. (3) The code-owned guarantees are load-bearing, not reproducible by prompting alone: holding the model fixed and varying only the enforcement layer, prompt instructions alone let recommendation-language and internal-trace-leakage violations reach the reader, which the harness blocks entirely. A bolt-on external guardrail prevents such violations too but over-refuses, dropping utility to 88/120 where the harness preserves full utility (120/120); in this ablation, only code-owned enforcement preserves both safety and utility. The result is a reusable engineering pattern for turning exploratory prototypes into auditable applications with versioned source, control, and validation artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种“工具链工程”（harness-engineering）方法，将企业LLM应用从原型阶段过渡到可审计、可追溯的产品化系统。该方法将确定性行为（如源边界、实体路由、答案合约、可复现追踪）移至代码、清单、模式和验证工件中，围绕可替换的组合边界构建，并基于来源的声明作为运行时答案的权威来源。在五家韩国企业集团（25家上市公司）的数据上验证了三个研究问题，结果表明该方法在模型替换、故障注入和纯提示对比中均能保证安全性与效用性。
AI.motivation: 企业大语言模型（LLM）应用通常以原型开始，其行为由提示（prompt）和检索上下文驱动。产品化过程中需要满足源边界、实体路由、答案合约和可重复追踪等要求。现有方法依赖纯提示工程无法保证这些关键属性的可靠执行，亟需一种可审计、可追溯的工程架构。
AI.method: 提出工具链工程方法（harness-engineering），核心思路是将确定性行为从提示中剥离，重构为代码、清单（manifests）、模式（schemas）和验证工件（validation artifacts），围绕可替换的组合边界（composition boundary）构建。系统架构中，代码控制的部分负责合约执行，而LLM仅负责基于来源生成运行时答案。通过故障注入、模型替换（三个托管模型）和纯提示消融实验进行验证。
AI.result: (1) 工具链在所有验证场景中保持了源接地、实体路由、追踪、输出卫生和推荐语言合约，故障注入验证器能正确检测被破坏的合约。(2) 在三个不同模型上的270次组合边界运行全部通过。(3) 纯提示无法复现代码控制的合约：提示指令让推荐语言泄露和内部追踪泄露到达用户，而工具链完全阻止；附加的外部护栏虽能阻止泄露但过度拒绝，效用降至88/120，而工具链保持120/120的完全效用。
AI.conclusion: 该工具链工程方法是一种可复用的工程模式，能够将探索性LLM原型转化为可审计的产品化应用程序，具备版本化的源、控制和验证工件。代码层面的合约执行是同时保障安全性和效用性的关键。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。与遥感的交叉方案：(1) 遥感领域LLM应用（如地物分类、目标检测报告生成）可借鉴该工具链架构，将地理源边界（如行政区域、传感器类型）、实体路由（如地物类别、卫星轨道编号）和输出合约（如分类格式、置信区间）从提示中剥离为代码和模式控制。(2) 遥感数据溯源要求高，该方法的可审计追踪（trace）和版本化验证工件可用于遥感信息产品的合规性校验，确保生成结果基于权威遥感数据源。(3) 多源遥感数据融合场景中，可替换组合边界设计支持不同传感器模型（如光学、SAR）的灵活替换，代码层合约保证输出一致性。

title: Mixture of Enhanced-View Experts for Multi-Query Vehicle ReID and A Large-Scale Benchmark
summary: Multi-query vehicle ReID aims to leverage complementary information from diverse views for robust feature learning. However, current methods suffer from simplistic feature fusion and thus easily ignores some important view information and cross-view relationships. To handle these problems, this work presents a novel approach called Mixture of Enhanced-View Experts (EV-MoE), which enhances the feature representation of each view and efficiently integrate the view-specific enhanced features by MoE, for robust multi-query ReID. In particular, we design a mixture of enhanced-view experts module, which consists of two parts including view-specific feature enhancement sub-Module (VFEM) and dynamic multi-view fusion sub-Module (DMFM). Moreover, we further introduce Multi-view Alignment Loss (MAL), which aligns features through bidirectional crossview contrastive learning and reconstruction constraints, addressing the challenges of consistency between multi-query features and single-image features. In addition, to evaluate multi-query ReID in real-world environments, we collect LCRI-1K, a largescale vehicle ReID dataset with 1,090 identities, 107,805 images, across 23,637 cameras, where each vehicle appears in an average of 67.5 cameras, providing a comprehensive benchmark to test the robustness in complex environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness of CAFNet in addressing the multiquery vehicle ReID problem. The code is available at https: //github.com/xiaozhen28/CAFNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EV-MoE方法，通过增强视图专家混合模块（包含VFEM和DMFM）和多视图对齐损失（MAL），解决多查询车辆ReID中特征融合简单、忽视视图间关系的问题，并构建了大规模数据集LCRI-1K进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在简单特征融合问题，容易忽略重要的视图信息和跨视图关系，导致多查询车辆ReID性能受限。
AI.method: 提出增强视图专家混合（EV-MoE）方法：1) 视图特定特征增强子模块（VFEM）增强每个视图的特征表示；2) 动态多视图融合子模块（DMFM）通过MoE高效整合视图特定增强特征；3) 多视图对齐损失（MAL）通过双向跨视图对比学习和重建约束对齐多查询特征与单图像特征。
AI.result: 在LCRI-1K大规模数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了CAFNet在多查询车辆ReID问题上的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EV-MoE能有效增强各视图特征表示并融合，解决多查询车辆ReID中的特征融合问题，LCRI-1K数据集为复杂环境下的鲁棒性评估提供了全面基准。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域的多视角目标检索（如多角度卫星图像车辆/舰船重识别）可借鉴：1) 将VFEM用于增强不同传感器或不同时相遥感影像的特征表示；2) MoE架构可融合多源遥感数据（SAR+光学、多光谱+全色）的互补信息；3) MAL中的双向跨视图对比学习可扩展到遥感中的跨模态对齐任务；4) LCRI-1K的数据集构建思路可指导构建大规模多视角遥感目标数据集。

title: A safety-oriented hypothetico-deductive framework for AI-assisted differential diagnosis
summary: Diagnostic error is a major threat to patient safety, yet current large language model (LLM) systems often treat diagnosis as a one-shot prediction task, lacking safeguards against missed high-risk alternatives or rigorous verification of their reasoning. Here, we present AegisDx, a safety-oriented framework for hypothetico-deductive clinical reasoning. AegisDx coordinates specialized LLM components through role-specific contracts, structured intermediate outputs, evidence-retrieval interfaces, and verification gates to generate broad differential diagnoses, enforce explicit screening for dangerous "must-not-miss" conditions, verify reasoning against grounded medical evidence, and structure actionable next steps. We evaluated AegisDx across three layers. On literature-derived case reports from NEJM and JAMA, with GPT-oss-120B as the shared backbone, Top-3 diagnostic accuracy was 59.9% versus 52.1% for the standalone LLM on JAMA cases and 62.7% versus 51.4% on NEJM cases. On cases from Annals of Emergency Medicine, Top-3 accuracy was 85.7% versus 68.6%; against physician-consensus must-not-miss diagnosis sets, AegisDx captured at least one such condition among its top three diagnoses in 78.0% of cases versus 52.0%. In a blinded physician evaluation of 43 real-world emergency department notes from the Yale New Haven Health System compared against GPT-5, AegisDx improved the physician-rated composite safety score from 4.31 to 4.55 on a 5-point scale (adjusted p = 2.1x10^-4), with qualitative gains in must-not-miss identification and reasoning safety. Our findings suggest that engineering diagnostic AI as a safety-oriented reasoning framework, rather than optimizing raw predictive accuracy alone, can provide a safer, more transparent, and clinically meaningful layer of bedside decision support for acute care workflows.

AI.tldr: AegisDx是一个面向安全的假设-演绎临床推理框架，通过多LLM组件协作、结构化中间输出和证据验证，显著提升了诊断安全性和"不可遗漏"高危疾病的捕获率。
AI.motivation: 诊断错误严重威胁患者安全，但现有LLM系统常将诊断视为一次性预测任务，缺乏对高危替代诊断的防护或推理的严格验证。
AI.method: 提出AegisDx框架，通过角色特定合约、结构化中间输出、证据检索接口和验证门协调专门的LLM组件，生成广泛鉴别诊断、强制筛查"不可遗漏"高危疾病、基于医学证据验证推理并结构化后续步骤。
AI.result: 在NEJM和JAMA病例中Top-3诊断准确率分别达62.7% vs 51.4%和59.9% vs 52.1%；急诊医学病例中Top-3准确率85.7% vs 68.6%，"不可遗漏"诊断捕获率78.0% vs 52.0%；真实急诊病历盲评中复合安全评分从4.31提升至4.55（调整p=2.1×10^-4）。
AI.conclusion: 将诊断AI设计为面向安全的推理框架，而非仅优化原始预测准确性，能为急性护理工作流程提供更安全、更透明、更具临床意义的床旁决策支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。在遥感领域，可将AegisDx的"不可遗漏"安全筛查机制应用于关键地物检测（如滑坡、火灾等灾害目标），确保高风险区域不被遗漏；利用其结构化推理和证据验证流程，提升遥感解译的可解释性和可靠性；通过多角色合约架构实现多源遥感数据的协同分析（如光学与SAR影像的交叉验证）。

title: GRE-Diff: Gaussian Room Embeddings for Structured Layout Diffusion
summary:
Designing functional and aesthetically coherent floor plans requires exploring a vast space of possible room arrangements, a task that quickly becomes overwhelming for human designers. In this paper, we propose GRE-Diff, a controllable and interactive diffusion-based framework that automates the creation and editing of apartment floor plans under user-specified constraints.
  By combining AI-generated suggestions with real-time, human-in-the-loop editing, the system enables users to specify room types, room counts, boundary shapes, and editing operations through LLM-parsed instructions or GUI-based interaction.
  It then generates a diverse set of plausible and well-structured designs for refinement.
  At the core of our approach is Gaussian Room Embedding (GRE), a continuous latent representation that models each room as a spatial Gaussian distribution capturing its location and extent.
  Extensive experiments on the RPLAN dataset show that GRE-Diff produces high-quality, constraint-aware, and editable polygonal layouts, offering a practical step toward bridging AI-driven automation and human creativity in spatial design.

AI.tldr: 提出GRE-Diff，一种基于扩散模型的可控交互式框架，通过高斯房间嵌入（GRE）连续潜在表示和人类反馈循环，实现用户约束下的公寓平面图自动生成与编辑。
AI.motivation: 人工设计功能性且美学上一致的平面图需要探索巨大的房间排列空间，这对设计师而言极具挑战性，亟需自动化工具辅助。
AI.method: 1) 提出高斯房间嵌入（GRE），将每个房间建模为空间高斯分布，连续表示其位置和范围；2) 基于扩散框架，结合AI生成建议与实时人在回路编辑；3) 支持用户通过LLM解析指令或GUI交互指定房间类型、数量、边界形状及编辑操作。
AI.result: 在RPLAN数据集上的实验表明，GRE-Diff能生成高质量、约束感知、可编辑的多边形布局。
AI.conclusion: GRE-Diff有效弥合了AI驱动自动化与人类创造力在空间设计中的差距，为可控平面图生成提供了实用方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。具体方案：1) 将GRE的连续高斯空间表示迁移至遥感建筑物布局生成，用于表示建筑物位置与轮廓的不确定性；2) 利用扩散框架生成满足地理约束（如道路间距、建筑红线）的城市街区建筑布局；3) 将LLM解析用户指令的方式引入遥感，实现自然语言描述的复杂场景布局生成（如"在湖泊北侧生成5栋等间距住宅"）。

title: When LLMs Agree, Are They Right? Auditing Self-Consistency and Cross-Model Agreement as Confidence Signals
summary: LLM-as-judge (Zheng et al., 2023) is increasingly the default for evaluating AI systems in enterprise pipelines, often scaled to ensembles (Verga et al., 2024) or "mixture-of-experts" (Shazeer et al., 2017) panels of judges. These systems share a key assumption: that consistency -- agreement among judges, or among a model's own samples -- indicates correctness. We show this assumption is unreliable. Agreement is not accuracy: a model can agree with itself, and different models can agree with each other, out of shared bias, a memorized heuristic, or an option-position prior rather than truth. We ask when agreement is nonetheless a usable proxy, in a large-scale cross-runner study: 53 runners drew K=50 samples for assigned overlapping cases across comparisons of model tier, prompting, and scale on GPQA Diamond and AIME -- 265,000 samples. Using majority-correctness as the deployment label and a hierarchical runner-clustered bootstrap, agreement is a positive but weak predictor (rho 0.20-0.59, all positive under item-clustered resampling) whose usefulness is regime-dependent: best for unsaturated mid-tier models and for allocating compute, and worst -- over-confident yet no more accurate -- for the most consistent frontier model (agreement >=0.8 on 77% of GPQA case-result entries, 48% of those wrong). An exploratory cross-family check on three Claude tiers shows the same frontier over-confidence, with confident errors recurring across providers above a marginal-preserving null. Self-consistency is thus a conditional proxy for correctness, not a standalone confidence score. We publicly release the de-identified per-run rows and answer distributions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实验（53个运行器、265,000个样本）证明LLM-as-judge评估系统中，一致性（评委间或模型自身采样间的一致）并不能可靠地代表正确性。一致性仅在特定条件下（如中档模型、计算资源分配）可作为正确性的弱代理，而对最一致的前沿模型，高一致性反而伴随着高错误率（GPQA上77%的高一致条目中48%是错误的）。
AI.motivation: LLM-as-judge已成为企业评估AI系统的默认方法，常扩展为集成或混合专家评委面板。这些系统共享一个关键假设：一致性（评委间或模型自身采样间的一致）指示正确性。作者旨在检验这一假设的可靠性。
AI.method: 大规模跨运行器研究：53个运行器对重叠案例各采样K=50次，涉及模型层级、提示方式和规模在GPQA Diamond和AIME上的比较，共265,000个样本。使用多数正确作为部署标签，采用层级运行器聚类bootstrap分析一致性与正确性的关系。
AI.result: 一致性是正向但弱预测因子（rho 0.20-0.59），其可用性依赖于场景：对未饱和的中档模型和计算资源分配最有效；对最一致的前沿模型表现最差（GPQA上一致性>=0.8的条目占77%，其中48%是错误的）。跨模型族检查（三个Claude层级）证实了前沿模型的过度自信现象。
AI.conclusion: 自一致性只是正确性的条件代理，而非独立的置信度分数。研究人员需谨慎使用一致性作为评估指标，特别是在前沿模型上。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。在遥感领域，LLM常被用于图像解译、地物分类和目标检测的自动评估。该研究指出一致性不可靠的发现可直接应用于遥感评估管道：1）遥感模型评估中避免仅依赖多评委投票一致性，应引入地面真值交叉验证；2）对高一致性但低精度的"过度自信"问题，遥感领域可构建地理空间先验约束来修正偏差；3）可将该研究的层级bootstrap方法迁移至遥感结果的不确定性量化。

title: EVIS: A Physics-Grounded Event Camera Plugin for NVIDIA Isaac Sim
summary: Event cameras offer microsecond temporal resolution, low latency, and high dynamic range, making them attractive for robotics. However, labeled event-camera data for a specific robot and scene is scarce and expensive to collect, which slows the development of event-based perception and control. We present EVIS: a physics-grounded event camera plugin for NVIDIA Isaac Sim that generates high-rate, fully labeled event streams directly inside a physics simulator. The plugin implements a faithful log-intensity contrast event model with per-pixel asynchronous reference updates; it migrates from a normal RGB camera with few changes and integrates into any Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab scene, inheriting the simulator's physics and frame-perfect ground truth. It is fully configurable, and offers an interpolation option that renders only sparse keyframes and synthesizes the in-between frames through bidirectional motion-vector warping, making real-time generation on a single GPU possible. Optional sensor noise and motion blur further narrow the gap to real cameras. The generated streams are directly usable by pretrained event networks for downstream tasks. Code repository: https://github.com/spikelab-jhu/isaac-sim-event-camera-plugin

AI.tldr: EVIS是一个基于物理引擎的事件相机插件，集成于NVIDIA Isaac Sim中，能够在物理仿真器内生成高帧率、完全标注的事件流，解决了事件相机数据稀缺和标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 事件相机数据在特定机器人和场景下稀缺且采集成本高，阻碍了基于事件的感知与控制发展。
AI.method: 实现忠实于对数强度对比的事件模型，带有逐像素异步参考更新；从普通RGB相机迁移仅需少量改动；提供插值选项，通过双向运动矢量扭曲仅渲染稀疏关键帧并合成中间帧，实现单GPU实时生成；可选传感器噪声和运动模糊以缩小与真实相机的差距。
AI.result: 生成的流可直接用于预训练事件网络的下游任务，且在物理仿真器中具备帧级精确的真值。
AI.conclusion: EVIS通过物理仿真环境低成本、高效率地生成高质量标注事件数据，推动事件相机在机器人领域的应用发展。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：遥感领域可借鉴EVIS的思路，将事件相机仿真插件集成到遥感物理仿真平台（如基于Unreal Engine的遥感场景模拟器）中，生成高动态范围、微秒级时间分辨率的遥感事件流数据，用于训练事件驱动的遥感目标检测与跟踪网络；也可将双向运动矢量插值技术应用于遥感视频帧生成，降低渲染开销。

title: Persuasion Attacks Can Decrease Effectiveness of CoT Monitoring
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) monitoring is a promising safety mechanism for AI agents, based on the premise that visible reasoning traces can surface misaligned or deceptive behavior. While effective in standard scenarios, recent work highlights that LLMs remain vulnerable to persuasion-based jailbreaks, where natural-language arguments override model constraints.
