Experiments on the DVS-Lip benchmark verify the effectiveness of the proposed design, and extensive ablation studies further validate the contributions of TDA, VGA, and teacher--student consistency. Qualitative decoding results also demonstrate that the proposed CTC-based temporal modeling learns meaningful viseme-aware structure from event streams.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时间增强的事件驱动唇读框架，通过轨迹感知差分聚合（TDA）、视位引导聚合（VGA）和EMA教师-学生训练策略，在DVS-Lip基准上验证了有效性，能够学习有意义的视位感知结构。
AI.motivation: 现有事件驱动唇读方法通常在充分时间建模之前进行空间压缩，这可能会抑制区分相似唇部运动所需的稀疏局部运动轨迹；同时，大多数方法仅在词分类层面优化时间表示，底层发音结构缺乏有效约束。
AI.method: 1）轨迹感知差分聚合（TDA）：在每个空间位置进行局部时间建模，再进行自适应空间聚合；2）视位引导聚合（VGA）：由CTC解码器和视位引导门控聚合分支组成的统一时间模块，注入视位感知序列监督；3）EMA教师-学生训练策略：增强在强事件扰动下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在DVS-Lip基准上验证了所提设计的有效性，消融实验进一步验证了TDA、VGA和教师-学生一致性的贡献，CTC时间建模能从事件流中学习有意义的视位感知结构。
AI.conclusion: 所提时间增强框架有效解决了事件驱动唇读中时间建模不足和发音结构约束弱的问题，为事件驱动唇读提供了新的技术路线。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该文的事件驱动时间增强方法对遥感领域的高动态范围运动目标识别（如飞机起降、车辆跟踪、舰船检测）具有直接借鉴意义。具体方案：1）将TDA模块用于遥感事件流数据的局部时空特征提取，增强对微小运动目标的感知；2）将VGA的CTC+门控聚合结构迁移至遥感时序动作识别任务，实现序列级监督与空间特征融合；3）EMA教师-学生策略可用于遥感事件数据的噪声鲁棒训练，提升模型在恶劣环境下的泛化能力。

title: MobiDiff: Semantic-Aware Multi-Channel Discrete Diffusion for Human Mobility Data Generation
summary: Human mobility data are essential for transportation optimization, urban planning, and resource allocation, yet real-world mobility data are costly to collect and difficult to share due to privacy concerns. Recent diffusion-based methods have shown promise in synthesizing realistic mobility patterns, but they typically rely on continuous or latent spatio-temporal traces, limiting their ability to natively model discrete semantic events with explicit region, activity, time, and interval structures. To address this issue, we introduce MobiDiff, an end-to-end discrete diffusion framework that efficiently generates mobility data by directly denoising multi-channel semantic skeletons, avoiding the costly interpolation, latent trace construction, and coarse-to-fine realization pipelines widely used in existing diffusion-based methods. Specifically, MobiDiff decomposes each human check-in event into spatial, activity, and temporal channels, and employs structured event-, group-, and channel-level masking to jointly capture trajectory-level mobility patterns and within-event dependencies. We evaluate generation fidelity, privacy-preserving, and efficiency on three large-scale real-world datasets from Atlanta, Boston, and Seattle. Results show that MobiDiff effectively preserves trajectory length and temporal interval distributions while remaining competitive across broader mobility statistics; it is also much faster than state-of-the-art methods, e.g., 5.3$\times$ faster than GeoGen on average during inference. These findings suggest that discrete diffusion offers an interpretable and efficient framework for synthetic mobility data generation.

AI.tldr: MobiDiff是一个端到端离散扩散框架，通过直接对多通道语义骨架进行去噪来生成人类移动性数据，避免了现有方法中昂贵的插值和潜在轨迹构建流程。它在亚特兰大、波士顿和西雅图三个数据集上展示了优于现有方法的保真度、隐私保护和效率（推理速度比GeoGen快5.3倍）。
AI.motivation: 真实世界的人类移动性数据收集成本高且因隐私问题难以共享。现有基于扩散的方法依赖于连续或潜在时空轨迹，无法原生建模具有明确区域、活动、时间和间隔结构的离散语义事件。
AI.method: MobiDiff将每个签到事件分解为空间、活动和时间三个通道，采用结构化的事件级、组级和通道级掩码策略，联合捕捉轨迹级别的移动模式与事件内依赖关系，通过直接对多通道语义骨架去噪实现端到端的离散扩散生成。
AI.result: 在亚特兰大、波士顿和西雅图三个大规模真实数据集上，MobiDiff在生成保真度、隐私保护方面具有竞争力，能有效保留轨迹长度和时间间隔分布，推理速度平均比GeoGen快5.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散为合成移动性数据生成提供了一种可解释且高效的框架，能够原生建模离散语义事件结构，同时提升生成效率和隐私保护能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该离散扩散框架可直接应用于遥感领域的人类活动时空轨迹生成，例如：1）将遥感影像提取的建筑/功能区语义作为空间通道先验，增强生成轨迹的物理合理性；2）利用多通道掩码机制建模遥感时序数据中的事件依赖关系；3）将通信基站信令数据与遥感夜间灯光数据融合，生成细粒度城市移动模式。

title: Closing the Null Space: Guidance-Aware Quantization for Classifier-Free Diffusion
summary: Deploying classifier-free guidance (CFG) diffusion models under real-world compute budgets requires quantization, yet existing post-training quantization (PTQ) methods treat CFG models as single-branch networks, ignoring the paired conditional/unconditional structure that CFG inference fundamentally relies on. This structural blind spot has two consequences. At the system level, the two-pass CFG execution pattern imposes a latency overhead that parameter-count and bit-operation metrics conceal entirely, and commodity INT8 inference stacks fail to realize the theoretical efficiency gains that BOPs calculations promise. At the algorithmic level, calibrating against the guidance gap alone admits an exact null space: a quantized model can achieve perfect gap-fidelity diagnostics while the unconditional branch drifts arbitrarily, corrupting every guided prediction at inference time. This paper terms this the branch-drift trap, proves its existence analytically, and confirms it empirically through a false-positive result in which the best-calibrated model by standard diagnostics simultaneously produces the worst sample quality. To close the trap, Guidance-Aware Mixed Precision (GAMP) is proposed, which calibrates directly on the guided prediction, derives per-layer activation-bit sensitivity from guided-output degradation, and allocates bits via a greedy knapsack -- provably preventing unconditional branch drift by construction.

AI.tldr: 现有分类器引导扩散模型的量化方法忽略了其成对条件/无条件结构，导致系统级延迟隐藏和算法级分支漂移陷阱。本文提出GAMP方法，直接在校准引导预测上分配比特，从理论上避免了分支漂移。
AI.motivation: 实际部署分类器引导扩散模型时需要进行量化，但现有后训练量化方法将CFG模型视为单分支网络，忽视了其固有的成对条件/无条件结构。这一结构性盲点导致系统层面延迟开销被隐藏、算法层面出现分支漂移陷阱——量化模型在标准诊断指标上表现完美，但无条件分支漂移导致引导预测退化。
AI.method: 提出Guidance-Aware Mixed Precision (GAMP)方法，包括三个核心步骤：(1) 直接在校准引导预测（guided prediction）上进行校准；(2) 通过引导输出退化程度导出每层激活比特敏感性；(3) 利用贪心背包算法分配比特——通过构造性设计防止无条件分支漂移。
AI.result: 通过假阳性实验证明：标准诊断指标下校准最好的模型反而产生最差的采样质量，即分支漂移陷阱确实存在。GAMP方法通过直接校准引导预测，有效避免了这一陷阱。
AI.conclusion: CFG扩散模型的量化必须考虑其独特的条件/无条件双分支结构，否则系统效率和生成质量均会受损。GAMP通过引导感知的混合精度量化，在量化效率和生成质量之间取得了更好的平衡。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。具体方案：(1) 遥感图像生成任务（如云/阴影去除、超分辨率）常使用扩散模型，GAMP方法可直接应用于遥感CFG扩散模型的轻量化部署；(2) 遥感多模态任务中条件分支（如给定光谱/多时相条件）与无条件分支的结构同样存在分支漂移风险，GAMP的校准策略可迁移；(3) 遥感模型需在边缘设备部署，GAMP的混合精度量化方案可有效降低模型体积和推理延迟，提升星上处理效率。

title: FedOPAL: One-Shot Federated Learning via Analytic Visual Prompt Tuning
summary: With the widespread deployment of basic models in edge intelligence, communication bandwidth has become a core bottleneck restricting the scalability of federated learning. Although one-shot federated learning alleviates this problem by minimizing communication rounds, existing iterative fine-tuning or knowledge distillation methods still face challenges such as high server-side computational costs and hyperparameter sensitivity. Analytical federated learning achieves efficient gradientfree aggregation using least-squares closed-form solutions, but in environments with non-independent and identically distributed data, its static feature assumptions fail, leading to feature manifold misalignment and severely impairing model performance. To address this contradiction, this paper proposes the FedOPAL framework. This framework adapts the visual prompts as feature rectifiers, actively correcting the feature distribution of heterogeneous data to a linearly separable space by applying local proximal constraints, thereby satisfying the theoretical assumptions of analytical federated learning. Experimental results show that FedOPAL not only significantly outperforms the original analytical methods on several benchmarks, but also achieves accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art iterative methods while maintaining zero server-side training costs, providing a new engineering paradigm for efficient collaboration of large models on the edge.

AI.tldr: FedOPAL框架通过视觉提示作为特征矫正器，结合局部近端约束，使非独立同分布数据的特征分布对齐到线性可分离空间，从而满足解析联邦学习的理论假设，在保持零服务器端训练成本的同时达到与迭代方法相当的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有单次联邦学习虽减少了通信轮次，但迭代微调和知识蒸馏方法存在服务器端计算成本高、超参数敏感等问题；解析联邦学习虽高效，但在非独立同分布数据环境下其静态特征假设失效，导致特征流形错配，严重损害模型性能。
AI.method: 提出FedOPAL框架，利用视觉提示作为特征矫正器，通过局部近端约束主动修正异构数据的特征分布，使其对齐到线性可分离空间，从而满足解析联邦学习的最小二乘闭式解的理论假设。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，FedOPAL显著优于原始解析方法，并达到与最先进的迭代方法相当的精度，同时保持零服务器端训练成本。
AI.conclusion: FedOPAL为边缘端大规模模型高效协作提供了新的工程范式，在保持通信高效性的同时解决了非独立同分布数据下的特征失配问题。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感数据通常具有强空间异质性（不同地域、传感器、天气条件下的数据分布差异大），FedOPAL的视觉提示特征矫正机制可有效处理遥感场景中的非独立同分布问题。具体方案：(1) 利用遥感影像的地理标签作为先验，设计地理感知的视觉提示；(2) 在分布式遥感模型协作（如多卫星联合训练）中，用FedOPAL实现零服务器成本的模型聚合；(3) 针对遥感多模态数据（光学-SAR），使用特征提示对齐不同模态的分布差异。

title: SkelGen4D: Weakly-Supervised Skeleton-Based 4D Generation for Text-Driven Mesh Animation
summary: We study 4D generation to synthesize temporally coherent sequences of 3D geometry for animation and content creation. In contrast to existing SDS-based optimization methods and video-driven animation approaches, we adopt a skeleton-driven animation framework aligned with standard industrial pipelines, which enables explicit control and editing. To this end, we propose SkelGen4D, a weakly supervised feed-forward framework for text-driven mesh animation that generates explicit skeleton motions without requiring per-frame skeleton annotations. SkelGen4D first recovers temporally consistent pseudo-skeletons from animated meshes via differentiable fitting, and then generates text-conditioned skeleton motion sequences in a feed-forward manner, further refined with Motion-GRPO to ensure temporally coherent, physically plausible, and articulated animation. We evaluate our method on two large-scale benchmarks, Truebones Zoo and Diffusion4D. Our results show that our weakly supervised skeleton modeling matches or surpasses fully supervised baselines while scaling to diverse object categories for high-quality text-driven mesh animation. Further, our method supports flexible motion editing and is aligned with standard animation production pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出SkelGen4D，一种弱监督前馈框架，通过可微拟合从动画网格恢复时域一致的伪骨架，并利用Motion-GRPO生成文本驱动的骨架运动序列，实现与工业管线对齐的显式可控网格动画。
AI.motivation: 现有4D生成方法（如SDS优化方法、视频驱动动画方法）缺乏显式控制能力，且与标准工业动画管线不兼容，无法实现灵活的运动编辑。
AI.method: 1) 通过可微拟合从动画网格中恢复时域一致的伪骨架；2) 以前馈方式生成文本条件骨架运动序列；3) 使用Motion-GRPO进行精炼，确保时域连贯、物理合理且具有关节结构的动画。
AI.result: 在Truebones Zoo和Diffusion4D两个大规模基准上，弱监督骨架建模匹配或超越全监督基线，能够泛化到多种物体类别生成高质量文本驱动网格动画。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法支持灵活运动编辑，与标准动画生产管线对齐，为文本驱动的4D生成提供了可控性强、工业兼容性好的解决方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。可将SkelGen4D的弱监督骨架恢复与Motion-GRPO精炼框架应用于遥感动态场景（如车辆运动、植被生长）的4D重建。具体方案：1) 利用多时相遥感点云/网格序列，通过可微拟合提取时域一致的运动骨架；2) 将文本驱动替换为遥感语义标签驱动，生成符合地理运动规律的3D动态序列；3) 应用于数字孪生中动态地物的自动化动画生成。

title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
summary: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. We formalize this failure as the \textit{\textbf{Knowing--Using Gap}}, characterized by an accuracy gap and a temporal lag between memorization and generalization. To understand this phenomenon, we fine-tune LLMs with unseen knowledge and monitor the spatial permeation dynamics of the knowledge internally using a novel intervention technique called self-patching. Self-patching identifies activation locations where relocating representations substantially improves failed generalization cases. These results are consistent with a knowledge-circuit misalignment hypothesis: memorized representations can exist internally but may not be routed to computation-effective layers. To demonstrate the practicality of this diagnostic finding, we design a simple heuristic strategy which recovers 58--75\% of the oracle headroom in generalization failure. Experiments are done cross-domain for the robustness of this finding.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了LLM微调中存在的"知而不用"现象（Knowing–Using Gap），即模型能记住新知识但无法在推理任务中使用。作者通过自修补（self-patching）技术发现这是由于知识回路错位（knowledge-circuit misalignment）导致，并提出简单启发式策略可恢复58-75%的泛化失败性能。
AI.motivation: LLM微调注入新知识时，模型能快速记忆新事实但无法在下游推理任务中使用，这一"知而不用"的失败模式缺乏系统性分析与理解。
AI.method: 1) 形式化定义Knowing–Using Gap，包含准确率差距和记忆-泛化时间滞后；2) 提出自修补（self-patching）干预技术，通过定位激活位置并重定位表征来改善失败泛化案例；3) 基于知识回路错位假设进行分析；4) 设计简单启发式策略进行修复。
AI.result: 自修补技术能够识别出改善泛化失败的激活位置；提出的启发式策略可恢复58-75%的泛化失败性能，且跨领域实验具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 记忆的表征可以在模型内部存在，但可能没有被路由到计算有效的层，即知识回路错位是导致Knowing–Using Gap的根本原因。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域常需注入领域新知识（如新型传感器参数、地理空间关系），LLM同样面临记忆新知识但无法在遥感推理任务（如变化检测、场景分类）中使用的问题。可将该文的自修补技术和知识回路诊断方法直接迁移至遥感LLM微调场景；启发式策略也可用于优化遥感领域专用LLM的泛化能力。改进方向：结合遥感多模态特征（光谱、空间、时间）设计更针对性的表征路由策略。

title: HSA: Hierarchical Slot Attention for Multi-granularity Scene-Decomposition
summary: Slot attention is a powerful framework for object-centric learning, decomposing visual scenes into latent slots through iterative competitive attention. However, existing methods share two critical limitations: they decompose scenes into a flat set of slots at a single granularity, and this decomposition is based on appearance rather than semantics. Yet humans understand scenes through semantic hierarchies: separating foreground from background, recognizing object categories, and identifying individual instances. Crucially, such semantic hierarchies cannot emerge without supervision, because category names are human constructs, not visual patterns. We propose Hierarchical Slot Attention (HSA), which learns multi-granularity semantic scene decomposition from a single model. HSA decomposes scenes at three levels: holistic (foreground/background), semantic (object categories), and panoptic (individual instances). Using only 10\% labeled data, combined with hierarchical alignment loss, HSA learns all three levels jointly. We further introduce grouping purity and containment to measure whether the hierarchy is encoded in representation space, not just output masks. Experiments on COCO and PASCAL VOC demonstrate that HSA outperforms the strongest flat baseline by up to \textbf{$+$41.5} ARI at holistic, \textbf{$+$14.6} at semantic, and \textbf{$+$10.4} at panoptic level on COCO, with even larger gains on Pascal VOC, while requiring a single model instead of three. Code will be made available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出层次槽注意力（HSA），从单个模型中学习多粒度语义场景分解，包括整体（前景/背景）、语义（目标类别）和全景（个体实例）三个层次，仅用10%标注数据即可训练。
AI.motivation: 现有槽注意力方法存在两个关键局限：将场景分解为单一粒度的扁平化槽集合，且分解基于外观而非语义。然而人类通过语义层次理解场景（前景/背景、目标类别、个体实例），这种语义层次无法仅通过无监督学习从视觉模式中涌现。
AI.method: 提出层次槽注意力（HSA），在单个模型中学习三个层次（整体/语义/全景）的分解；仅使用10%标注数据，结合层次对齐损失联合训练所有三个层次；引入分组纯度和包含度指标来衡量层次结构是否编码在表示空间中。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，HSA在整体、语义和全景层次上分别超越最强扁平基线高达+41.5、+14.6和+10.4 ARI；在PASCAL VOC上获得更大提升；且只需单个模型而非三个独立模型。
AI.conclusion: HSA通过层次化语义分解有效克服了传统槽注意力在粒度单一和基于外观分解两方面的局限，验证了利用少量标注数据学习多粒度语义场景分解的可行性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感场景同样具有层次结构（如城区/非城区→建筑/道路/植被→具体建筑物/路段/树冠），HSA可直接应用于遥感图像理解。具体方案：将HSA三个层次适配为（1）整体：水域/陆地、城区/非城区；（2）语义：建筑、道路、植被、水体等目标类别；（3）全景：每个目标实例的个体分割。遥感领域通常有丰富的语义和实例标注，HSA仅需10%标注的要求在遥感大规模数据上极具实用价值。

title: Game Theory Driven Multi-Agent Framework Mitigates Language Model Hallucination
summary: The application of lightweight Large Language Models in rule-based scientific domains remains severely limited by their tendency to mimic linguistic patterns rather than reproduce axiomatic reasoning, causing frequent hallucinations. Here, we show that G-Frame, an adaptive multi-agent framework integrating Bayesian and team game principles, establishes an automated closed-loop for high-quality data synthesis and model training. By forcing the internalization of domain constraints through structured reasoning, we synthesized a specialized corpus of 363,045 chains-of-thought and 199,589 question-answer pairs. The resulting 7B model OmniChem achieves performance parity with GPT 4o mini on custom benchmarks and ChemBench while exhibiting a 79.46% reduction in hallucinations relative to its base architecture. We further demonstrate the advanced capabilities of OmniChem in molecular design and synthesis planning. This work establishes a scalable paradigm utilizing adaptive multi-agents to overcome inherent reasoning deficiencies, offering a feasible pathway for accelerating knowledge discovery in specialized scientific fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G-Frame框架，一种自适应多智能体框架，通过贝叶斯和团队博弈原理，构建自动化闭环进行高质量数据合成与模型训练。在规则驱动的科学领域（如化学）中，合成363,045条思维链和199,589个问答对，训练的7B模型OmniChem在自定义基准和ChemBench上达到GPT-4o mini性能水平，同时相比基础架构幻觉减少79.46%。该方法为利用自适应多智能体克服科学领域推理缺陷提供了可扩展范式。
AI.motivation: 轻量级大语言模型在基于规则的科学领域中，倾向于模仿语言模式而非复现公理推理，导致频繁的幻觉问题，严重限制了其应用。
AI.method: 提出G-Frame自适应多智能体框架，集成贝叶斯原理和团队博弈原理，构建自动化闭环实现高质量数据合成与模型训练。通过结构化推理强制内化领域约束，合成了包含363,045条思维链和199,589个问答对的专门语料库，训练得到7B参数模型OmniChem。
AI.result: OmniChem（7B模型）在自定义基准和ChemBench上达到与GPT-4o mini相当的性能，同时相比基础架构幻觉减少79.46%。此外，在分子设计和合成规划中展示了高级能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一种可扩展范式，利用自适应多智能体克服固有推理缺陷，为加速专业科学领域的知识发现提供了可行路径。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样存在大量基于规则的物理/化学/几何约束（如辐射传输模型、大气校正算法、几何配准规则），可将G-Frame框架迁移至遥感任务：1）构建遥感专用多智能体系统，分别负责电磁波传播规则、传感器成像模型、地理空间约束等子任务；2）利用贝叶斯原理融合多源遥感数据的不确定性，通过团队博弈协调各智能体输出一致性结果；3）自动化合成符合遥感物理规律的思维链和问答对，训练轻量级遥感专用模型。该方法可有效减少遥感大模型在地理定位、物理参数反演等任务中的幻觉问题。

title: On the Design of Mixture-of-Experts for Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction remains challenging due to the heterogeneous and spatially varying nature of real-world motion. Although recent 3D Gaussian Splatting methods have introduced diverse deformation formulations for dynamic novel view synthesis, each method typically relies on a single deformation model within its representation, which limits robustness across diverse dynamic scenarios. In this work, we study a fundamental problem-multi-deformation modeling for dynamic 3D Gaussian representations-under two distinct integration constraints that differ in when and how multiple deformation experts interact during training. From a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) perspective, we view multi-deformation modeling as the problem of combining multiple specialized deformation models within a unified 3D representation. We first introduce Mixture of Deformation Experts (MoDE), which integrates multiple deformation experts directly into the deformable Gaussian Splatting pipeline through joint optimization. In MoDE, experts operate on a shared canonical Gaussian representation, enabling multi-deformation modeling without introducing additional training stages or modifying the original optimization schedule. In contrast, we further present Mixture of Experts for Dynamic Gaussian Splatting (MoE-GS) under a different integration constraint, where deformation experts are optimized independently and combined through a separate routing stage. As a result, expert interaction occurs over non-canonical Gaussian representations after individual optimization. Together, these two approaches provide alternative strategies for multi-deformation modeling, clarifying how integration constraints shape the design and behavior of deformation experts in dynamic 3D Gaussian representations. Our code is available at: https://github.com/cvsp-lab/MoE-GS-studio.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了动态3D高斯表示中的多变形建模问题，从Mixture-of-Experts视角出发，提出了两种集成策略：MoDE（联合优化，共享规范高斯表示）和MoE-GS（独立优化后通过路由阶段组合），探讨了不同集成约束下变形专家的设计与行为差异。
AI.motivation: 现有动态3D高斯方法依赖单一变形模型，难以应对真实世界中异构且空间变化的复杂运动，鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 从MoE视角出发，提出两种多变形建模方法：1) MoDE——将多个变形专家直接集成到可变形高斯泼溅管线中，通过联合优化共享规范高斯表示；2) MoE-GS——变形专家独立优化，再通过单独的路由阶段组合，专家交互发生在非规范高斯表示上。
AI.result: 两种方法提供了多变形建模的替代策略，揭示了集成约束如何塑造动态3D高斯表示中变形专家的设计与行为。
AI.conclusion: 不同集成约束（联合优化 vs. 独立优化+路由）会导致变形专家在动态3D高斯表示中的不同交互方式与行为表现。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感动态场景（如车辆运动、植被随风摆动、云层移动等）存在多种运动模式，可将MoDE/MoE-GS用于遥感动态新视角合成。改进方案：1) 结合遥感时序多视角数据，引入地形先验约束规范高斯表示；2) 针对遥感大尺度场景，设计基于位置的路由专家选择策略，提升计算效率；3) 融合遥感多光谱信息，扩展变形专家输入特征维度。

title: OmniFood-Bench: Evaluating VLMs for Nutrient Reasoning and Personalized Health Advice
summary:
The rapid integration of Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) into critical infrastructure promises to revolutionize
  personalized healthcare and dietary management. However, in the domain of food systems, autonomous agents face a
  unique and persistent challenge: the "Systemic Information Asymmetry" between visual appearance and intrinsic
  nutritional composition. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on coarse-grained classification tasks, such as food
  category recognition, which fail to evaluate the intricate reasoning chain required for real-world dietary management
  -- specifically, the ability to traverse from identifying hidden ingredients to estimating physical mass, and finally
  synthesizing safety-critical medical advice. In this paper, we introduce OmniFood-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark
  constructed from the MM-Food-100K dataset. Unlike previous works, OmniFood-Bench evaluates VLMs across three
  progressive capabilities: Basic Perception (Ingredients & Cooking Methods), Quantitative Reasoning (Portion Size &
  Nutritional Profiling), and Safety-Critical Advisory (Disease-Specific Recommendations). We evaluate six
  state-of-the-art VLMs, including gpt-5.1, gemini-3-flash, and qwen3-vl-8B. Our extensive experiments reveal a
  startling "Semantic-Physical Gap": while models achieve near-human accuracy in naming dishes, they exhibit
  catastrophic failure in mass estimation and frequently hallucinate benign advice for high-risk diabetic profiles. This
  work establishes a rigorous standard for trustworthiness in autonomous agents deployed for public health. The code
  and datasets are available in: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/OmniFood-Bench-7D0B

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OmniFood-Bench基准，用于评估大型视觉语言模型（VLM）在食物系统任务中的表现，涵盖从基本感知、定量推理到安全关键建议的三个渐进能力层面。实验发现模型在菜品识别上接近人类，但在质量估计和高风险医疗建议方面存在灾难性失败，揭示了“语义-物理鸿沟”。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅关注粗粒度食物分类，无法评估视觉-语言模型在真实饮食管理中所需的复杂推理链——从识别隐藏成分到估计物理质量再到合成安全关键的医疗建议。食物系统中存在视觉外观与内在营养成分之间的“系统性信息不对称”，亟需一个全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 基于MM-Food-100K数据集构建OmniFood-Bench基准，设计三个渐进能力层级的评估任务：1）基础感知（成分和烹饪方法识别）；2）定量推理（份量大小和营养分析）；3）安全关键建议（针对特定疾病的饮食推荐）。评估了包括gpt-5.1、gemini-3-flash和qwen3-vl-8B在内的六个SOTA视觉语言模型。
AI.result: 实验揭示了显著的“语义-物理鸿沟”：模型在命名菜品任务上接近人类准确率，但在质量估计上表现灾难性失败，并且在高风险糖尿病场景下频繁产生幻觉式无害建议。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为部署于公共卫生领域的自主智能体建立了严格的信任标准，强调当前VLM在需要定量物理推理和安全风险评估的关键任务中尚不可靠。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。具体方案：1）遥感领域同样存在“语义-物理鸿沟”（如高分辨率影像上的地物分类准确但面积/体积估算误差大），可借鉴OmniFood-Bench的三级渐进评估框架设计遥感任务基准；2）将“安全关键建议”思想引入遥感灾害评估，评估模型在洪水/火灾等场景下从地物识别到受灾面积量化再到应急决策建议的完整推理链；3）食物质量估计中的物理量回归方法可迁移至遥感中的作物产量/ biomass估算任务。

title: UniRef-UAV: A Multimodal Benchmark for Universal Referring in UAV Imagery
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) increasingly rely on visual grounding capabilities to localize task-relevant targets from diverse instructions in complex aerial scenes. Existing referring expression comprehension (REC) benchmarks and methods, however, are largely built around text-only queries and single-object outputs, which limits their applicability to practical UAV scenarios involving reference images, multimodal instructions, absent targets, and multiple valid target instances. To address this gap, we introduce \emph{Universal Referring}, a generalized UAV referring task that jointly expands the query modality and the output cardinality. We construct \emph{UniRef-UAV}, a multimodal benchmark that supports text-only, image-only, and text+image queries with modality-dependent target cardinality, where text-only and text+image queries admit no-target, single-target, and multi-target grounding while image-only queries focus on existence-aware single-instance grounding. It also provides in-domain and cross-domain evaluation protocols for visual-query generalization. We further present \emph{UAV-URNet}, a detection-style baseline that maps heterogeneous queries into a shared query space and predicts variable-size target sets through set prediction. Extensive experiments show that UAV-URNet provides a stable and reproducible baseline with more consistent no-target discrimination and a more lightweight, reproducible implementation than large general-purpose MLLMs. Additional domain analysis, query-representation analysis, and ablation studies demonstrate that multimodal queries help reduce visual-query ambiguity and promote a more unified query--target alignment space. The annotations, visual query crops/images, train/validation/test splits, evaluation scripts, and baseline code will be made publicly available to facilitate reproducible research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Universal Referring——一种面向无人机的通用指代任务，扩展了查询模态（文本、图像、文本+图像）和目标基数（无目标、单目标、多目标），构建了UniRef-UAV多模态基准，并提出了UAV-URNet检测式基线，通过集合预测实现可变大小目标集合的定位。实验表明该基线比通用MLLM更轻量、稳定且可复现，多模态查询有助于减少视觉歧义并促进更统一的查询-目标对齐空间。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机视觉定位方法大多局限于纯文本查询和单目标输出，无法处理参考图像、多模态指令、目标缺失及多目标场景，严重限制了在复杂无人机场景中的实际应用。
AI.method: 1) 定义Universal Referring任务，联合扩展查询模态和目标基数；2) 构建UniRef-UAV多模态基准，支持文本、图像、文本+图像三种查询模态及对应的无/单/多目标定位，提供域内和跨域评估协议；3) 提出UAV-URNet检测式基线，将异构查询映射到共享查询空间，通过集合预测输出可变大小目标集。
AI.result: UAV-URNet提供了稳定可复现的基线，在无目标判别方面表现更一致，且比大型通用MLLM更轻量、更易复现。多模态查询有助于减少视觉查询歧义，促进更统一的查询-目标对齐空间。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的Universal Referring任务及其基准和方法有效弥补了现有无人机指代理解在模态和输出维度上的局限，为无人机多模态指代定位提供了标准化评估平台和可靠基线。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该方法可直接应用于遥感领域的多模态目标指代任务，例如：1) 遥感图像中的"参考图+文本"组合查询定位；2) 处理遥感场景中目标缺失（如云遮挡）或存在多个同类目标的情况；3) 将UniRef-UAV的域内/跨域评估协议迁移至遥感多源数据（如可见光-SAR跨模态泛化）；4) UAV-URNet的共享查询空间机制可为遥感多模态融合（如光学+红外+Lidar）提供统一表征框架。

title: Applying JEPA-Style Predictive Learning to JA4-Derived Network Fingerprints
summary:
I-JEPA and V-JEPA learn by matching latent predictions to target encoder outputs rather than regenerating the original input, and this has worked well for images and video. We explore whether the same objective works for compact network fingerprints. We built JA4-JEPA, a Transformer-based model trained on JA4, JA4H, JA4S, and JA4X subfields drawn from JA4DB and CIC-IDS- 2017. The training data combines roughly 397K samples from both sources, though no single sample contains all four view families. We evaluated the learned representations with a frozen kNN probe on protocol-family classification across TLS, DNS, and SSH. On 39,416 heldout samples the model achieved a cosine similarity of 0.9899 and a kNN accuracy of 0.9220. These results indicate that JEPA-style predictive learning can produce useful embeddings from JA4-derived fingerprints, even with incomplete view overlap across sources.
  Keywords: JA4, network fingerprinting, JEPA, predictive representation learning, self-supervised learning

AI.tldr: 本文提出JA4-JEPA，一种基于JEPA（联合嵌入预测架构）的Transformer模型，用于从JA4网络指纹（JA4、JA4H、JA4S、JA4X）中学习紧凑表示。模型在JA4DB和CIC-IDS-2017数据集上训练（约39.7万样本），通过预测潜在表示而非重建输入进行自监督学习。在39416个保留样本上的协议族分类任务中，余弦相似度达0.9899，kNN准确率达0.9220，证明了JEPA-style学习在网络指纹嵌入上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 探索JEPA（联合嵌入预测架构）这一在图像和视频领域表现优异的自监督学习方法，是否能够有效地应用于网络指纹（JA4格式）的紧凑表示学习，从而提升网络流量分析中协议族分类的性能。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构构建JA4-JEPA模型，在JA4、JA4H、JA4S、JA4X四个子字段上采用JEPA-style预测学习：通过匹配潜在预测与目标编码器输出（而非重建原始输入）进行训练。训练数据来自JA4DB和CIC-IDS-2017，共约39.7万样本，但单个样本不包含所有四个视图。评估时使用冻结的kNN探针进行协议族（TLS、DNS、SSH）分类。
AI.result: 在39416个保留测试样本上，模型达到余弦相似度0.9899，kNN分类准确率0.9220。
AI.conclusion: JEPA-style预测学习能够从JA4衍生指纹中生成有用的嵌入表示，即使在跨来源的视图覆盖不完整的情况下也能有效工作，为网络指纹表示学习提供了一种新的自监督范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文的JEPA-style预测学习架构（非重建式自监督学习）可迁移至遥感领域。具体方案：(1) 将JA4-JEPA的Transformer架构迁移至遥感多模态数据（如SAR+光学+高光谱），每个模态对应一个子字段视图，采用JEPA的潜在预测匹配代替耗时的像素级重建，大幅降低计算开销；(2) 针对遥感场景中不同传感器数据覆盖不完整（类似本文的视图缺失问题），JEPA的跨视图预测能力可自然适配；(3) 协议族分类任务可对应遥感的地物分类场景，该方法可作为遥感基础模型的自监督预训练策略。

title: Progression as Latent Drift: Generative Forecasting of Slow-Evolving Pathologies
summary: Forecasting the future anatomy of slow-evolving neurodegenerative diseases could enable earlier, more targeted intervention and improve clinical trial design, but it remains challenging because true progression signals are subtle in longitudinal MRI. In this low-signal regime, transferring modern generative sequence models directly is unreliable: training is dominated by stable baseline anatomy and confounded by dense, sample-specific nuisance variation. We first provide a theoretical analysis that explains these failures through two modes. Identity collapse occurs when optimization is driven toward reproducing the current anatomy, which prevents the model from learning faint temporal change. The continuous interpolation trap arises when standard smooth networks cannot separate localized biological drift from pervasive noise, which leads to spurious changes that diffuse across the volume. To address both issues, we propose Latent Drift, a progressive generative framework that learns change in a compressed semantic representation rather than synthesizing full-resolution anatomy. This design removes pixel-level identity from the prediction target and concentrates model capacity on progression-relevant dynamics. We further apply Finite Scalar Quantization to the learned change representation, which suppresses small, high-frequency nuisance fluctuations while preserving consistent structural drift. Experiments on longitudinal 3D brain MRI show that Latent Drift improves patient-specific neuro-forecasting over diffusion and autoregressive transformer baselines across generative fidelity and clinically relevant evaluation metrics. Project page: \href{https://cutepkq.github.io/latent-drift}{https://cutepkq.github.io/latent-drift}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Latent Drift框架，通过在压缩语义表示中学习渐进变化，而非直接合成全分辨率解剖图像，解决了纵向MRI中神经退行性疾病预测的难题。该框架克服了身份崩溃和连续插值陷阱两个问题，并应用有限标量量化抑制噪声，在3D脑MRI上优于扩散模型和自回归Transformer基线。
AI.motivation: 慢进化神经退行性疾病的早期预测有助于早期干预和临床试验设计，但纵向MRI中真实进展信号微弱，直接迁移现代生成序列模型不可靠，训练被稳定基线解剖结构主导并被稠密的样本特异性干扰变量所混淆。
AI.method: 提出Latent Drift渐进生成框架：1) 在压缩语义表示（而非全分辨率解剖）中学习变化，消除像素级身份预测目标，集中模型能力于进展相关动态；2) 应用有限标量量化（FSQ）到学习到的变化表示，抑制高频噪声干扰同时保留一致的结构漂移。
AI.result: 在纵向3D脑MRI实验上，Latent Drift在生成保真度和临床相关评估指标上均优于扩散模型和自回归Transformer基线，实现了更好的患者特异性神经预测。
AI.conclusion: Latent Drift通过语义空间渐进生成和有限标量量化有效解决了纵向医学影像预测中的两个关键失败模式（身份崩溃和连续插值陷阱），为神经退行性疾病预测提供了更可靠的生成框架。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样存在时序变化微弱的问题（如植被缓慢演替、城市渐进扩张），该框架可直接迁移：1) 将遥感影像编码到语义潜空间（如地物类别特征），在潜空间学习变化而非像素域；2) FSQ可用于抑制遥感时序中大气、光照等高频噪声，保留真实地表变化；3) 可扩展到多光谱/高光谱数据的时序预测，潜空间维度设计需适配光谱特征维度。

title: Drift-Aware Temporal Graph Rewiring (DATGR) for Adaptive Semantic Modeling in Biomedical Text
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Published in the Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI 2026)
summary: Biomedical language evolves rapidly as new discoveries emerge, causing traditional text models to lose semantic fidelity over time. Static embeddings and co-occurrence graphs cannot capture such evolution, leading to performance degradation in retrieval and knowledge discovery tasks. This paper introduces a Drift-Aware Temporal Graph Rewiring (DATGR) framework that models concept evolution by dynamically updating co-occurrence edges based on estimated semantic drift. Instead of retraining embeddings for each time slice, DATGR performs lightweight, feedback-driven rewiring using a logistic update rule applied to edge weights. Evaluated on the Biomedical Multi-Relation Corpus (BIOMRC), the method achieved a mean Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic (AUROC) improvement of approximately 0.066 absolute difference (0.699 vs. 0.633) over a static baseline. Area Under the Precision-Recall Curve (AUPRC) remained comparable (0.738 vs. 0.744), showing that drift-aware adaptation enhances link-prediction recall without a loss in precision. These results demonstrate that edge-level adaptation effectively captures temporal semantic change in evolving biomedical text while remaining computationally efficient and interpretable.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种漂移感知时序图重连（DATGR）框架，通过轻量级逻辑更新规则动态调整共现边权重来建模生物医学概念的语义演化，在BIOMRC数据集上相比静态基线实现了AUROC提升约0.066，且AUPRC保持相当。
AI.motivation: 生物医学语言随新发现快速演变，传统文本模型（静态嵌入和共现图）无法捕捉这种语义变化，导致检索和知识发现任务性能下降。
AI.method: 提出DATGR框架：通过估计语义漂移动态更新共现边，采用基于逻辑更新规则的轻量级反馈驱动重连机制，避免了对每个时间片重新训练嵌入。
AI.result: 在BIOMRC数据集上，DATGR相比静态基线：AUROC提升0.066（0.699 vs. 0.633），AUPRC相当（0.738 vs. 0.744），说明漂移感知适应提高了链接预测召回率且未损失精度。
AI.conclusion: 边级别的自适应能够有效捕捉演化生物医学文本中的时序语义变化，同时保持计算效率和可解释性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临地物概念随新传感器数据、新分类标准演化的语义漂移问题。具体方案：1）将DATGR应用于遥感时序文本（如文献摘要、变化检测报告）中的地物概念演化建模；2）将共现图替换为遥感地物-属性关联图，边权重反映地物与光谱、纹理等特征的时序共现关系；3）利用逻辑更新规则动态调整地物类别间的语义距离，辅助遥感本体更新和知识图谱构建。

title: Enhancing the KidSat Model: Integrating Geographical Encoding and Data Quality Assessment for Childhood Poverty Prediction
summary: Accurate poverty mapping using satellite imagery is often hindered by (i) noisy and sparse survey-derived supervision, (ii) image quality issues such as cloud cover and image corruption, and (iii) lack of explicit spatial structure in image-only models. Building on the KidSat framework, we develop an enhanced pipeline that improves predictive accuracy via refined data preprocessing, systematic image quality assessment, and mathematically defined geographic encoding. First, we refine the fine-tuning target matrix by resolving high-cardinality sparsity and reducing one-hot dimensionality from 103 to 51 via DHS re-aggregation. Second, we introduce a simple two-stage quality-screening procedure to filter heavily clouded or corrupted observations. Third, we fuse DINOv2 visual embeddings with Spherical Harmonics (SH) location features. Across extensive experiments, these changes reduce MAE from 0.2167 to 0.1759, corresponding to an 18.83% relative reduction on the cluster-level severe-deprivation proportion scale. When extended from 16 to 33 African countries, the best-performing configuration achieves an overall MAE of 0.1658. We find that SH features consistently improve performance over the image-only backbone, whereas higher-capacity coordinate Multi Layer Perception augmentation (SH+SIREN) can underperform without carefully designed objectives. Finally, gradient-boosted tree heads (XGBoost/LightGBM) most effectively exploit nonlinear interactions in the fused visual-geographic representation. These findings provide a scalable and principled recipe for improving satellite-based socioeconomic predictions using only publicly accessible data.

AI.tldr: 本文在KidSat框架基础上，通过改进数据预处理（DHS重聚合降低维度）、引入两阶段图像质量筛选、融合DINOv2视觉嵌入与球谐函数（SH）位置特征，将非洲贫困预测MAE从0.2167降至0.1759（降低18.83%），并扩展至33个国家取得0.1658的MAE。研究发现SH特征始终优于纯图像模型，而梯度提升树（XGBoost/LightGBM）能最有效利用融合表示中的非线性交互。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星影像贫困制图面临三大挑战：调查数据监督噪声大且稀疏、图像质量问题（云覆盖、损坏）、纯图像模型缺乏显式空间结构。本文旨在改进KidSat框架，提高预测精度。
AI.method: (1) 改进微调目标矩阵：通过DHS重聚合将one-hot维度从103降至51，解决高基数稀疏性；(2) 两阶段图像质量筛选：过滤严重云覆盖或损坏的观测；(3) 融合DINOv2视觉嵌入与球谐函数（SH）位置特征，对比SH+SIREN高容量坐标MLP增强方案。
AI.result: 集群级严重贫困比例MAE从0.2167降至0.1759（相对降低18.83%）；扩展至33个非洲国家时最佳配置MAE为0.1658；SH特征始终优于纯图像基线；XGBoost/LightGBM头能最有效利用非线性交互。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了仅使用公开数据即可规模化改进卫星社会经济预测的可复现方案，强调了空间编码和集成学习头的关键作用。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 可将球谐函数（SH）位置编码直接迁移至遥感回归任务（如作物产量估计、城市扩张建模），替代传统经纬度直接输入；(2) 两阶段图像质量筛选机制可通用化至任何存在云覆盖的遥感影像预处理流程；(3) DINOv2+SH+XGBoost的融合范式适用于遥感领域的多模态预测任务，特别是精细尺度社会经济指标估计。

title: AI-guided stimuli discovery and generation to optimize facial emotion perception studies in autism
summary: Understanding perceptual differences between autistic and neurotypical adults requires behavioral assays that are sensitive, reliable, and mechanistically informative. Facial emotion perception is a useful test case because group differences have been reported, but findings vary across studies. Here we show that this variability may reflect image-level sparsity: autistic-neurotypical differences in emotion judgments were concentrated in a small subset of diagnostic facial expressions rather than spread uniformly across stimuli. We trained population-specific artificial neural network models to predict image-level judgments for autistic and neurotypical participants, then used these models to select novel faces predicted to maximize group separation. In an independent cohort, model-selected images produced larger behavioral differences than matched random images. We then used the same models with a generative adversarial network to transform diagnostic images toward greater predicted group agreement. In phenotype-matched validation, synthesized images reduced behavioral separation relative to their matched originals. These results establish a model-guided framework for discovering and transforming stimuli that reveal population-specific perceptual differences. More broadly, they show how behavioral phenotyping can move beyond averaging across fixed stimulus sets toward optimized assays that identify the conditions under which neurodivergent perception diverges or converges.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过人工神经网络模型发现，自闭症与神经典型成年人在面部情绪感知上的群体差异集中在少数诊断性表情图像上，而非均匀分布。研究利用模型选择能最大化群体差异的图像，并在独立队列中验证了其有效性；同时使用生成对抗网络转化诊断性图像以减少群体差异。该框架为发现和转化揭示群体特异性感知差异的刺激提供了模型引导的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在自闭症与神经典型个体的面部情绪感知差异上结果不一致，作者认为这可能是由于刺激图像层面的稀疏性——差异仅集中在少数图像而非均匀分布。因此，需要一种能够识别并利用这些稀疏诊断性刺激的方法，以提高行为检测的敏感性、可靠性和机制信息量。
AI.method: 1. 训练群体特异性人工神经网络模型，分别预测自闭症和神经典型参与者在图像层面的情绪判断。2. 利用模型选择能最大化群体分离的新面孔图像。3. 在独立队列中，比较模型选择图像与随机匹配图像的行为差异。4. 使用生成对抗网络（GAN）转化诊断性图像，使其趋向更高的群体一致性。5. 在表型匹配验证中，评估合成图像与原始图像的行为分离程度。
AI.result: 模型选择的图像在独立队列中产生了比随机匹配图像更大的行为差异。通过GAN转化的合成图像相较于匹配的原始图像，减少了群体间的行为分离。这表明模型引导的刺激选择和转化是有效的。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了一个模型引导的框架，能够发现并转化揭示群体特异性感知差异的刺激。更广泛地，它展示了行为表型分析如何从对固定刺激集的平均化转向优化检测范式，以识别神经多样性感知在何种条件下存在差异或趋同。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。具体方案：1）遥感图像中的地物类别感知差异（如不同专家对同一影像中地物分类的判定差异）可类比本文的群体感知差异问题，利用群体特异性模型识别少数"诊断性"遥感图像块，优化标注一致性评估。2）本文的GAN转化思想可用于遥感数据增强——将难以区分的遥感样本（如云遮挡、光谱混淆区域）转化为更易于判别或更符合特定标注者偏好的表征。3）将群体特异性ANN应用于遥感中的视觉质量评估，识别哪些场景特征会导致不同标注群体（如新手vs专家）的分歧，从而指导训练数据筛选。

title: ARGUS: Accelerated, Robust, General, and Unsupervised Cell Tracking Solutions
summary:
Background and Objective: Quantitative analysis of cell dynamics is central to modern biological research, providing critical insights into immune cell interactions, disease progression, and drug mechanisms. Automated cell tracking in time-lapse microscopy remains challenging due to noise, morphological variations, overlapping cells, and dynamic events such as divisions and fusions.
  Methods: We present ARGUS, a framework for Accelerated, Robust, General, and Unsupervised Cell Tracking Solutions. ARGUS combines adaptive cell detection, dense Farneback optical-flow prediction, frame-to-frame linear assignment, and a sequence-level tracklet-refinement step that reconnects trajectory fragments across short temporal gaps.
  Results: On publicly available Cell Tracking Challenge datasets, ARGUS achieved detection accuracy of 0.905-0.971 and tracking accuracy of 0.897-0.964, with runtimes within 1 minute (5-6 seconds for 3 frames).
  Conclusions: ARGUS is a modular, interpretable framework that can be adapted to different imaging modalities and biological applications without training data or GPU infrastructure. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/Gitinc/argus

AI.tldr: ARGUS是一个无监督、无需训练数据和GPU的自动化细胞追踪框架，结合自适应检测、光流预测、线性分配和轨迹片段重连，在Cell Tracking Challenge数据集上实现了0.897-0.964的追踪精度，运行时间不超过1分钟。
AI.motivation: 细胞动态定量分析对生物学研究至关重要，但自动化细胞追踪因噪声、形态变化、细胞重叠以及分裂融合等动态事件而极具挑战性，现有方法往往依赖监督学习和大量标注数据。
AI.method: ARGUS框架包含四个核心模块：(1)自适应细胞检测；(2)密集Farneback光流预测；(3)帧间线性分配；(4)序列级轨迹片段精炼，通过短时间间隔重连断开的轨迹片段。
AI.result: 在Cell Tracking Challenge公开数据集上，检测精度达到0.905-0.971，追踪精度达到0.897-0.964，运行时间在1分钟以内（3帧仅需5-6秒）。
AI.conclusion: ARGUS是一个模块化、可解释的框架，无需训练数据和GPU即可适应不同成像模态和生物学应用，代码已开源。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该框架的无监督、无需训练数据特性与遥感目标跟踪场景高度契合。具体方案：(1)将自适应细胞检测替换为遥感目标检测器（如YOLO系列），结合Farneback光流进行运动预测；(2)帧间线性分配和轨迹重连策略可直接迁移至遥感视频中的车辆、船舶等移动目标跟踪；(3)利用ARGUS的模块化设计，针对遥感影像特有的遮挡、尺度变化和背景复杂性，引入多尺度检测和背景建模模块进行适配。

title: CommuniWave:A Machine Learning Model for Quantifying the Degree of Temporary Informal Behavior in Urban Communities
summary: For urban managers and designers, improving the functional attributes of urban communities to enhance territorial resilience in the face of complexity and uncertainty is crucial. Currently, community planning often follows a top-down approach and lacks effective metrics to quantify informal behaviors of residents, leading to frequent conflicts with original plans. This study introduces CommuniWave, a machine learning model designed to efficiently detect and quantify the Degree of Informal Behavior (DIB) in urban communities. The model integrates a Behavior Capture Net (BCN) based on mmaction2, a self-developed YOLOv10 model (YLX), and a Behavior Eval Model (BEM) using random forest. Ultimately, by generating DIB fluctuation charts from street videos, the model facilitates dynamic monitoring, supporting urban managers in making refined decisions to enhance the overall resilience of communities.

AI.tldr: CommuniWave是一个融合mmaction2的BCN、自研YLX (YOLOv10)和随机森林BEM的机器学习模型，通过街道视频检测和量化城市社区非正式行为程度（DIB），生成波动图辅助韧性决策。
AI.motivation: 现有社区规划采用自上而下模式，缺乏量化居民非正式行为的有效指标，导致规划与实际冲突频发，亟需提升城市社区韧性。
AI.method: 构建CommuniWave模型，包含三个模块：基于mmaction2的行为捕获网络（BCN）提取行为特征；自研YOLOv10模型（YLX）进行目标检测；基于随机森林的行为评估模型（BEM）计算非正式行为程度（DIB），最终生成DIB波动图。
AI.result: 成功从街道视频生成DIB波动图，实现对社区非正式行为的动态监测，支持精细化决策。
AI.conclusion: CommuniWave能够有效量化非正式行为，为城市管理者提供数据驱动的动态监测工具，有助于提升城市社区的整体韧性和规划的合理性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域可借鉴CommuniWave的“视频+多模型融合”框架：1）利用遥感时序影像替代街道视频，结合BCN提取时空行为模式；2）YLX目标检测模块可直接迁移至遥感地物识别（如违规建筑、摊贩分布）；3）随机森林BEM可泛化为城市功能区非正式度评估模型，将DIB指标与遥感土地利用分类耦合，构建城市韧性评价体系。

title: Texture Representations in Deep Vision Models: Comparing CNNs, Vision Transformers, and Human Perception
summary: In computational vision science, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have emerged as a popular model of biological vision because of the alignment they can exhibit with neural and behavioral data in humans and animals. However, it remains unclear to what extent this alignment persists for visual tasks that extend beyond the canonical object recognition paradigm based on well defined semantic content. In this study, we diverge from the common object-centric view by focusing on another aspect of vision: texture perception. We consider textures of different complexity generated with three different algorithms from the same source images. Using a rank-based statistic, we quantify the information encoded in the internal representations of a CNN and three Vision Transformers (ViTs), and we compare the similarity of these representations to those inferred from human psychophysics data. We find that the representation of textures is aligned in different ViTs, but not between the ViTs and the CNN; that ViTs form similar representations for textures of different complexity; that human performance in recognizing textures can be better predicted from ViTs representations rather than CNN representations. Taken together, these results suggest that ViTs may capture more faithfully than CNNs how texture patterns are visually processed by humans, and that the representations of texture stimuli in computational models may be driven by the network architecture.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了CNN和Vision Transformers（ViTs）在纹理感知任务中与人类心理物理数据的一致性，发现ViTs比CNN更能预测人类纹理识别表现，且ViTs之间的表征更相似。
AI.motivation: 探究CNN和ViT在非标准物体识别任务（纹理感知）中与人类视觉表征的一致性程度，特别是超越传统物体识别范式后，这些模型是否仍能作为生物视觉的有效模型。
AI.method: 使用三种不同算法从相同源图像生成不同复杂度的纹理刺激；采用基于秩的统计量量化CNN和三种ViT内部表征中的信息编码；将模型表征与人类心理物理数据进行相似性比较。
AI.result: ViT之间的纹理表征高度对齐，但与CNN之间不一致；ViT对不同复杂度纹理形成相似表征；ViT表征比CNN表征能更好预测人类纹理识别表现。
AI.conclusion: ViT可能比CNN更忠实地捕捉人类视觉处理纹理模式的方式；计算模型对纹理刺激的表征可能受网络架构驱动。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。在遥感领域，纹理是地物分类（如土地覆盖类型识别）、SAR图像分析、纹理分割等任务的关键特征。可借鉴该研究的实验范式：(1) 将ViT引入遥感纹理分析任务，替代传统CNN或手工纹理特征；(2) 利用ViT对不同复杂度纹理的泛化能力，处理遥感影像中尺度多变、纹理复杂的地物；(3) 建立遥感纹理感知的心理物理基准数据集，评估深度学习模型与人类遥感解译专家的一致性，优化模型架构以更接近人类视觉感知。

title: SHAP-Weighted Cross-Modal Expert Fusion for Emotion and Sentiment Recognition: Evidence and Limits
summary: Multimodal emotion and sentiment recognition is commonly addressed by early fusion, which concatenates modalities before classification, or late fusion, which combines independently trained unimodal predictors. Early fusion can be accurate but monolithic, while late fusion is modular but may lose cross-modal interactions. This paper revisits XAI-guided adaptive fusion (\xgaf), a tree-based mixture of unimodal and cross-modal experts whose sample-level weights are derived from TreeSHAP attribution magnitudes. We focus on the effect of SHAP attribution reduction when experts have unequal feature dimensionalities. In this setting, mean-abs and median-abs reductions can suppress high-dimensional cross-modal experts, whereas sum-abs reduction preserves total attribution mass. On MELD 7-class emotion recognition, sum-abs \xgaf{} nearly matches early fusion across three face-sequence aggregators; the Transformer variant reaches 0.5983 \wf{}, compared with 0.6018 for early fusion and 0.4598 for probability-average late fusion. McNemar testing shows no significant difference between sum-abs \xgaf{} and early fusion on MELD ($p=1.000$), while \xgaf{} remains significantly better than late fusion ($p<0.0001$). On CMU-MOSEI 3-class sentiment recognition, sum-abs \xgaf{} reaches 0.6519 \wf{}, slightly exceeding early fusion (0.6485) and late fusion (0.5696). Ablation studies show that the main gain comes from adding cross-modal experts, especially the trimodal expert, rather than from complex per-sample routing. Diagnostics further show that mean-abs and median-abs weights are nearly uniform, while sum-abs weights concentrate on the trimodal expert. Thus, the main contribution is a transparent empirical analysis of how SHAP reduction, expert dimensionality, and cross-modal expert design affect modular multimodal fusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于XAI引导的自适应融合方法（XGAF），利用TreeSHAP归因值来动态加权单模态与跨模态专家，并重点分析了SHAP归约方式（mean-abs、median-abs vs. sum-abs）在不同专家特征维度下对融合性能的影响。实验表明，sum-abs归约在MELD和CMU-MOSEI数据集上接近或略优于早期融合，显著优于晚期融合。
AI.motivation: 早期融合虽然准确但模型整体化、缺乏模块化；晚期融合模块化但丢失跨模态交互。现有XAI-guided融合方法未深入分析SHAP归约方式对专家权重的影响，尤其在专家特征维度不均衡时。本文旨在系统研究不同SHAP归约策略如何影响多模态融合效果。
AI.method: 提出XGAF框架，构建树状混合模型包含单模态和跨模态专家，利用TreeSHAP计算每个专家对预测的归因值，通过三种方式（mean-abs、median-abs、sum-abs）归约SHAP值为样本级权重，从而动态融合专家输出。在MELD（7类情感）和CMU-MOSEI（3类情感）上使用三种面部序列聚合器（含Transformer）进行验证。
AI.result: MELD上sum-abs XGAF（Transformer变体）达0.5983 wF，早期融合0.6018，晚期融合0.4598；McNemar检验显示sum-abs XGAF与早期融合无显著差异（p=1.000），但显著优于晚期融合（p<0.0001）。CMU-MOSEI上sum-abs XGAF达0.6519 wF，略超早期融合0.6485。消融实验表明主要增益来自跨模态专家（尤其是三模态专家），而非复杂样本级路由。
AI.conclusion: SHAP归约方式显著影响多模态融合效果：mean-abs和median-abs会压制高维跨模态专家，导致权重近乎均匀分布，而sum-abs保留了总归因质量，使权重集中在三模态专家上，从而提升性能。本文贡献在于对SHAP归约、专家维度与跨模态设计对模块化多模态融合影响的透明实证分析。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：（1）遥感多模态数据（如光学-SAR-高光谱）可直接应用XGAF框架，利用TreeSHAP动态融合不同传感器特征；（2）针对遥感中模态维度差异大的问题（如高光谱数百波段 vs. SAR少量特征），采用sum-abs归约可避免高维模态被压制；（3）跨模态专家可设计为光学-SAR、光学-高光谱、SAR-高光谱及三模态组合，捕获地物分类中的互补信息；（4）样本级自适应权重有助于处理遥感中云遮挡、传感器故障等导致的部分模态缺失场景。

title: WCog-VLA: A Dual-Level World-Cognitive Vision-Language-Action Model for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have advanced end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing methods either lack comprehensive world cognition or suffer from fragmented world foresight, inherently confining these models to reactive driving. To address this limitation, we propose WCog-VLA, a novel dual-level World-Cognitive VLA framework that successfully bridges semantic world forecasting with generative world evolution to achieve proactive autonomous driving. At the semantic level, WCog-VLA unifies world cognition and reasoning by incorporating 3D spatial perception and injecting agent tokens to capture the world dynamics, while concurrently enabling Game-theoretic Chain-of-Thought (Game-CoT) reasoning. At the generative level, we introduce the Aligned Decoupled Diffusion Transformer (ADDT) as a powerful generative world model that synthesizes physically-plausible joint multi-agent trajectories. Through scene representation alignment, ADDT reduces the number of denoising steps required and thus significantly accelerates inference. To facilitate strategic reasoning, we further construct a large-scale dataset featuring 85k Game-CoT annotations. Extensive experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark demonstrate that WCog-VLA achieves a State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) PDMS score of 92.9.

AI.tldr: WCog-VLA是一个双层次世界认知VLA框架，通过语义级世界认知与推理（3D空间感知、Game-CoT推理）和生成级世界演化（ADDT生成多智能体轨迹）实现主动式自动驾驶，在NAVSIM基准上达到92.9 PDMS SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型缺乏全面的世界认知或存在碎片化的世界预见能力，本质上局限于反应式驾驶，无法实现主动式自动驾驶。
AI.method: 提出双层次World-Cognitive VLA框架：语义层通过3D空间感知和agent token注入统一世界认知与推理，并引入Game-CoT推理；生成层提出Aligned Decoupled Diffusion Transformer (ADDT)作为生成式世界模型，通过场景表示对齐减少去噪步数加速推理；构建85k Game-CoT标注数据集。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准上达到SOTA PDMS分数92.9。
AI.conclusion: WCog-VLA通过语义世界预测与生成世界演化的桥接，成功实现了从反应式驾驶到主动式驾驶的范式转变。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域可借鉴其双层次认知框架：1）语义层：将3D空间感知与agent token注入用于遥感多目标跟踪与动态场景理解，Game-CoT推理可用于遥感时序变化检测中的因果推理；2）生成层：ADDT可用于遥感视频预测与多目标轨迹生成（如卫星目标跟踪、无人机群路径规划），通过对地观测场景表示对齐加速推理；3）可构建遥感领域的大规模Game-CoT数据集用于遥感智能推理任务。

title: Towards Precision Therapy in Hepatocellular Carcinoma: A Clinical-Reasoning LLM for Risk Stratification and Treatment Guidance
summary: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) is a common malignancy and a leading cause of cancer-related mortality. Current guidelines and staging systems provide coarse categories, but often miss within-stage heterogeneity and the clinical context in electronic medical records (EMRs). We present HCC-STAR (Hepatocellular Carcinoma Staging, Treatment And pRognosis), a clinically aligned large language model that reads routine EMR narratives and jointly outputs risk score-based staging, ranked guideline-consistent treatments with evidence-based rationales, and individualized survival estimates. We curated about 30,000 HCC cases from SEER and expanded them into EMR-style narrative training data using a clinician-validated, prompt-based augmentation workflow. On this corpus, we developed a knowledge-aligned reasoning framework optimized with a step-verifiable composite reward, moving beyond text-level memorization of clinical guidelines. In a multi-center cohort of 6,668 patients from 12 hospitals in China, HCC-STAR achieved state-of-the-art performance in treatment recommendation and risk stratification compared with clinical guidelines and competitive models, including GPT-5 and Gemini-2.5 Pro. Hypothetical overall-survival analysis showed a median survival of 51 months under adherence to HCC-STAR recommendations, compared with 29 and 32 months under BCLC and CNLC. In clinician-centric evaluations, blinded hepatobiliary specialists rated HCC-STAR's reasoning and evidence-based justifications as trustworthy. The model surpassed resident and attending physicians in treatment accuracy and helped physicians make more accurate decisions faster when used as an assistant. These findings support HCC-STAR as a reliable and verifiable decision-support system for risk stratification and precision therapy in HCC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HCC-STAR，一种面向肝细胞癌的临床对齐大语言模型，能够从电子病历叙述中同时输出基于风险分数的分期、指南一致的治疗推荐及个性化生存预测。基于约3万例SEER数据扩展为EMR风格训练语料，采用知识对齐推理框架和步骤可验证的复合奖励优化。在12家中国医院6668例患者的多中心队列中，HCC-STAR在治疗推荐和风险分层上优于临床指南及GPT-5、Gemini-2.5 Pro等模型，医师评估其推理可信，辅助医师更快更准确地决策。
AI.motivation: 现有HCC分期系统粗粒度、忽略组内异质性及电子病历中丰富的临床上下文；缺乏既能解读病历又能同时提供精准分期、个性化治疗推荐和预后预测的临床决策支持系统。
AI.method: 1) 数据集构建：从SEER中筛选约3万例HCC病例，通过临床验证的提示增强流程扩展为EMR风格叙述文本；2) 知识对齐推理框架：采用步骤可验证的复合奖励进行优化，超越单纯的文字记忆；3) 模型输出：同时输出风险分数分期、排序后的指南一致性治疗推荐（附循证依据）以及个性化生存估计。
AI.result: 多中心队列（12家中国医院，6668例）中，HCC-STAR在治疗推荐和风险分层上达到SOTA；模拟总生存分析显示遵循HCC-STAR推荐的中位生存期51个月，优于BCLC（29个月）和CNLC（32个月）；盲法肝病专家评估其推理可信；模型在治疗准确度上超过住院及主治医师，作为辅助工具帮助医师更快更准决策。
AI.conclusion: HCC-STAR是一种可靠且可验证的HCC风险分层和精准治疗决策支持系统。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1) 数据增强策略可迁移：SEER→EMR叙述的医学语料增强流程可类比用于遥感图像→地理报告文本的生成，解决遥感标注数据稀缺问题；2) 知识对齐+复合奖励框架可应用于遥感场景理解：在遥感图像中同时输出场景分类（分期）、推荐处理方法（治疗）和预测结果（生存估计），例如卫星图像中的灾害评估与应急响应推荐；3) 步骤级验证机制适用于遥感解译链路的可解释性需求，如分阶段验证目标检测→变化分析→风险评估的推理过程。

title: Classical versus Deep Mirror-Symmetry Scoring: A Benchmark of Thirteen Methods
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables. Code and benchmark: https://github.com/maxwoe/imgsym
summary: Quantifying how mirror-symmetric an image is about a given axis (symmetry scoring) underpins applications from visual aesthetics to medical imaging, yet proposed scoring methods have never been compared on a common, statistically grounded protocol. We benchmark 13 scoring methods (nine collected from literature, four introduced here) spanning from classical features to frozen deep features, across four single-axis and five multi-axis datasets under a reflection-exact protocol with a chance-anchored, significance-tested discrimination skill. Deep backbones perform best on single-axis and harder multi-axis protocols. However, a classical histogram-of-oriented-gradients (HOG) descriptor trails the best frozen-network readout by a small (but significant) margin, is not statistically separable from the runner-up (a CNN-filter measure), and runs ~300x faster on CPU. Our results show that discrimination concentrates in mid-scale oriented features, where deep backbones peak at a low or mid stage, and HOG peaks at a mid cell size. Among existing methods, frozen deep features thus offer little over a tuned classical descriptor for measuring symmetry; whether task-trained deep scorers can do better remains open. We release the scorers and harness in imgsym, an open toolkit for image symmetry detection and measurement.

AI.tldr: 本文对13种图像对称性评分方法进行了系统基准测试，发现经典HOG描述符在性能上接近深度特征，但速度快约300倍，表明在对称性测量任务中，精细调优的经典方法并不显著逊色于冻结的深度特征。
AI.motivation: 现有对称性评分方法众多，但缺乏在统一、统计严谨的协议下的公平比较，无法客观评估各方法的优劣，导致研究者难以选择合适方法。
AI.method: 收集9种文献方法并引入4种新方法，共13种评分方法；在4个单轴和5个多轴数据集上，采用反射精确协议，以机会锚定、显著性检验的判别技能为指标进行基准测试。
AI.result: 深度骨干网络在单轴和较难的多轴协议上表现最佳；但经典HOG描述符与最佳冻结网络特征差距很小（但显著），与第二名（CNN滤波器度量）无统计差异，且在CPU上快约300倍；判别能力集中在中尺度定向特征上。
AI.conclusion: 在对称性测量任务中，冻结的深度特征相比调优的经典描述符提升有限，任务训练的深度评分器能否超越尚有待研究；研究团队发布了开源工具包imgsym。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像中存在大量对称性结构（如建筑、道路网、农田布局），该基准测试框架可直接迁移至遥感图像对称性评估。具体方案：1）利用HOG描述符的高效性，在遥感大场景中快速检测建筑物对称轴；2）将深度特征与HOG结合的混合方案用于高分辨率遥感影像的对称性分析，提升效率与精度的平衡；3）imgsym工具包可集成至遥感图像预处理管线，用于数据增强或质量评估。

title: The complexities of patient-centred conversational artificial intelligence
summary: Consumer-facing health chatbots powered by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for symptom assessment. However, chatbot development and evaluation often rely on cooperative, articulate, simulated patients. We analysed 2,053 real patient-chatbot conversations and found that communication patterns and expression of emotions vary widely across users. We developed a patient simulator that separately models clinical content, emotional state, conversational strategy, and communication style. In a Turing-inspired evaluation of realism with 15 human graders, simulated conversations were nearly indistinguishable from real ones, with human graders achieving an accuracy of 55%. We used five distinct patient personae, across 1,164 clinician-graded cases, to evaluate the performance of four LLMs in urgency assessment. We found that communication style can significantly alter triage outcomes. Patient-centred conversational artificial intelligence must accommodate communication diversity: systems designed for idealised, rather than realistic, interactions risk underperforming and amplifying health disparities when deployed in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了2,053段真实患者与AI聊天机器人的对话，发现用户的沟通模式和情绪表达存在巨大差异。研究者开发了一个患者模拟器，分别建模临床内容、情绪状态、对话策略和沟通风格。在15名人类评分员的图灵测试中，模拟对话与真实对话几乎无法区分（准确率55%）。使用5种不同的患者角色和1,164名临床医生评估，发现沟通风格会显著改变分诊结果。结论是面向患者的对话AI必须适应沟通多样性，否则可能加剧健康不平等。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的健康聊天机器人在开发和评估时通常使用合作的、善于表达的标准患者（模拟患者），而忽略了真实用户沟通模式的多样性和情绪表达的差异性，导致系统在真实部署中可能表现不佳。
AI.method: 1) 收集并分析了2,053段真实患者与聊天机器人的对话；2) 开发了一个患者模拟器，独立建模临床内容、情绪状态、对话策略和沟通风格四个维度；3) 采用图灵测试方式（15名人类评分员）评估模拟对话的真实性；4) 设计5种不同的患者角色，通过1,164名临床医生评估4种大语言模型在紧急程度评估中的表现。
AI.result: 模拟对话与真实对话在人类评分员判断下几乎无法区分（准确率仅55%）；沟通风格会显著改变分诊（triage）结果，不同患者角色下LLM的紧急程度评估存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 面向患者的对话AI必须适应沟通多样性，基于理想化而非真实交互设计的系统在真实世界中存在性能不足和加剧健康差距的风险。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域存在类似问题：不同区域、不同传感器、不同标注人员的标注风格和噪声模式存在巨大差异。借鉴本文方法，可（1）开发一个遥感标注模拟器，分别建模地物内容、标注者专业知识水平、标注策略（保守vs冒进）和标注风格（边界精确度、碎片化程度），生成多样化的合成标注数据；（2）用此模拟器评估不同遥感分割/分类模型对标注风格变化的鲁棒性；（3）发现某些模型在"理想标注"下表现优异但在"真实标注风格"下性能骤降，揭示模型在实际部署中的风险。此外，可模拟不同遥感应用场景（城市、农田、森林）下标注者的差异化行为模式。

title: Attribute Retrieving for Open-Vocabulary Endoscopic Compositional Referring Segmentation
summary: Referring Image Segmentation (RIS) aims to segment image regions specified by natural language, enabling fine-grained and controllable visual understanding. Extending RIS to endoscopic imagery, however, presents unique challenges, including scarce high-quality annotations and complex, domain-specific image-text relationships. Although recent vision-language models demonstrate strong cross-domain alignment, they often fail to capture fine-grained textual cues in endoscopic settings, resulting in suboptimal performance and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we introduce ReferEndoscopy, a large-scale benchmark for RIS in the endoscopy field. Building on this dataset, we propose the Attribute Retrieval-based Endoscopic-RIS (AR-ERIS) framework for open-vocabulary endoscopic compositional referring segmentation. AR-ERIS leverages attribute retrieval for open-vocabulary endoscopic compositional referring segmentation and is pretrained on the curated ReferEndoscopy dataset, achieving state-of-the-art performance with strong generalization across both simulated and real-world endoscopic data. The dataset and code will be publicly released upon completion of the review process.

AI.tldr: 本文针对内窥镜图像中的Referring Image Segmentation (RIS)任务，提出了ReferEndoscopy大规模基准数据集和AR-ERIS框架，通过属性检索实现开放词汇的组合式指代分割，在模拟和真实内窥镜数据上均取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: RIS扩展到内窥镜图像面临两大挑战：高质量标注稀缺以及领域特定的复杂图像-文本关系。现有视觉-语言模型虽能实现跨域对齐，但难以捕捉内窥镜场景中细粒度的文本线索，导致性能不佳且泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 1) 构建ReferEndoscopy大规模基准数据集；2) 提出AR-ERIS框架，利用属性检索实现开放词汇的内窥镜组合式指代分割；3) 在ReferEndoscopy数据集上预训练模型。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和真实内窥镜数据上均取得最先进性能，展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AR-ERIS框架有效解决了内窥镜RIS中标注稀缺和细粒度语义理解不足的问题，为内窥镜场景的开放词汇指代分割提供了新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像同样面临标注稀缺和复杂图像-文本关系问题。具体交叉方案：1) 将ReferEndoscopy数据构建方法迁移到遥感领域，构建遥感专用RIS基准数据集；2) AR-ERIS的属性检索机制可用于遥感图像中根据多属性描述（如"位于河流与道路之间的建筑物"）进行组合式目标分割；3) 开放词汇能力可适应遥感中未见过的地物类别，提升模型泛化性。

title: Formal Mechanisms for Market Stability in Self-Interested Agent Societies: A Marketplace Simulation Study
summary: Self-interested agents, left unconstrained, tend toward defection in repeated social dilemmas, causing cooperative gains from trade to collapse. This paper investigates what formal mechanisms, layered on top of unrestricted communication, are sufficient for a society of such agents to maintain market stability, and how resilient those mechanisms are to adversarial attack. We instantiate the research question as a multi-agent marketplace simulation where 18 LLM agents (DeepSeek-V3) with complementary production specialties must trade within a constrained social network to obtain utility. We conduct two experimental phases: (1) a mechanism comparison across eight conditions under progressive troll injection over 200 rounds, identifying Mediation as the top-performing mechanism; and (2) adversarial red-teaming of Mediation using iteratively prompt-optimised LLM-driven trolls, finding that the best attack (v6) reduces honest-agent utility by 13.3% but cannot collapse the market. Mediation enables recovery even under sustained adversarial pressure. We define adversarial robustness as a mechanism's ability to sustain positive honest-agent utility under optimised attack, and find that Mediation is robust: it can be bent but not broken.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在重复社会困境中，自利智能体（18个DeepSeek-V3 LLM代理）如何在去中心化市场中维持合作。通过比较8种机制（200轮次，渐进式攻击），发现Mediation机制表现最佳；对抗性红队测试表明，即使最优攻击（v6）使诚实代理效用降低13.3%，Mediation仍能维持市场稳定，定义并验证了其对抗鲁棒性——可被弯曲但不可被打破。
AI.motivation: 在重复社会困境中，自利智能体倾向于背叛导致合作收益崩溃，现有研究缺乏对形式化机制如何维持市场稳定性及其对抗攻击鲁棒性的系统探究。
AI.method: 构建多智能体市场模拟环境，18个LLM代理（DeepSeek-V3）在受限社交网络中进行交易；实验分两阶段：阶段一在8种机制条件下进行200轮渐进式troll注入比较；阶段二对最优机制Mediation进行迭代提示优化的LLM驱动对抗攻击。
AI.result: Mediation是表现最佳的机制；最优攻击（v6版）使诚实代理效用下降13.3%，但无法使市场崩溃；Mediation在持续对抗压力下仍能恢复。
AI.conclusion: 对抗鲁棒性定义为机制在优化攻击下维持诚实代理正效用的能力；Mediation具有鲁棒性——可被弯曲但不可被打破。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。该文的多智能体协作与对抗鲁棒性机制可直接迁移至遥感领域的分布式卫星集群协同任务规划。具体方案：(1) 将Mediation机制用于遥感卫星星座的自主任务分配，解决多星间的资源竞争与自私行为；(2) 将对抗troll模型用于模拟遥感中的恶意干扰（如虚假数据注入、通信阻塞），测试星间协作协议的鲁棒性；(3) 利用LLM代理的通信能力实现遥感系统的自然语言指令协商，提升人机协同效率。

title: Swapping Faces, Saving Features: A Dual-Purpose Pipeline for Pedestrian Privacy in ITS
summary: Large-scale and diverse datasets are needed to train AI models to take real-time decisions for autonomous vehicles (AVs), an intelligent transportation system (ITS) application. Pedestrian intention and trajectory prediction are critical models used in AVs, requiring datasets involving diverse pedestrian images. Unrestricted access to these datasets imposes serious security risks, like identity theft and pedestrian tracking. The challenge is to apply privacy preservation procedures while maintaining the image attributes needed to train the models. Existing privacy methods may preserve the pedestrian's privacy, but degrade the image usability, which hinders the models' effectiveness. This work's focus is to implement a five-stage pipeline to protect pedestrians' privacy through face swapping while keeping the essential facial attributes intact. It should be tailored to satisfy the privacy needs of the Egy-DRiVeS dataset. Moreover, Roop and Ghost-v2 face-swapping models are evaluated. Provenly, Roop outperforms Ghost-v2 in various aspects, as will be discussed. Consequently, Roop is the face-swapping model to be used in the pipeline to strike the balance between pedestrian privacy via identity concealment and data usability via facial attribute preservation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个五阶段流水线，通过人脸交换技术保护自动驾驶数据集中行人的隐私，在隐藏身份的同时保留面部属性以保持数据可用性，并在Egy-DRiVeS数据集上评估了Roop和Ghost-v2两种模型，结果表明Roop表现更优。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要大规模行人图像数据集来训练行人意图和轨迹预测模型，但公开这些数据集会带来身份盗窃和行人追踪等严重安全风险。现有隐私保护方法在保护隐私的同时会降低图像可用性，影响模型效果。因此需要一种既能保护行人隐私又不损害数据可用性的方法。
AI.method: 实现一个五阶段流水线，通过人脸交换技术保护行人隐私。具体评估了Roop和Ghost-v2两种人脸交换模型，选择Roop作为流水线中的核心组件，在隐藏身份的同时保留关键面部属性。
AI.result: Roop模型在各方面均优于Ghost-v2，能够在保护行人隐私（身份隐藏）和数据可用性（面部属性保留）之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: Roop人脸交换模型被选为五阶段流水线的核心组件，能够有效满足Egy-DRiVeS数据集的隐私需求，在保护行人隐私的同时保持图像数据的可用性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。遥感图像中常包含行人、车辆等敏感目标，可借鉴本文的五阶段人脸交换流水线思路，对遥感图像中的人脸或可识别目标进行脱敏处理（如目标置换或模糊化），在保护隐私的同时保留遥感图像的空间结构、光谱特征等关键属性，用于训练目标检测和轨迹预测模型。但遥感图像分辨率通常较低，人脸区域较小，人脸交换效果可能受限，需针对性调整交换算法。

title: SolarChain-Eval: A Physics-Constrained Benchmark for Trustworthy Economic Agents in Decentralized Energy Markets
summary: As agentic AI systems are increasingly applied to cyber-physical environments, their evaluation requires assessment of both task performance and trustworthiness. In decentralized energy markets, autonomous agents may improve market utility, but may also exploit invalid physical data, create artificial liquidity, and produce unstable governance decisions. Therefore, we propose SolarChain-Eval, a physics-constrained benchmark for evaluating trustworthy economic agents. It formulates market governance as a Gymnasium-compatible Markov Decision Process, where agents make hourly decisions. SolarChain-Eval evaluates each policy across multiple dimensions, including market utility, physical safety, slippage, action smoothness, spatial fairness, and auditability. To support agentic evaluation, SolarChain-Eval incorporates an LLM-based Planner/Auditor layer. The Planner defines episode-level action bounds and audit rules, while the Auditor reviews and revises high-risk actions. All interventions are recorded through structured logs, including trigger signals, proposed actions, revised actions, and audit rationales. Experiments with static, random, myopic, RL, and RL+LLM policies reveal a clear utility-safety trade-off. RL agents improve market utility but can still produce unsafe behavior. When the physics penalty is removed, reward-maximizing agents exploit invalid generation and increase artificial liquidity. The LLM Planner/Auditor improves auditability and mitigates selected risks, but it cannot fully compensate for a misspecified reward function. These results indicate that trustworthy agentic AI evaluation requires both physical constraints and transparent intervention traces. We release data and code as open access on GitHub for replicability.

AI.tldr: 提出SolarChain-Eval基准，用于评估去中心化能源市场中可信经济智能体的表现，包含物理约束、LLM规划/审计层，实验揭示效用-安全性权衡，纯RL智能体可能利用无效数据，LLM审计可缓解但无法完全弥补奖励函数缺陷。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体AI系统在信息物理环境中的广泛应用，现有评估方法仅关注任务性能而忽略可信度。在去中心化能源市场中，自主智能体可能利用无效物理数据、制造人工流动性并产生不稳定的治理决策，亟需一个兼顾性能与可信度的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建SolarChain-Eval基准，将市场治理建模为Gymnasium兼容的马尔可夫决策过程，智能体每小时做决策。集成基于LLM的规划器/审计器：规划器定义幕级动作边界和审计规则，审计器审查并修正高风险动作。评估维度包括市场效用、物理安全、滑点、动作平滑性、空间公平性和可审计性。所有干预通过结构化日志记录（触发信号、提议动作、修正动作、审计理由）。
AI.result: 静态、随机、短视、RL和RL+LLM策略的实验表明存在明确的效用-安全权衡。RL智能体能提升市场效用但仍可能产生不安全行为。移除物理惩罚后，奖励最大化智能体会利用无效发电并增加人工流动性。LLM规划器/审计器提升了可审计性并缓解了选定风险，但无法完全弥补错误指定的奖励函数。
AI.conclusion: 可信智能体AI评估需要物理约束和透明的干预痕迹二者兼备。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该框架可直接迁移至遥感观测资源分配场景：将能源市场智能体替换为遥感卫星任务调度智能体，物理约束对应卫星能源预算、存储容量和通信窗口；LLM规划器/审计器可用于审查高风险调度决策（如突发灾害观测任务优先级调整）；评估维度中的物理安全对应卫星健康状态，空间公平性对应地理覆盖均衡性，可审计性对应任务调度日志可追溯。需调整奖励函数以反映遥感数据价值而非经济效用。

title: Track2Map: Online Deformable SLAM with Motion-Aware Pose Optimization in Robotic Surgery
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2026. This is the submitted version prior to peer review. The final authenticated version will be available on SpringerLink
summary: Gaussian splatting is the current state-of-the-art for dense, deformable 3D anatomy reconstruction in robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery (RAMIS); however, most pipelines are offline and depend on accurate camera trajectory priors (often from robotic kinematics), limiting applicability when priors are missing or noisy. To address these limitations, we propose Track2Map, an online 3D Gaussian Splatting pipeline that jointly optimizes camera trajectory and 3D deformable scene representation directly from surgical video. Track2Map is therefore capable of robust 3D reconstructions when camera trajectory priors are either absent or noisy, and due to its online nature it effectively works as a Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM) method. To stabilize optimization in the presence of tissue motion and ambiguous visual cues, we introduce a track-anchored deformation initialization using dense 2D point tracks. Track statistics are further utilized to disentangle camera motion from scene deformation by detecting static camera periods and reducing drift during incremental mapping. Experiments on StereoMIS show improved reconstruction quality and camera trajectory against competing SLAM methods, as well as compared to non-SLAM methods that utilize camera trajectory priors. The code is available at https://track2map.github.io/.

AI.tldr: Track2Map是一个在线3D高斯溅射管道，无需相机轨迹先验即可同时优化相机轨迹和3D可变形场景，适用于机器人辅助微创手术中的密集变形解剖重建，在StereoMIS上优于现有SLAM和非SLAM方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯溅射的RAMIS解剖重建方法多为离线管道，依赖准确的相机轨迹先验（如机器人运动学），当先验缺失或含噪声时适用性受限。本文旨在解决这一问题，提出无需先验的在线联合优化方法。
AI.method: 1）提出Track2Map在线3D高斯溅射管道，联合优化相机轨迹和3D可变形场景表示；2）引入轨迹锚定变形初始化，利用密集2D点轨迹稳定组织运动和模糊视觉线索下的优化；3）利用轨迹统计量检测静态相机周期并减少增量建图中的漂移，从而解耦相机运动与场景变形。
AI.result: 在StereoMIS数据集上，Track2Map在重建质量和相机轨迹估计方面均优于对比的SLAM方法，也优于使用相机轨迹先验的非SLAM方法。
AI.conclusion: Track2Map作为一种在线SLAM方法，能够在无先验或先验含噪声的情况下实现鲁棒的3D重建，有效拓展了高斯溅射在RAMIS中的实用性和适用范围。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文的在线联合优化相机轨迹与3D可变形场景的思想可直接应用于遥感领域的动态场景重建（如植被生长、冰川移动监测）。具体方案：1）将密集2D点轨迹锚定初始化迁移至遥感视频序列，用于稳定多时相卫星或无人机影像中的地表形变解算；2）利用轨迹统计量区分平台运动与地表动态变化（如云层/车辆运动），减少增量建图漂移；3）改进高斯溅射以适应遥感中大尺度场景与多模态数据（如光学+SAR）。

title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: In long-horizon tasks, decision-relevant state is often scattered across an expanding trajectory, while the action agent must surface it and act. As trajectories grow, task requirements, environment facts, prior attempts, diagnoses, and open subgoals can be buried in the context window or pushed beyond it, failing to influence decisions when needed. We call this failure mode "behavioral state decay". We study memory as an active intervention mechanism rather than passive retrieval. A separate memory agent runs alongside an unmodified action agent, updating a structured memory bank from the recent trajectory and deciding whether to inject a memory-grounded reminder or remain silent. The module is plug-and-play with frontier action agents and existing agent harnesses. Across Terminal-Bench 2.0 and $τ^2$-Bench, it improves pass@1 for both weaker and stronger action agents, with gains of +8.3 pp on Terminal-Bench and +6.8 pp on $τ^2$-Bench. Ablations show that selective intervention outperforms passive bank exposure, always-on injection, advisor-only guidance, and general retrieval. As an early step toward open-weight memory policies, we train Qwen3.5-27B on SETA using SFT and GRPO, improving validation reward and achieving partial transfer to Terminal-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"行为状态衰减"问题——在长程任务中，决策相关信息随轨迹增长而分散，可能被埋没在上下文窗口之外，导致行动代理无法及时获取关键信息。为此，作者设计了一个独立的记忆代理模块，它作为主动干预机制，与未经修改的行动代理并行运行，维护结构化记忆库，并决定是否注入记忆提醒。该模块即插即用，在Terminal-Bench 2.0和τ²-Bench上分别提升了+8.3和+6.8个百分点的pass@1。消融实验证明选择性干预优于被动暴露、始终注入、仅顾问指导等方案。此外，作者通过SFT和GRPO训练Qwen3.5-27B作为开放权重记忆策略的早期探索。
AI.motivation: 长程任务中，行动代理的上下文窗口有限，导致决策相关信息（任务要求、环境事实、先前尝试、诊断结果、开放子目标）随轨迹增长而被忽略或丢失，出现"行为状态衰减"问题，影响最终任务完成率。
AI.method: 设计一个独立的记忆代理模块：1) 从近期轨迹中更新结构化记忆库；2) 决定是否注入记忆提醒或保持静默。该模块即插即用，不修改底层行动代理。训练方面，在SETA数据集上对Qwen3.5-27B进行SFT和GRPO训练以学习记忆策略。
AI.result: Terminal-Bench 2.0上pass@1提升+8.3个百分点，τ²-Bench上提升+6.8个百分点。消融实验证明选择性干预方案优于被动暴露、始终注入、仅顾问指导及通用检索等方法。基于Qwen3.5-27B的GRPO训练提升了验证奖励，并部分迁移到Terminal-Bench。
AI.conclusion: 主动记忆干预机制能够有效缓解长程任务中的行为状态衰减问题，记忆代理模块作为一种独立、即插即用的组件，能够显著提升现有行动代理的性能，且选择性干预策略优于各类基线方法。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1) 遥感长时序分析任务（如变化检测、时序分类）中，中间推理结果和中间分类状态同样面临"状态衰减"，可借鉴该记忆代理机制，在遥感解译流程中维护结构化的地物变迁记忆库；2) 遥感大模型（如地理空间基础模型）在推理长链时，可引入记忆代理主动注入历史观测提醒，避免遗忘早期波段特征或区域上下文；3) 多时相卫星影像的渐进式分析中，该方案可作为插件式记忆增强模块，无需重新训练底层遥感模型。

title: DeltaV: Thinking with Visual State Updates in Unified Large Multimodal Models
summary: Current Unified Large Multimodal Models (ULMMs) support interleaved multimodal reasoning through textual reasoning and intermediate visual states, but typically generate each visual state as a full image. This full-image generation paradigm introduces substantial visual-token redundancy and dilutes supervision on sparse yet reasoning-critical state transitions. We propose DeltaV, a ULMM that replaces full-image generation with visual updates. Conditioned on historical visual states, DeltaV incrementally predicts compact update tokens that capture the visual changes across reasoning steps, avoiding repeated modeling of unchanged content. To align the token budget of each update with the magnitude of visual change, DeltaV introduces a temporal similarity (TSIM) Router, which stops allocating tokens once the marginal reconstruction gain falls below a threshold. To support more diverse and generalizable reasoning, we further construct StructCoT, a large-scale interleaved multimodal reasoning dataset with 1.05M samples spanning 44 task domains. Experiments show that the visual-update paradigm reduces newly generated visual tokens by 55.6\% on average without compromising reconstruction fidelity, and improves multimodal reasoning by 3.3\% over full-image generation. Trained with StructCoT and large-scale multimodal data, DeltaV-2B further outperforms substantially larger open-source models by 8.4\% on in-domain multimodal reasoning evaluations and surpasses the comparable-scale Qwen3-VL-2B by 5.9\% on external multimodal reasoning and understanding benchmarks. Code, models, and StructCoT will be released at https://github.com/Pengjie-W/DeltaV.

AI.tldr: 提出DeltaV，一种通过视觉更新（visual-update）代替全图生成的大多模态模型，利用紧凑更新令牌和时序相似性路由器减少视觉令牌冗余，并构建了105万样本的StructCoT数据集，在节省55.6%令牌的同时提升多模态推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有统一大多模态模型（ULMMs）在交错多模态推理中每步生成完整图像，导致视觉令牌高度冗余，且对稀疏但关键的推理状态变化监督不足。
AI.method: 1) 提出DeltaV，以历史视觉状态为条件，增量预测紧凑的更新令牌（update tokens）捕获视觉变化，避免重复建模不变内容。2) 设计时序相似性（TSIM）路由器，根据边际重建增益阈值动态停止令牌分配。3) 构建StructCoT数据集（105万样本，44个任务领域），支持多样化推理。
AI.result: 新生成的视觉令牌平均减少55.6%而不损失重建保真度；多模态推理准确率比全图生成提升3.3%；DeltaV-2B在域内评估上比大规模开源模型高8.4%，在外部基准上比同规模Qwen3-VL-2B高5.9%。
AI.conclusion: 视觉更新范式能有效压缩冗余视觉令牌，同时增强多模态推理能力，为高效ULMMs提供了新方向。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域时序影像（如变化检测、多时相分类）中存在大量冗余信息（如不变地物）。DeltaV的视觉更新范式可直接迁移：对历史遥感影像编码，仅预测变化区域的紧凑令牌，TSIM路由器根据变化幅度动态分配令牌，显著降低计算开销。StructCoT的多领域推理能力可用于遥感场景理解（如灾害前后变化推理、多时相土地利用分类），但需补充遥感专用数据微调。

title: The Illusion of Equivalency: Statistical Characterization of Quantization Effects in LLMs
summary: Post-training quantization is widely used to deploy large language models in resource-constrained settings, yet its evaluation relies almost exclusively on accuracy and perplexity. We show that these metrics fail to capture behavioral changes induced by quantization. We introduce correctness agreement, a decision-level metric that measures overlap in correct predictions between a base model and its quantized variants, independent of absolute accuracy. Across multiple models and quantization schemes from 8-bit to 2-bit, we find that behavioral divergence emerges under moderate quantization even when task performance appears preserved. To explain this effect, we analyze quantization as a structural operator on attention weights and quantify layer-wise distortions using statistical and distributional measures. Our results reveal non-linear breakpoints at low bit-widths and show that query and key projections are consistently more sensitive than value and output projections. These findings expose an illusion of equivalence between base and quantized models and motivate behavioral evaluation beyond conventional performance metrics.

AI.tldr: 论文发现标准量化评估指标（准确率、困惑度）无法捕捉量化引起的模型行为变化，并提出正确性一致性（correctness agreement）作为决策级度量。实验表明，即使在任务性能看似保持的中等量化下，行为分歧已经出现，揭示了基模型与量化模型之间的“等价幻觉”。
AI.motivation: 现有的后训练量化评估仅依赖准确率和困惑度，但这些指标无法反映量化带来的行为变化，可能导致对量化模型性能的误判。
AI.method: 提出正确性一致性（correctness agreement）作为决策级度量，衡量基模型与量化变体在正确预测上的重叠程度；同时将量化视为注意力权重的结构算子，使用统计和分布度量量化逐层失真。
AI.result: 在多种模型和量化方案（8-bit到2-bit）下，中等量化时行为分歧已出现；低比特位宽下存在非线性断点；query和key投影比value和output投影对量化更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 传统性能指标低估了量化对模型行为的影响，基模型与量化模型之间存在等价幻觉，需要在常规指标之外引入行为评估。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该论文提出的正确性一致性度量可直接应用于遥感大模型的量化评估，检测量化后遥感图像分类、分割、目标检测等任务的决策行为变化。同时，对注意力层投影敏感性的分析可指导遥感模型量化时的层自适应保护策略，例如对query/key投影分配更高比特位宽，对value/output投影使用更激进的量化，以在压缩率与遥感任务性能间取得更好平衡。

title: Predicting Viticulture Potential through an Ensemble of U-Net and a Geospatial Foundation Model
comment: To be published in CLEF 2026 Working Notes
summary: Determining agricultural potential is fundamental to sustainable land management and agricultural planning. Remote sensing data is increasingly valuable as an avenue for agricultural potential due to the cost of traditional methods (surveys, in-situ measurements, soil testing, etc). ImageCLEF AI4Agri 2026: Subtask 1 is concerned with the prediction of viticulture potential in Southern France. The DS@GT ARC's submission for Subtask 1 introduces an ensemble of U-Net and a Geospatial Foundation Model (Prithvi-2.0). Our best model achieved a $\pm$1 accuracy of 68.32 on the leaderboard, ranking 2nd among 7 teams. The implementation for this work is publicly available at https://github.com/dsgt-arc/imageclef-ai4agri-2026 .

AI.tldr: 本文针对ImageCLEF AI4Agri 2026: Subtask 1（法国南部葡萄栽培潜力预测任务），提出了一个集成U-Net和地理空间基础模型Prithvi-2.0的集成方法，在排行榜上以68.32的±1准确率获得第二名（共7支队伍）。
AI.motivation: 传统农业潜力评估方法（调查、实地测量、土壤测试等）成本高昂，遥感数据为农业潜力评估提供了更具成本效益的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出U-Net与地理空间基础模型Prithvi-2.0的集成方法（ensemble），结合卷积神经网络和预训练地理空间模型的优势进行葡萄栽培潜力预测。
AI.result: 最佳模型在排行榜上达到68.32的±1准确率，在7支参赛队伍中排名第二。
AI.conclusion: U-Net与地理空间基础模型Prithvi-2.0的集成策略在葡萄栽培潜力预测任务中表现优异，验证了基础模型在农业遥感应用中的有效性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。改进方案：（1）可引入针对农业场景的域自适应或微调策略，进一步提升Prithvi在特定作物区域的表征能力；（2）尝试其他地理空间基础模型（如SpectralGPT、SatMAE）与U-Net集成，进行跨模型对比；（3）在U-Net中引入注意力机制或多尺度特征融合模块，增强对异质农业景观的建模能力；（4）可扩展到多时相遥感数据，利用时序信息提升潜力预测的鲁棒性；（5）将方法迁移至中国或其他地区的葡萄栽培或作物潜力评估任务，验证泛化能力。

title: Workflow as Knowledge: Semantic Persistence for LLM-Mediated Workflows
summary:
Large language model (LLM) applications increasingly use explicit workflows for tool use, retrieval, branching, checkpointing, and human approval. Existing workflow systems already address many execution concerns. This paper proposes a Lisp-inspired but language-independent conceptual model: symbolic forms, object identity, and live-image thinking are used as explanatory lenses, not implementation commitments. In this model, workflow definitions, workflow instances, inference records, context snapshots, and dependency relations are represented as persistent knowledge objects in a shared knowledge substrate. Its central semantic distinction is between derive and infer: derive is deterministic computation over available state; infer is mediated LLM judgment under declared context and executor-controlled capability policy.
  The result is a preliminary conceptual account of semantic persistence: workflows do not merely produce knowledge and leave traces, but can themselves be represented as inspectable, resumable, and reviewable knowledge objects, while formal transition semantics remain future work.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种受Lisp启发的、语言无关的概念模型，将工作流定义、实例、推理记录、上下文快照和依赖关系表示为共享知识基质中的持久化知识对象。核心语义区分在于derive（确定性计算）和infer（大模型判断），使工作流本身成为可检查、可恢复、可审查的知识对象。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM应用的工作流系统解决了执行层面的问题，但缺乏统一的、语义上持久化的概念模型来将工作流本身视为可检查、可恢复和可审查的知识对象，而非仅仅是执行痕迹。
AI.method: 借鉴Lisp的符号形式、对象标识和活镜像思维，提出一种语言无关的概念模型。核心是derive（基于可用状态的确定性计算）与infer（在声明上下文中由执行器控制能力策略的大模型判断）的语义区分，所有工作流相关对象均表示为共享知识基质中的持久化知识对象。
AI.result: 初步建立了语义持久化的概念框架，使得工作流不仅仅是产生知识和留下痕迹的过程，其本身也成为可检查、可恢复、可审查的知识对象。但形式化转移语义尚未完成。
AI.conclusion: 该概念模型为LLM工作流提供了一种新的知识表示视角，将工作流本身持久化为可操作的知识对象，为后续形式化语义研究奠定了基础。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域涉及大量多模态数据处理和决策工作流（如影像预处理→特征提取→分类→变化检测），该概念模型可将每个处理步骤封装为知识对象，实现流程的持久化记录、可恢复执行和审计追溯。具体方案：(1) 将derive映射为遥感确定性算法步骤（如NDVI计算），infer映射为大模型驱动的语义判断（如地物分类）；(2) 每个遥感处理中间结果作为上下文快照持久化，便于调试和回溯；(3) 多源遥感协同分析中，依赖关系管理可用于优化并行处理流水线。

title: VEGAS: Human-Aligned Video Caption Evaluation via Gaze
summary: Vision-language models excel at video captioning, yet typically generate descriptions that fail to capture individual viewers' attention. We propose VEGAS (Video caption Evaluation via GAze Score), a training-free metric that leverages test-time gaze to sample personalized, attention-aligned text. It is a cross-modal, information-theoretic metric that quantifies how well a candidate caption matches a viewer's focus. To evaluate VEGAS, we curate a dataset of egocentric activities and instructional slides paired with synchronized gaze and reference annotations. We then select captions based on VEGAS via rejection sampling without model retraining. Experiments show that VEGAS-selected captions align significantly better with human focus and improve downstream caption-to-video retrieval, demonstrating the practical utility of incorporating viewer attention during inference.

AI.tldr: VEGAS提出了一种基于视线注视分数的训练无关视频字幕评估指标，通过测试时注视采样实现个性化、注意力对齐的字幕生成，无需模型重训练即可提升字幕与人类关注的匹配度及下游检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在视频字幕生成中虽然表现优异，但生成的描述无法捕获不同观看者的个性化注意力焦点，缺乏将测试时注视信息纳入字幕评估与选择的手段。
AI.method: 提出VEGAS指标，是一种基于交叉模态信息论的训练无关度量，通过测试时视线注视分数对候选字幕进行采样（拒绝采样），选择与观看者注意力对齐的字幕。同时构建了第一人称日常活动和教学幻灯片两类带同步注视与参考标注的数据集。
AI.result: VEGAS选出的字幕与人类关注显著对齐，并在下游字幕到视频检索任务中取得性能提升，展示了在推理阶段融入观看者注意力的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 将测试时注视作为个性化信号引入视频字幕评估，无需重训练即可实现注意力对齐，为视频理解中人机交互提供新思路。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：(1) 遥感视频字幕生成中引入VEGAS，利用专家观察遥感影像时的眼动注视数据作为个性化注意力信号，自动生成更关注特定地物（如变化区域、异常目标）的描述；(2) 在遥感视频检索任务中，结合注视对齐字幕提升检索精度；(3) 将VEGAS扩展为多模态遥感评估指标，用于衡量不同观察者对遥感场景的关注差异。

title: AUTOPILOT VQA: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Incident-Centric Dashcam Understanding
summary: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models, Large Language Models, and Multimodal Large Language Models have improved autonomous driving tasks such as scene understanding, decision making, trajectory prediction, and visual question answering. However, evaluating whether these models can reliably reason about safety-critical incidents remains challenging. To address this gap, we present AUTOPILOT-VQA, an incident-centric visual question answering benchmark for dashcam video understanding. The dataset evaluates different systems through structured questions designed around real-world driving incidents and near-incidents. The benchmark covers diverse safety-relevant categories, including weather and lighting conditions, traffic environment, road layout, road surface state, signage, involved entities, accident occurrence, impact location, and avoidability-related reasoning. By requiring models to answer grounded questions about both contextual scene properties and event-level incident details, AUTOPILOT-VQA moves beyond object recognition toward temporally grounded, safety-aware reasoning.
