The dataset is released as part of the AUTOPILOT CVPR 2026 competition and provides a standardized benchmark for assessing the reliability of autonomous driving systems in different scenarios. Our benchmark support developments for more interpretable, robust, and safety-conscious vision-language systems for real-world autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: AUTOPILOT-VQA 是一个面向行车记录仪视频的、以事故为中心的视觉问答基准数据集，用于评估视觉-语言模型在自动驾驶安全关键场景中的推理能力。该基准涵盖天气、交通环境、道路布局、路面状态、标志、交通参与者、事故发生、撞击位置及可避免性推理等多类安全相关类别，并作为 AUTOPILOT CVPR 2026 竞赛的一部分发布。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在自动驾驶场景理解、决策、轨迹预测等任务上取得了进展，但缺乏评估其在安全关键事故中进行可靠推理能力的标准化基准。作者旨在填补这一空白，推动更可解释、鲁棒且安全感知的视觉-语言系统发展。
AI.method: 构建了一个以事故为中心的视觉问答基准数据集，基于真实行车记录仪视频中的事故和近事故场景，设计结构化问题，涵盖场景属性（如天气、光照、道路布局）和事件级别事故细节（如事故类型、撞击位置、可避免性推理）两大类。
AI.result: 该基准能够区分不同模型在安全感知推理上的表现差异，推动模型从简单的目标识别向具有时间因果关系的、安全感知的推理能力发展。作为 CVPR 2026 竞赛的一部分发布，提供标准化评估。
AI.conclusion: AUTOPILOT-VQA 为评估自动驾驶系统在多样化场景中的可靠性提供了标准化基准，有助于开发更可解释、鲁棒且安全感知的视觉-语言系统，推动自动驾驶安全评估的发展。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。遥感领域中同样存在大量安全关键场景（如灾害监测、交通事故检测、航道异常等），可将 AUTOPILOT-VQA 的 incident-centric VQA 框架迁移至遥感视频理解：1）构建基于遥感视频（如卫星视频、无人机航拍）的事故/异常事件 VQA 基准，涵盖天气条件、地形地貌、建筑物状态、移动目标轨迹等遥感特有属性；2）借鉴其结构化问题设计思想，评估遥感视觉-语言模型在灾害响应、目标跟踪异常检测等场景中的时空推理能力；3）将可避免性推理等因果判断机制引入遥感变化检测与风险评估任务。

title: Cognitive-structured Multimodal Agent for Multimodal Understanding, Generation, and Editing
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 8 tables. Project page: https://caseclose.github.io/cma-harness/ Code: https://github.com/caseclose/cma-harness
summary: Recent unified multimodal models show a single architecture can jointly perform vision/language understanding and image generation/editing. However, they repeatedly feed all historical visual and textual inputs into a shared context window, limiting long-horizon multimodal dialogue due to visual token explosion and unreliable cross-turn referencing. We propose a Cognitive-structured Multimodal Agent that externalizes visual information into an Episodic Visual Memory and selectively reactivates relevant episodes during reasoning. The agent consists of a Perceptual Abstraction Engine for structured visual abstraction, a Cognitive Retrieval Engine for cross-turn memory retrieval, and a Multimodal Executive Controller for autonomous task inference and action planning. To address the lack of turn-level retrieval supervision in existing datasets, we develop a Unified Scenario Engine that programmatically generates structured multi-turn conversations with fine-grained retrieval annotations, enabling reinforcement learning to optimize abstraction and retrieval policies. We also construct a long-horizon visual-dialogue benchmark stratified by difficulty to evaluate episodic visual recall. Our 8B agent achieves 91.4% retrieval accuracy over 20-turn sessions, surpassing 32B baselines by +8.2% while nearly halving per-turn inference time (23.1s -> 12.7s). We further present the Cognitive-structured Multimodal Agent Harness (CMA-Harness), a tool-augmented deployment of the same cognitive structure integrating persistent multimodal memory, web access, image generation/editing/composition tools, and OpenAI-compatible serving. Structured memory and modular decision-making offer a more scalable, efficient paradigm for long-horizon multimodal agents than monolithic parameter scaling. Code: https://github.com/caseclose/cma-harness ; Project page: https://caseclose.github.io/cma-harness/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种具有认知结构的记忆增强多模态智能体（CMA），通过情景视觉记忆、感知抽象引擎和认知检索引擎，解决了长程多模态对话中视觉令牌爆炸和跨轮引用不可靠的问题。8B模型在20轮对话中达到91.4%的检索精度，超越32B基线8.2%，推理时间减半。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型将所有历史视觉和文本输入反复塞入共享上下文窗口，导致长程多模态对话中视觉令牌数量爆炸（visual token explosion）以及跨轮引用不可靠（unreliable cross-turn referencing），缺乏高效的长程记忆机制。
AI.method: 提出认知结构化的多模态智能体（CMA），包括：1）感知抽象引擎（Perceptual Abstraction Engine）实现结构化视觉抽象；2）认知检索引擎（Cognitive Retrieval Engine）实现跨轮记忆检索；3）多模态执行控制器（Multimodal Executive Controller）实现自主任务推理与动作规划。此外，设计了统一场景引擎（Unified Scenario Engine）程序化生成带细粒度检索标注的多轮对话，并通过强化学习优化抽象和检索策略。
AI.result: 8B参数模型在20轮对话中达到91.4%的检索准确率，超越32B基线模型8.2%，每轮推理时间从23.1秒降至12.7秒（减少近一半）。
AI.conclusion: 结构化记忆与模块化决策相比单一参数规模扩展提供了更具可扩展性、更高效率的长程多模态智能体范式。同时发布了工具增强的部署框架CMA-Harness。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域存在大量长时序、多模态（光学/SAR/高光谱/文本标注）的地理解译任务，CMA的结构化记忆机制可直接迁移：1）感知抽象引擎可用于遥感图像的层次化特征提取（地物分类、变化检测）；2）认知检索引擎可跨时相检索历史遥感影像中的关键变化区域；3）多模态执行控制器可规划"查询-检索-分析-报告"的自主解译流程。改进方向：需针对遥感影像的大尺度、多波段特性调整视觉抽象粒度，并构建遥感专用的情景记忆标注数据集。

title: Using AI-based Learning Assistants in Higher Education: A Large-Scale Descriptive Analysis
summary: In this study, we present a large-scale descriptive analysis of the use of an AI-based learning assistant (Syntea) in higher education. Based on objective log data from 77,543 students enrolled in distance studies, we examine usage patterns across gender, age group, study cluster, degree, and study mode. To date, existing research on educational chatbots has largely relied on comparatively small samples and self-reported survey data, while large-scale evidence on actual usage behavior remains limited. Our findings show that Syntea is already embedded in the study routines of many learners, but that usage differs across demographic and structural contexts. By identifying these patterns, our study provides an empirical basis for the further development of AI-based learning support and contributes a large-scale analysis of educational chatbot usage in higher education.

AI.tldr: 基于77,543名远程教育学生的客观日志数据，对AI学习助手Syntea在高等教育中的使用模式进行大规模描述性分析，发现其已嵌入学习者学习常规，但使用情况因人口统计和结构性背景而异。
AI.motivation: 现有教育聊天机器人研究多依赖小样本和自报告调查数据，缺乏基于客观日志数据的大规模使用行为证据。
AI.method: 基于77,543名远程教育学生的客观日志数据，按性别、年龄组、学习集群、学位和学习模式分析使用模式。
AI.result: Syntea已嵌入许多学习者的学习常规，但使用情况在不同人口统计和结构性背景下存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究为AI学习支持系统的进一步发展提供了实证基础，并贡献了高等教育中教育聊天机器人使用的大规模分析。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。该研究的大规模日志数据分析方法可直接迁移到遥感教育领域：1) 分析遥感专业学生使用AI辅助学习工具（如遥感影像解译助手）的行为模式；2) 按遥感学科细分方向（摄影测量、雷达、高光谱等）分层分析使用差异；3) 结合学生成绩与工具使用日志，优化遥感教学中的AI支持策略。若本文为遥感论文，可改进：引入更多交互行为特征（如提问类型、会话时长）进行细粒度分析，并加入纵向追踪设计。

title: CT-CLIP Representations for Multimodal Lung Cancer Survival Prediction
summary: Accurate prognosis prediction is important for treatment planning in lung cancer, but deep learning-driven survival modelling is often limited by the scarcity of curated imaging cohorts with reliable outcome data. This study evaluates whether representations from a domain-specific foundation model can be used for multimodal survival prediction in data-constrained clinical settings. We assess the foundation model CT-CLIP as a feature extractor for pretreatment computed tomography images and clinical variables from 242 diagnosed lung cancer patients. The evaluation includes adaptation strategies based on frozen encoders, full fine-tuning, and low-rank adaptation, together with modality ablations and comparisons with clinical and multimodal baselines. The results show that a frozen CT-CLIP model combined with a trainable lightweight survival head outperforms the clinical baseline and achieves comparable or improved performance relative to other multimodal approaches, and separates patients into clinically meaningful high- and low-risk groups.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了领域特定的基础模型CT-CLIP在数据受限条件下用于肺癌多模态生存预测的效果。结果表明，冻结的CT-CLIP结合轻量级可训练生存头在性能上优于临床基线，与其他多模态方法相当或更优，并能有效区分高低风险患者群体。
AI.motivation: 深度学习驱动的生存模型常因缺乏带有可靠结局数据的影像队列而受限，因此需要探索在数据受限的临床环境中，是否可以利用领域特定的基础模型进行多模态生存预测。
AI.method: 使用CT-CLIP作为特征提取器，对242名肺癌患者的治疗前CT影像和临床变量进行处理；采用冻结编码器、全微调和低秩适配三种适应策略，并进行模态消融以及与临床和多模态基线的比较。
AI.result: 冻结的CT-CLIP模型结合可训练的轻量级生存头在性能上优于临床基线，与其他多模态方法相比表现相当或更优，并能将患者区分为具有临床意义的高风险和低风险组。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定的基础模型CT-CLIP在数据受限的临床场景下，能够有效提取CT影像特征用于多模态生存预测，为肺癌治疗规划提供支持。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临标注数据稀缺的问题，可借鉴该思路：利用遥感领域的基础模型（如SatMAE、SpectralGPT等）作为冻结的特征提取器，结合少量标注样本的轻量级预测头，完成土地利用分类、灾害评估等遥感任务。具体方案：(1) 使用遥感的预训练基础模型提取多光谱/SAR影像特征；(2) 结合地理空间元数据（类似临床变量）进行多模态融合；(3) 采用低秩适配或冻结编码器策略降低数据需求，在小样本场景下实现高效遥感智能解译。

title: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation
summary: Scientific ideas rarely start from a blank page. They inherit mechanisms, repair known limitations, and recombine pieces of earlier work, much like biological genomes. Current benchmarks still say little about whether AI systems can follow this inheritance structure. We present IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Bench), a benchmark for scientific lineage reasoning and lineage-grounded idea generation. IG-Bench is organized around the IdeaGene framework: each paper or proposal is represented as a set of minimal, typed, evidence-grounded Idea Genome objects, and a GenomeDiff aligns these objects to record inheritance, mutation, loss, external import, and novel insertion under six operational evolutionary dynamics. The benchmark contains 1,961 golden lineage traces, 1,085 curated Idea Genome objects, and 920 pairwise GenomeDiff records across 10 scientific domains. It supports two evaluations. IG-Exam (42 task types, 1,029 instances) tests closed-form lineage reasoning across Idea Genome abstraction, inheritance tracing, evolutionary reasoning, and lineage verification. IG-Arena evaluates generation with a lineage-conditioned Population-Evolution Score(PES), asking whether a proposal can be inserted as a coherent descendant of a given lineage population: it should inherit the right Idea Genome objects, vary meaningfully from nearby work, and offer selection value for future research. Experiments on 14 LLM-based scientists expose a compositional bottleneck. The strongest system reaches only 27.3% exact accuracy on lineage reasoning, and structured lineage context reshuffles system rankings rather than helping every participant uniformly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IdeaGene-Bench (IG-Bench)，一个评估AI系统在科学思想继承、重组与演化推理能力的基准。它包含1961条谱系轨迹、1085个Idea基因组对象和920个基因组差异记录，覆盖10个科学领域。通过IG-Exam（42种任务类型，1029个实例）和IG-Arena（基于谱系条件的人口-进化评分）两种评估方式，对14个LLM科学家进行测试，最强系统仅达27.3%的精确准确率，揭示了当前AI在科学谱系推理上的组合瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 科学思想的产生并非凭空而来，而是通过继承机制、修复已知局限、重组已有工作形成，类似生物基因组的进化过程。然而现有基准很少评估AI系统是否能够遵循这种继承结构，因此需要构建一个专门测试科学谱系推理和基于谱系的创意生成能力的基准。
AI.method: 提出IdeaGene框架，将每篇论文或提案表示为最小化、类型化、基于证据的Idea基因组对象集合，通过GenomeDiff对齐这些对象以记录继承、突变、丢失、外部引入和新型插入六种演化动力学。构建包含1961条金色谱系轨迹、1085个Idea基因组对象和920对GenomeDiff记录的基准，设计IG-Exam和IG-Arena两种评估方案。
AI.result: 在14个LLM科学家上的实验表明存在组合瓶颈。最强系统在谱系推理上仅达到27.3%的精确准确率，且结构化谱系上下文并未均匀地帮助所有参与者，反而重新排列了系统排名。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI系统在科学谱系推理与基于谱系的创意生成方面能力有限，存在显著的组合瓶颈，需要进一步研究以提升AI在科学思想继承与演化方面的能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域同样面临知识继承与创新的问题，可借鉴IdeaGene框架将遥感论文（如目标检测、变化检测、语义分割等方法）表示为Idea基因组对象，通过GenomeDiff追踪遥感方法的演化脉络（如从Faster R-CNN到YOLO系列再到DETR的继承与突变），构建遥感科学谱系基准来评估遥感领域的AI辅助科研能力。

title: Do Egocentric Video-Language Models Capture Both Hand- and Object-Centric Cues?
summary: Hand-object interaction (HOI) recognition requires capturing both hand manipulations and object transformations. However, existing video-language models often fall into shortcuts by relying on spurious correlations among hands, objects, or environmental context, rather than reasoning from the appearance and dynamics of hands and objects themselves. To address this limitation, we propose a new learning paradigm that combines (i) hand-object masked training, which enables robust reasoning from partial hand or object observations, and (ii) an HOI-dynamics-aware decoder that explicitly learns hand- and object-centric embeddings through auxiliary predictions of their locations and semantics, enhancing sensitivity to both cues. To systematically evaluate such cue-specific reasoning, we introduce Cue-Isolated HOI (CI-HOI), a new evaluation that assesses models' ability to predict actions from hand- and object-related cues independently. To enable CI-HOI, we curate the DEHOI testbed, which separates hand- and object-related observations for disentangled HOI evaluation through inpainting. Using DEHOI, we demonstrate both quantitatively and qualitatively that our training strategy exploits hand- and object-centric information more effectively than existing models. Our approach improves over existing models on DEHOI, standard action recognition, object state recognition, and even robot manipulation action recognition, leading to more robust HOI understanding.

AI.tldr: 针对手-物交互识别中模型依赖虚假相关性而非手/物自身线索的问题，提出手-物掩码训练与HOI动态感知解码器相结合的学习范式，并构建DEHOI测试集用于解耦评估，在多项任务上取得提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言模型在手-物交互识别中常利用手、物或环境背景间的虚假相关性（捷径学习），而非基于手和物体本身的表观与动态进行推理，导致鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: (1) 手-物掩码训练，使模型能从部分手或物体观测中鲁棒推理；(2) HOI动态感知解码器，通过辅助预测手和物体的位置与语义，显式学习以手为中心和以物体为中心的嵌入；(3) 构建CI-HOI评估框架与DEHOI测试集，通过修复技术分离手/物观测进行解耦评估。
AI.result: 在DEHOI测试集、标准动作识别、物体状态识别以及机器人操作动作识别上均优于现有模型，定量与定性分析表明所提训练策略更有效地利用了手和物体的中心化信息。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过显式建模手与物体的动态线索并避免捷径学习，实现了更鲁棒的HOI理解，在多个下游任务上展现了泛化能力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。遥感领域存在类似问题——模型易依赖场景背景（如地物纹理、光照）的虚假相关性而非目标本身的动态特征。可将手-物掩码训练迁移至遥感目标检测/跟踪中，对部分遮挡的车辆或船只进行掩码训练，迫使模型从残缺观测中推理；HOI动态感知解码器可类比设计为"目标-环境动态感知解码器"，辅助预测被遮挡目标的位置与语义。DEHOI的修复解耦评估思路也可用于构建遥感场景下的解耦测试集，评估模型对目标本身vs.上下文线索的真实依赖程度。

title: Beyond wheelchairs and blindfolds: Investigating disability stereotypes in T2I models with INCLUDE-BENCH
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) models have been shown to exhibit social biases. Prior work has mainly focused on gender, skin tone, and cultural representation within restricted occupational associations, and emerging benchmarks increasingly incorporate these dimensions. However, disability remains systematically underexplored. Current evaluation practices often fail to align with sociologically grounded definitions of stereotyping, limiting principled assessment of representational harms toward people with disabilities (PWD). To address this, we introduce INCLUDE-BENCH, the first large-scale benchmark for evaluating disability-related bias in T2I models. INCLUDE-BENCH comprises 119K generated images based on prompt design across multiple bias dimensions and both static and dynamic contexts. We evaluate 15 open-source and 2 closed-source models. Our key findings reveal that: (1) mobility-impaired and default disability prompts predominantly yield wheelchair depictions across all models; (2) disability-conditioned generations consistently exhibit less diversity; (3) stereotypical portrayals demonstrate stronger disability-text alignment; and (4) we introduce the Stereotype Content Model (SCM) Score, demonstrating that T2I models reflect real-world stereotypical associations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出INCLUDE-BENCH，首个大规模评估文生图模型在残疾相关偏见方面的基准。通过119K张生成图像，评估15个开源和2个闭源模型，发现残疾表征存在轮椅刻板印象、多样性不足、刻板形象与文本对齐更强等问题，并引入SCM评分验证模型反映真实世界刻板关联。
AI.motivation: 现有文生图模型偏见评估主要集中在性别、肤色和文化表征，而对残疾人群（PWD）的系统性偏见评估严重不足。同时，当前评估方法缺乏与社会学定义的刻板印象理论对齐，无法对PWD的表征危害进行有原则的评估。
AI.method: 构建INCLUDE-BENCH基准，包含119K张基于多重偏见维度（静态和动态上下文）提示设计生成的图像，评估15个开源和2个闭源模型。引入刻板印象内容模型（SCM）评分量化刻板关联。
AI.result: (1) 行动障碍和默认残疾提示在所有模型中主要生成轮椅描绘；(2) 残疾条件生成图像多样性显著更低；(3) 刻板印象化描绘与残疾文本对齐更强；(4) SCM评分证明模型反映真实世界的刻板印象关联。
AI.conclusion: 文生图模型在残疾表征方面存在系统性偏见，表现为刻板印象强化和多样性缺失。INCLUDE-BENCH为评估和缓解此类偏见提供了原则性框架与工具。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：65%。遥感领域常涉及特殊人群（如灾后救援中的残障人士）的图像生成。可将INCLUDE-BENCH的残疾偏见评估框架迁移至遥感文生图模型，评估模型在生成遥感场景中残障人士代表（如轮椅使用者在疏散场景）时的刻板印象。也可将SCM评分方法应用于遥感社会感知任务，量化模型对特定群体（如边缘社区）的空间表征偏差。

title: Whareformer: Learning to Track What is Where in Long Egocentric Videos
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Webpage: https://jacobchalk.github.io/Whareformer/
summary:
The recently established 'Out of Sight, Not out of Mind' (OSNOM) task for egocentric videos focuses on tracking objects that are moved by the camera wearer, online, maintaining knowledge of instance locations throughout the video even when they leave the field of view or become heavily occluded. In this paper, we propose the first learning-based solution to the OSNOM task: Whareformer, a transformer-based model with two components: an updatable memory of established tracks and a track assignment module that associates observations with existing tracks in a feed-forward manner. Whareformer jointly reasons over evolving object appearance (what) and updated 3D location (where), and employs a dedicated New Track token to reason about novel objects.
  Thanks to its design choices of using relative distances and evolving track representations, Whareformer is trained on a small set of 56 videos but achieves SOTA performance on 260 long test videos from three datasets: EPIC-KITCHENS-100 (unseen videos), IT3DEgo, and HD-EPIC, with significant absolute improvements over prior work.

AI.tldr: 提出首个基于学习的OSNOM任务解决方案Whareformer，利用Transformer架构和可更新记忆模块，在少量训练数据上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: OSNOM任务（跟踪被摄像头佩戴者移动的物体，即使物体离开视野或被严重遮挡）此前缺乏基于学习的方法，现有方案性能有限。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的Whareformer，包含两个组件：(1) 可更新的已建立轨迹记忆；(2) 前馈式轨迹分配模块。联合推理物体外观（what）和更新的3D位置（where），并使用专用New Track token处理新物体。
AI.result: 仅用56个视频训练，在260个长测试视频上达到SOTA性能，涵盖EPIC-KITCHENS-100（未见视频）、IT3DEgo和HD-EPIC三个数据集，相比先前工作有显著绝对提升。
AI.conclusion: Whareformer验证了结合外观与3D位置信息、使用相对距离和可演化的轨迹表示，能够在少量训练数据下有效解决OSNOM任务。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：75%。具体方案：(1) 将Whareformer的"物体离开视野后持续追踪"思想应用于遥感视频中的目标（如飞机、舰船）在云层遮挡或移出卫星视场后的重识别；(2) 3D位置联合建模可迁移至遥感目标的经纬度+高度定位，结合外观特征提升跟踪鲁棒性；(3) New Track token机制适用于遥感场景中新出现目标的自动检测与跟踪初始化。

title: VocaDet: Sample-Driven Open-Vocabulary Object Detection and Segmentation via Visual Tokenization and Vector Database Retrieval
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection and segmentation aim to recognize arbitrary objects beyond predefined categories. Although recent vision-language and reference-based approaches have significantly advanced this field, they often rely on text prompts, limited visual examples, or expensive feature matching procedures, making them difficult to scale to large and continuously expanding object repositories. In this work, we propose VocaDet, a sample-driven open-vocabulary object detection and segmentation framework that learns object concepts directly from user-provided positive and negative sample collections without model retraining. The key idea is to transform continuous visual representations into discrete visual vocabularies and perform efficient retrieval-based recognition through a scalable vector database. Specifically, we employ DINOv3 as the visual feature extractor and apply agglomerative clustering with adaptive clustering sensitivity to generate multi-granularity visual tokens. These visual tokens, together with position-debiased representations and spatial topology information, are stored as expandable object memories in a vector database. During inference, query images are converted into visual tokens and efficiently matched against the stored object memories for object localization and segmentation. Furthermore, a background filtering mechanism is introduced to remove frequently occurring background patterns and reduce redundant retrieval operations in practical fixed-camera scenarios. Experiments on the UA-DETRAC dataset demonstrate that VocaDet achieves effective open-vocabulary detection performance without conventional detector training, while supporting continuously expandable recognition capability as additional positive and negative samples are accumulated.

AI.tldr: VocaDet提出了一种无需模型重训练的样本驱动开集检测与分割框架，通过将连续视觉表示转换为离散视觉词汇并利用向量数据库进行高效检索，实现了对任意物体的开集识别，且支持持续扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有开集检测方法依赖文本提示、有限的视觉示例或昂贵的特征匹配过程，难以扩展到大规模且持续增长的目标库。用户需要一种无需重训练、仅基于正负样本即可学习新物体概念的框架。
AI.method: 使用DINOv3提取视觉特征，通过凝聚聚类生成多粒度视觉词汇；结合位置去偏表示和空间拓扑信息存入向量数据库作为可扩展的记忆。推理时将查询图像转换为视觉词汇，在数据库中进行高效检索匹配，并引入背景过滤机制减少冗余操作。
AI.result: 在UA-DETRAC数据集上，VocaDet无需传统检测器训练即可实现有效的开集检测性能，且随着正负样本积累，识别能力可持续扩展。
AI.conclusion: VocaDet证明了通过离散视觉词汇和向量检索的方式可以有效替代传统检测器训练进行开集检测，为大规模动态目标库的持续学习提供了一种新范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感场景中目标种类多、新目标频繁出现（如新卫星类型、车辆型号），VocaDet的样本驱动范式天然适合。具体方案：1）利用遥感影像的DINOv3特征构建多尺度视觉词汇表；2）针对遥感中典型背景（如建筑、水体）优化背景过滤机制；3）将地理空间信息（如经纬度、高度）作为额外拓扑特征存入向量数据库，提升遥感目标检索精度。

title: Switch-Reasoner: Learn When to Think in Multitask Mixtures via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) often follow a fixed Think-then-Answer paradigm, which is inefficient in heterogeneous multitask settings because simple inputs may not require explicit reasoning while difficult ones can benefit substantially from it. Learning when to think is also unstable during post-training, where imbalanced rollouts can drive the model toward always-thinking or always-direct behavior. We propose Switch-Reasoner, a GRPO-based framework that learns to adaptively select reasoning modes for MLLMs. It treats thinking as a virtual tool invocation and allows the model to either answer directly or invoke explicit reasoning before answering. To stabilize this decision, we introduce a dual-level regulation mechanism that balances the overall use of Thinking Mode and Direct Mode while providing sample-level supervision based on the relative benefit of the two choices. Experiments on 11 multimodal tasks show that Switch-Reasoner reduces unnecessary reasoning while maintaining strong performance, achieving a better accuracy-efficiency trade-off.

AI.tldr: 提出Switch-Reasoner框架，基于GRPO让多模态大模型自适应选择推理模式（直接回答或逐步推理），通过双层调控机制平衡两种模式的使用，在11个多模态任务上实现了更好的精度-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM采用固定的先思考后回答范式，在多任务异构场景下效率低下：简单输入不需要显式推理，困难输入则受益于推理。后训练中学习何时思考也不稳定，不平衡的rollout会导致模型倾向于总是思考或总是直接回答。
AI.method: 提出Switch-Reasoner，基于GRPO的框架：(1) 将思考视为虚拟工具调用，模型可选择直接回答或调用推理后再回答；(2) 引入双层调控机制，在全局层面平衡Thinking Mode和Direct Mode的使用比例，在样本层面基于两种选择的相对收益提供监督信号。
AI.result: 在11个多模态任务上的实验表明，Switch-Reasoner在减少不必要推理的同时保持了强性能，实现了更好的精度-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习自适应选择推理时机，可以有效解决MLLM在多任务场景下的效率问题，双层调控机制能稳定决策学习过程。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：(1) 遥感多任务场景（目标检测、地物分类、变化检测、场景描述等）可直接应用Switch-Reasoner，简单场景（如大尺寸地物分类）用Direct Mode，复杂场景（如细粒度目标识别、变化分析）用Thinking Mode；(2) 遥感数据异构性强的特点（不同分辨率、传感器类型）恰好适合该框架的自适应选择能力；(3) 可进一步扩展Thinking Mode为遥感专用推理链（如先做地理定位、地物关系分析再回答），提升专业任务精度。

title: When Structured Sparse Autoencoders Learn Consistent Concepts Across Modalities
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a promising technique for mechanistic interpretability by learning a set of sparse latent features in large models, each of which encodes a distinct concept. However, in vision-language models (VLMs), vanilla SAEs struggle to learn modality-consistent concepts, with concepts often exhibiting fragmented coverage (i.e., disjoint regions) in the visual modality. To address this challenge, we propose a Structured Sparse AutoEncoder ($S^2AE$) that enforces concept consistency from both semantic and spatial perspectives in the visual modality. Specifically, we group image patches based on Transformer attention similarity and spatial proximity, and introduce a structured sparsity regularization when training the vanilla SAE. The regularization consists of exclusive sparsity for inter-group concept disentanglement and group sparsity for intra-group concept consistency, which drives the latent neurons by SAEs to specialize in distinct, semantically grounded concepts. Evaluated on the \texttt{Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct} model, the method achieves 6.06% average improvement in semantic alignment (mIoU) and 60.81 in representational efficiency (lower l0 norm) while maintaining near-perfect reconstruction fidelity with an Explained Variance above 99%. Cross-modal analysis further demonstrates that $S^2AE$ enhances neuronal monosemanticity by this visual structural prior, achieving a 3.08% average gain in semantic consistency and a 2.37% average gain in monosemanticity scores for both modalities of multimodal features, thereby fostering more coherent and disentangled representations.

AI.tldr: 提出结构化稀疏自编码器(S²AE)，通过语义和空间视角的视觉约束，解决视觉-语言模型中稀疏自编码器难以学到模态一致概念的问题，在Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct上实现语义对齐提升6.06%，表征效率提升60.81，重构方差>99%。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型(VLM)中，传统稀疏自编码器(SAE)学习的视觉概念常出现碎片化覆盖（不相交区域），难以学习模态一致的概念，限制了多模态表征的连贯性和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出结构化稀疏自编码器(S²AE)，包括：(1) 基于Transformer注意力相似度和空间邻近性对图像块进行分组；(2) 引入结构化稀疏正则化，包含组间独占稀疏（解耦不同组的概念）和组内群组稀疏（保证组内概念一致性），驱动SAE的潜在神经元专门化到语义一致的概念上。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct上，语义对齐(mIoU)平均提升6.06%，表征效率(l0范数)提升60.81，重构方差>99%。跨模态分析显示，视觉结构先验使神经元单义性平均提升2.37%，语义一致性平均提升3.08%。
AI.conclusion: S²AE通过视觉结构先验有效增强了多模态特征中神经元的单语义性，得到更连贯且解耦的多模态表征，为VLM的机械可解释性提供了新思路。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像具有明显的空间结构（如地物分块、语义边界清晰），S²AE的注意力相似度+空间邻近性分组的思路可直接应用于遥感VLM（如GeoChat、RSGPT）的可解释性分析。具体方案：(1) 将遥感图像的超像素分割结果作为先验分组，替代Transformer注意力分组；(2) 引入地理语义标签引导的组结构约束，使概念与地物类别对齐；(3) 应用于遥感变化检测/目标检测中特征解耦，增强模型决策的可解释性。

title: Do Transformations Reveal the Truth? Generative Residual Learning for Generalized AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: The rapid advancement of generative AI has enabled the creation of highly realistic deepfake media, posing significant threats, including misinformation, digital identity theft, fraud, and manipulation of public opinion. AI-generated image (AIGI) detection is reliably challenging due to the diversity of generative methods and the subtle artifacts they leave behind. In this work, we propose GenRes, a novel framework for generative residual learning via a neural tensor network, which models fine-grained relational features between original and transformed samples to enhance generalization. To address scenarios involving multiple generative transformations, we introduce GenRes++, which employs a learnable attention mechanism to aggregate relational features across multiple transformed samples and enables the model to focus on the most informative cues. Both models leverage PE-Core as a feature extractor, providing generalized and semantically rich embeddings that improve cross-domain performance and enable the detection of AIGI generated by unseen methods. Comprehensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed GenRes++ approach outperforms existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenRes和GenRes++框架，通过神经张量网络进行生成残差学习，并利用可学习注意力机制聚合多变换样本的关系特征，结合PE-Core特征提取器，有效提升了AI生成图像的检测泛化能力，在多个基准数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展使得深度伪造媒体高度逼真，带来了虚假信息、数字身份盗窃、欺诈和舆论操纵等严重威胁。由于生成方法的多样性和其留下的细微伪影，AI生成图像检测面临可靠挑战，亟需能跨域泛化、检测未知生成方法的检测框架。
AI.method: 提出GenRes框架，利用神经张量网络对原始样本与变换样本之间的细粒度关系特征进行建模，实现生成残差学习。进一步提出GenRes++，引入可学习注意力机制，聚合多个变换样本上的关系特征，使模型聚焦于最具信息量的线索。两者均采用PE-Core作为特征提取器，提供通用且语义丰富的嵌入表示以提升跨域性能。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的综合实验表明，所提出的GenRes++方法在检测性能上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GenRes和GenRes++有效提升了AI生成图像检测的泛化能力，尤其是GenRes++通过注意力机制聚合多变换信息，在检测未知生成方法生成的图像方面表现优异，为深度伪造检测提供了新的有效框架。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感图像中常涉及多种传感器、多时相和多光谱变换，GenRes的生成残差学习可用于检测遥感图像中的合成/篡改区域（如伪造的地理目标）；PE-Core的跨域泛化能力有助于应对不同卫星传感器间的域差异；GenRes++的注意力机制可聚合多光谱影像中不同波段间的变换关系特征，提升遥感伪造检测的鲁棒性。建议将输入样本扩展为多光谱/多时相遥感影像对，构建适用于遥感场景的变换残差学习任务。

title: Multi-Resolution Feature Stem for Diabetic Retinopathy lesion segmentation
comment: 2026 International Conference on Advances in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AAIML), 20-22 March 2026
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness worldwide, requiring automated lesion segmentation using deep learning models for early detection and monitoring. However, DR lesions vary dramatically in size from tiny microaneurysms to large hemorrhages and exudates. This variability creates conflicting demands on the model architecture and input resolution, posing a challenge for effective design. This work investigates the impact of input resolution on different lesion types. Through systematic experimentation with multiple architectures (U-Net, UNet++, Vision Transformers, DeepLabV3+) at $512 \times 512$ and $1024 \times 1024$ resolutions, we identify a critical, counter-intuitive phenomenon where increasing input resolution has opposing effects on different lesion types. We demonstrate that while higher resolution is essential for resolving fine-grained microaneurysms, it can unexpectedly degrade performance on larger hemorrhages. This finding challenges the common assumption that higher resolution is uniformly beneficial. To address this, we propose a novel Multi-Resolution Feature Stem, an input-level pyramid integrated with a UNet++ backbone. This architecture processes multiple scales in parallel, capturing fine-grained details without sacrificing contextual information. This work contributes crucial empirical evidence of this complex, resolution-dependent behavior and a practical, parameter-efficient architecture that successfully resolves this trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文发现糖尿病视网膜病变病灶分割中，提高输入分辨率对微动脉瘤有利但会意外地降低大出血病灶的性能，并提出了一种多分辨率特征茎（Multi-Resolution Feature Stem）架构来解决这一分辨率权衡问题。
AI.motivation: DR病灶尺寸差异巨大（从微小动脉瘤到大出血/渗出），现有模型架构和输入分辨率存在冲突需求，且"更高分辨率总是更好"的假设未经充分验证。
AI.method: 系统实验对比U-Net、UNet++、ViT、DeepLabV3+在512×512和1024×1024分辨率下的性能；提出Multi-Resolution Feature Stem（输入级金字塔结构）集成到UNet++骨干中，并行处理多尺度输入。
AI.result: 高分辨率对微动脉瘤分割有益（分辨细节），但会意外降低大出血病灶的分割性能；所提多分辨率特征茎架构有效解决了这一矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 证实了分辨率对不同病灶类型的非单调影响，推翻了"分辨率越高越好"的普遍假设；所提架构在不显著增加参数量的情况下兼顾了粗细粒度特征。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。遥感图像中同样存在多尺度地物（如小目标车辆与大面积水域/农田），可直接借鉴Multi-Resolution Feature Stem设计思路，在遥感分割模型中引入输入级多分辨率并行分支，以同时保留小目标的细节信息和大目标的上下文语义，缓解分辨率权衡问题。

title: SAM-MT: Real-Time Interactive Multi-Target Video Segmentation
summary: Modern Video Object Segmentation (VOS) involves tracking and segmenting user-specified targets. While recent approaches have achieved remarkable performance in single-target scenarios, extending them to multi-target settings typically involves replicating the single-target processing for each individual object, resulting in reduced frame rates (FPS) with unbounded latency as target count increases. Built upon Segment Anything 2 (SAM2), we propose SAM-MT, which addresses this by transforming the model into an interactive framework for real-time Multi-Target video segmentation. SAM-MT uses explicit queries to represent different individual targets, in parallel with a shared representation for global context. It employs decoupled masked attention to keep individual identities distinct from cross-target interference, and sparse memory for stable temporal evolution, along with specialized strategies for occlusion handling and overlap prevention. SAM-MT successfully decouples latency from the number of targets, achieving real-time speed on par with single-target baselines (>36 FPS for 10 targets) while maintaining SAM2's robust video segmentation performance.

AI.tldr: SAM-MT基于SAM2框架，通过显式查询表示不同目标、解耦掩码注意力保持身份区分、稀疏内存实现稳定时序演化，将多目标视频分割的延迟与目标数量解耦，在10目标场景下实现>36FPS的实时速度，同时保持SAM2的稳健性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VOS方法在多目标场景下需为每个目标复制单目标处理流程，导致帧率随目标数增加而下降且延迟无界，无法满足实时多目标分割需求。
AI.method: 1) 使用显式查询表示不同个体目标，结合共享全局上下文表示并行处理；2) 解耦掩码注意力机制防止跨目标干扰，保持个体身份区分；3) 稀疏内存实现稳定的时序演化；4) 针对遮挡处理和重叠预防设计专用策略。
AI.result: 成功将延迟与目标数量解耦，10目标场景下达到>36 FPS，与单目标基线相当，同时保持SAM2的稳健视频分割性能。
AI.conclusion: SAM-MT通过并行化多目标处理，实现了实时多目标视频分割，为VOS在实际应用中的可扩展性提供了有效方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域多目标跟踪与分割（如车辆、船舶、飞机检测跟踪）可直接应用SAM-MT的并行多目标框架。具体方案：1) 将SAM-MT的显式查询机制用于遥感视频中多目标（如车队、舰群）的同步分割与跟踪；2) 利用解耦掩码注意力处理遥感场景中密集小目标间的相互遮挡问题；3) 稀疏内存策略可适应遥感视频中目标的长时间跨帧跟踪，减少计算开销。

title: HumanForge: A Human-Centric Deepfake Video Benchmark with Multi-Agent Forgery Rationales
summary: Rapid advancements in video diffusion models and temporal editing tools have enabled the generation of highly realistic human-centric videos, posing unprecedented challenges to digital content forensics. Existing benchmarks primarily focus on either face-swapping or global text-to-video synthesis, overlooking the crucial dimensions of human-object or human-human interactions and multi-modal alignment. To address these limitations, we introduce HumanForge, a unified, large-scale, and multi-paradigm human-centric video forgery dataset. To construct and annotate this dataset without labor-intensive manual labeling or hallucinated monolithic prompts, we propose Gen2Anno, a modular active multi-agent pipeline built on LangGraph. Gen2Anno coordinates six specialized agents-ranging from source profiling to MoE-based reference analysis and closed-loop forensic verification-to generate over 18K high-fidelity video segments and produce structured, contrastive omni-annotations containing binary decisions, fine-grained artifact categories, and spatio-temporal localization. Extensive benchmarks using state-of-the-art traditional detectors and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) demonstrate the significant challenges of zero-shot generalization and fine-grained reasoning on HumanForge. Code and dataset will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: HumanForge是一个大规模、多范式的人为中心视频伪造数据集，基于Gen2Anno主动多智能体流水线自动构建，包含18K+高保真视频片段和结构化对比全注释。实验表明现有检测器和多模态大模型在此数据集上零样本泛化和细粒度推理面临显著挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有视频伪造基准主要聚焦换脸或全局文生视频，忽视了人-物、人-人交互以及多模态对齐等关键维度，无法满足日益逼真的人为中心视频伪造检测需求。
AI.method: 提出Gen2Anno模块化主动多智能体流水线（基于LangGraph），协调六个专用智能体（源分析、MoE参考分析、闭环取证验证等），自动化生成18K+高保真视频片段并产生结构化对比全注释（包含二元决策、细粒度伪影类别和时空定位）。
AI.result: 基于SOTA传统检测器和多模态大模型的广泛基准测试表明，在HumanForge上零样本泛化和细粒度推理面临显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: HumanForge填补了人机交互和多模态对齐角度的视频伪造检测基准空白，Gen2Anno实现了无需人工标注的高质量数据集自动构建，对数字内容取证研究具有重要推动意义。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。该文提出的Gen2Anno多智能体主动流水线框架可适配遥感视频/图像伪造检测场景：1）将源分析智能体改造为遥感传感器源溯源（区分真实卫星影像与GAN/Diffusion生成影像）；2）MoE参考分析智能体可针对遥感场景中的地物交互（如建筑-车辆关系）进行伪造检测；3）时空定位技术可直接用于遥感时序影像中异常变化检测。但需重新设计伪影类别以适应遥感图像的光谱和空间特征。

title: LTM: Large-scale Terrain Model for Wildfire-prone Landscapes
summary: Accurate 3D terrain maps are essential for emergency response when assessing wildfire hazards. However, wildfire-prone regions often span vast areas where conventional reconstruction methods underperform. Airborne LiDAR systems provide high-resolution terrain data, but they are expensive and infrequently updated. Image-based methods offer a lower-cost alternative, but struggle due to sparse visual features and limited image overlap. We propose a multi-modal reconstruction framework leveraging outdated Digital Elevation Models (DEMs) as geometric priors for image-based 3D reconstruction. Our key innovation is physics-based pixel-pixel alignment between images and DEM data, dramatically reducing computational complexity by eliminating expensive feature matching procedures. To validate our approach, we developed a large-terrain simulator based on a real wildfire-prone area, generating realistic images enabling a comprehensive evaluation. Given posed images and legacy DEMs, our method produces high-fidelity depth maps while maintaining real-time performance. We find significant improvements in reconstruction accuracy and computational efficiency over existing techniques, offering a scalable solution for wildfire response.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态重建框架，利用过时的数字高程模型(DEM)作为几何先验，通过物理基础的像素-像素对齐实现图像与DEM数据的配准，从而在 wildfire 场景下高效生成高保真深度图，显著提升重建精度和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 野火易发区域范围广阔，传统重建方法效果不佳；机载LiDAR成本高且更新频率低；基于图像的方法虽成本低但受限于稀疏视觉特征和有限的图像重叠。需要一种低成本、高精度、可扩展的3D地形重建方案以支持应急响应。
AI.method: 提出多模态重建框架，以过时的DEM作为几何先验，实现图像与DEM之间的物理基础像素-像素对齐，消除昂贵的特征匹配流程，大幅降低计算复杂度。同时开发了基于真实野火区域的大地形模拟器生成逼真图像用于评估。
AI.result: 在给定带位姿的图像和旧DEM条件下，方法能够生成高保真深度图并保持实时性能。与现有技术相比，重建精度和计算效率均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为野火响应提供了一种可扩展的低成本解决方案，有效结合了历史DEM先验与图像数据，在精度和效率之间取得了良好平衡。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。该框架天然适用于遥感领域。改进方向：(1) 将DEM先验扩展为多时相DEM融合，进一步提升几何约束鲁棒性；(2) 引入卫星影像或无人机影像作为输入源，增强数据获取灵活性；(3) 在DEM与图像对齐中引入深度学习特征提取层，提升在植被覆盖变化剧烈区域的配准精度；(4) 将该框架扩展到其他地形变化监测任务（如滑坡、冰川退缩），将DEM先验与光学遥感图像结合实现低成本高频次地形更新。

title: Pose-to-Biomechanics: Bridging 3D Human Pose Estimation and Biomechanical Attribute Prediction
summary:
Recent progress in 3D human pose estimation has made markerless recovery of skeletal motion increasingly accurate and scalable. However, most pose estimators remain optimized for geometric keypoint accuracy, while many real-world applications in rehabilitation, sports science, ergonomics, and clinical movement analysis require biomechanical quantities that describe how the body moves, loads, and activates. In this work, we propose BioModule, a lightweight plug-in temporal transformer that attaches downstream of any 3D pose estimator and predicts biomechanical attributes from standard 17-joint 3D skeletons. BioModule is estimator-agnostic and requires no modification of the upstream pose model, enabling existing pose estimators to be extended toward physically interpretable motion analysis.
  To train and evaluate BioModule, we construct a large-scale aligned dataset pairing Human3.6M video and 3D keypoints with the biomechanical label space of Human3.6Mplus. We establish and verify anatomical correspondence between coordinate systems of the two datasets, enabling frame-accurate cross-modal supervision. Using this aligned supervision, BioModule predicts biomechanical quantities. We further benchmark BioModule across seven state-of-the-art 3D pose estimators, providing the first systematic analysis of how upstream pose estimation quality propagates to downstream biomechanical prediction fidelity. The results position BioModule as a compact, modular bridge between vision-based pose estimation and biomechanically meaningful human motion analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级时序Transformer插件BioModule，可挂载在任何3D人体姿态估计模型之后，将标准17关节点骨架转换为生物力学属性预测，实现从视觉姿态估计到物理可解释运动分析的模块化桥梁。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体姿态估计主要优化几何关键点精度，但康复、体育科学、工效学等实际应用需要生物力学量（如关节力矩、肌肉激活等）来描述身体如何运动、受力与激活，现有方法缺乏从标准骨架到生物力学属性的高效转换方案。
AI.method: 提出BioModule，一种轻量级时序Transformer插件，可接在任何3D姿态估计器下游，通过构建Human3.6M与Human3.6Mplus之间的坐标系统解剖对应关系，实现帧对齐的跨模态监督训练，预测生物力学属性。
AI.result: 在7种SOTA 3D姿态估计器上系统评估了上游姿态估计质量对下游生物力学预测保真度的传播影响，验证了BioModule作为紧凑模块化桥接方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BioModule是一种与估计器无关的轻量级插件，无需修改上游姿态模型即可将现有姿态估计器扩展到物理可解释的运动分析，填补了视觉姿态估计与生物力学分析之间的鸿沟。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。在遥感领域中，人体姿态估计常用于行人行为分析、跌倒检测等场景。BioModule的思路可迁移用于从遥感影像（如热红外、深度图像或无人机视角）中提取的人体关节点，进而预测生物力学属性，用于野外救援场景中的步态分析、负荷评估等。具体方案：(1) 使用遥感影像中的人体检测与姿态估计结果作为输入；(2) 构建遥感场景下的人体生物力学标签数据集（需考虑视角、遮挡、分辨率等因素）；(3) 将BioModule的时序Transformer结构调整为适应低帧率、多视角输入的变体。

title: WaspMOT: A Benchmark for Long-Term Multi-Object Tracking of Trichogramma Wasps
summary:
Multi-object tracking (MOT) has achieved strong performance on benchmarks dominated by short video sequences. However, such datasets do not adequately evaluate long-term identity preservation, where objects must be tracked consistently over extended durations. We introduce WaspMOT, a benchmark designed to address this gap through long-duration tracking of Trichogramma wasps in controlled ecological experiments. The dataset contains 10 sequences of approximately 12,000 frames each (over 8 minutes at 25 FPS), with dense MOTChallenge annotations and oracle detections to isolate association performance.
  Unlike existing benchmarks, WaspMOT forms a closed-set tracking scenario where all individuals remain present throughout the sequence, requiring consistent identity assignment across thousands of frames despite abrupt jumps, occlusions, and highly similar appearance. We establish a benchmark by evaluating five tracking-by-detection methods, including ByteTrack, BoT-SORT, C-BIoU, OC-SORT, and McByte, under a unified protocol. Results show that all methods suffer from significant trajectory fragmentation, highlighting the difficulty of long-term identity preservation even with perfect detections. A simple spatial tracklet stitching baseline consistently improves performance, indicating that substantial gains remain possible.
  WaspMOT provides a new benchmark for studying long-term association and reveals limitations of current tracking approaches that are not observable on conventional datasets. The benchmark will be made publicly available at the project repository: https://github.com/tstanczyk95/WaspMOT/ .

AI.tldr: WaspMOT是一个面向长期身份保持的多目标跟踪基准数据集，包含10段各约12,000帧的黄蜂跟踪视频。该数据集在封闭场景下要求对所有个体进行数千帧的一致身份分配，评估了五种追踪方法后发现所有方法均存在严重的轨迹碎片化问题，证明了长期关联任务对现有方法的挑战性。
AI.motivation: 现有MOT基准主要基于短时序视频，无法充分评估长期身份保持能力。为了填补这一空白，作者构建了一个需要长时间持续跟踪封闭集合中所有个体的数据集，以揭示现有方法在长期关联任务上的局限性。
AI.method: 构建包含10段序列、每段约12,000帧的黄蜂跟踪数据集WaspMOT，使用密集的MOTChallenge注释和oracle检测（隔离关联性能评估）。在统一协议下评估五种基于检测的跟踪方法（ByteTrack、BoT-SORT、C-BIoU、OC-SORT、McByte），并提出一种简单的空间轨迹段拼接基线方法。
AI.result: 所有五种跟踪方法在长期序列中均出现严重的轨迹碎片化现象，即使使用完美的oracle检测也无法避免。简单的空间轨迹段拼接方法能够一致性地提升性能，表明现有方法在长期关联上仍有显著的改进空间。
AI.conclusion: WaspMOT为研究长期关联问题提供了新的基准，揭示了传统数据集无法观测到的现有跟踪方法在长期身份保持方面的局限性。该基准将公开发布。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感视频中常需对多个移动目标（如车辆、船只、飞机）进行长时间跟踪，同样面临身份保持挑战。具体方案：1) 将WaspMOT中的轨迹段拼接策略应用于遥感多目标跟踪中的长期遮挡恢复；2) 借鉴WaspMOT的封闭集评估协议，构建遥感场景的长期目标跟踪基准（如港口船只、机场飞机），评估目标重识别能力；3) 利用WaspMOT中发现的轨迹碎片化分析框架，诊断遥感跟踪系统在长时间序列中的身份跳变问题。

title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
summary: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. Recent video generation models offer a reasoning path distinct from previous Chain-of-Thought (CoT): reasoning can unfold through temporally connected frames, known as Chain-of-Frame (CoF) reasoning. However, existing video generators are primarily trained on general video corpora, still lacking diverse supervision and dedicated designs for CoF reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce OpenCoF, a framework comprising the OpenCoF-17K dataset, a reasoning video dataset spanning 11 task families, and Wan-CoF, a fine-tuned video model for studying whether diverse temporal supervision improves CoF behavior. Across four video reasoning benchmarks, Wan-CoF achieves considerable gains over the Wan2.2-I2V-A14B baseline. Building on this, we empirically explore more advanced designs for CoF capabilities, i.e., equipping the model with visual and textual reasoning tokens. This mechanism respectively captures low-level visual cues and high-level semantic priors for spatial and temporal reasoning. Through performance comparisons and attention analysis, we examine how these tokens contribute across model depth, denoising steps, space, and time. Our results suggest that stronger video reasoning requires both broad temporal supervision and explicit mechanisms for organizing intermediate reasoning state. We open-source the dataset, model, and code to facilitate future research on reasoning-oriented video generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenCoF框架，包含OpenCoF-17K推理视频数据集和基于Wan2.2微调的Wan-CoF模型，通过Chain-of-Frame（CoF）机制实现视频生成中的时序推理，并引入视觉与文本推理token分别捕捉低层视觉线索和高层语义先验，实验表明多样化时序监督和显式推理状态组织机制能显著提升视频推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型主要在通用视频语料上训练，缺乏针对Chain-of-Frame（CoF）推理的多样化监督和专门设计，导致其在需要时序逻辑推理的任务上表现不佳。
AI.method: 构建OpenCoF-17K数据集（涵盖11类任务族），基于Wan2.2-I2V-A14B微调得到Wan-CoF，并引入视觉推理token和文本推理token分别处理低层视觉线索与高层语义先验，以增强时空推理能力。
AI.result: 在四个视频推理基准上，Wan-CoF相较于Wan2.2-I2V-A14B基线取得了显著提升；通过性能对比和注意力分析，验证了推理token在模型深度、去噪步数、空间和时间维度上的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 更强的视频推理能力既需要广泛的时序监督，也需要显式的机制来组织中间推理状态。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感时序数据分析（如变化检测、多时相分类、视频SAR目标跟踪）天然具有CoF推理需求。具体方案：(1) 将遥感时序影像序列作为CoF帧输入，利用Wan-CoF生成时序推理帧以预测地物变化趋势；(2) 引入遥感领域专用推理token（如光谱特征token、空间尺度token）替代通用视觉token；(3) 在OpenCoF-17K基础上扩充遥感任务族（如变化检测、物候分析、灾害演进），构建遥感CoF数据集；(4) 利用CoF的显式中间状态机制进行遥感时序可解释性分析。

title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
summary: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. To address the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data tailored to in-context panoramic tasks, we propose Canvas360Dataset, a collection of 1M high-quality paired panoramic samples for style transfer, inpainting, outpainting, and editing, enabling effective supervision across diverse in-context generation scenarios. On the modeling side, Canvas360 enhances text-to-panorama generation through parallel depth generation, velocity circular padding, and similarity loss regularization, enabling the model to learn geometry-aware representations, capture object distortion details, and improve geometric consistency and global coherence. Furthermore, empowered by strong panoramic priors, Canvas360 enables a unified in-context panoramic generation framework that supports diverse downstream tasks via token-level concatenation, surpassing prior methods in both task coverage and modeling flexibility. Extensive experiments show that Canvas360 improves panoramic image fidelity, achieving particularly strong performance on the panorama-specific FAED metric and competitive or leading results across the reported quantitative evaluations. More information can be found on our project page: https://zry000.github.io/Canvas360/

AI.tldr: Canvas360是一个两阶段框架，结合几何感知预训练和下游任务微调，用于上下文全景生成。提出了包含100万配对全景样本的Canvas360Dataset数据集，通过并行深度生成、速度循环填充和相似性损失正则化等技术，实现了几何感知表示学习和统一上下文全景生成，在多个任务上取得了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 缺乏针对上下文全景任务的大规模高质量训练数据，现有方法在任务覆盖和建模灵活性上存在不足，需要一种统一的框架来支持多种全景生成任务。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 几何感知预训练阶段，包含并行深度生成、速度循环填充和相似性损失正则化；2) 下游任务微调阶段，通过token级拼接实现统一上下文全景生成。同时构建了包含100万高质量配对全景样本的Canvas360Dataset数据集。
AI.result: 在全景图像保真度上显著提升，在全景专用FAED指标上表现尤为突出，在多项定量评估中取得竞争性或领先结果。
AI.conclusion: Canvas360通过几何感知预训练和大规模数据集，有效解决了上下文全景生成中的数据稀缺和建模灵活性问题，为风格迁移、修补、外扩和编辑等多种下游任务提供了统一框架。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域存在类似的全景生成需求（如卫星图像拼接、大范围场景重建），可借鉴Canvas360的两阶段框架：1) 使用遥感影像的DEM/DSM数据作为几何先验，替代论文中的深度生成；2) 构建遥感专用的大规模配对数据集（如多时相、多传感器影像）；3) 将速度循环填充适配为地理坐标连续填充，解决遥感图像拼接中的边界不一致问题；4) 相似性损失正则化可用于增强遥感影像的几何一致性，减少拼接伪影。

title: OPSD-V: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Post-Training Few-Step Autoregressive Video Generators
summary: We propose OPSD-V, an on-policy self-distillation paradigm for post-training few-step autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models. Existing few-step AR video generators can produce long videos with low latency, but still suffer from error accumulation and weakened motion dynamics during long autoregressive rollout. OPSD-V reduces long-horizon degradation while preserving the original few-step inference path. The key idea is to introduce real long-video data as temporal context during training and use it to provide dense trajectory-level supervision. Specifically, the student follows the exact inference-time rollout, generating each chunk conditioned on its own previously generated KV cache. In parallel, the teacher is evaluated at the same student-visited denoising states, but uses a cleaner AR-consistent temporal cache in which older history can be replaced by real-video context. This provides dense denoising-level corrective targets under on-policy AR cache dynamics, without changing the sampler, number of denoising steps, or inference-time cache mechanism. We apply OPSD-V to representative few-step AR video models, including Self-Forcing and LongLive. Experiments show consistent improvements in visual quality, motion dynamics, and VBenchLong scores. A user study with 10 participants comparing 20 video pairs shows that OPSD-V is preferred over the base models in 66.0% of overall-preference judgments (82.5% excluding ties).

AI.tldr: 提出OPSD-V，一种在线自蒸馏范式，用于后训练少步自回归视频扩散模型。通过引入真实长视频作为时序上下文，在保持原有少步推断路径的同时，减少长自回归展开中的误差累积和运动退化问题。在Self-Forcing和LongLive等模型上验证了视觉质量、运动动态和VBenchLong分数的提升，用户偏好率达66.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有少步自回归视频生成器虽然能低延迟生成长视频，但在长自回归展开过程中存在误差累积和运动动态弱化的问题，限制了生成长视频的质量。
AI.method: 引入真实长视频数据作为时序上下文，学生模型按照精确的推断时自回归方式生成每个片段；教师模型在同一学生访问的去噪状态下进行评估，但使用更干净的AR一致时序缓存（用真实视频替换旧历史），提供密集的去噪级校正目标，且不改变采样器、去噪步数或推断时缓存机制。
AI.result: 在Self-Forcing和LongLive等模型上取得一致的视觉质量、运动动态和VBenchLong分数提升。10名参与者对20个视频对的用户研究中，OPSD-V在66.0%的整体偏好判断中优于基线（排除平局时为82.5%）。
AI.conclusion: OPSD-V能有效减少长自回归视频生成中的误差累积和运动退化，是一种无需改变推断流程即可提升长视频质量的后训练范式。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域常需要生成长时间序列的卫星视频（如云层运动、植被变化监测），少步自回归视频扩散模型可应用于此。OPSD-V的在线自蒸馏范式可直接迁移：利用真实遥感长视频序列（如哨兵2号时序数据）作为教师模型的时序上下文，为遥感视频生成提供密集的轨迹级监督，减少长时序生成中的漂移和语义退化问题。此外，遥感视频通常具有周期性特征（如季节变化），可进一步利用OPSD-V的AR一致缓存机制来保持长期一致性。

title: Geometry and Gradient-based Partitioning for Panoramic Outdoor Reconstruction
summary: Scaling 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to large outdoor scenes is costly in both data acquisition and computation. Adopting panoramic images with equirectangular projection (ERP) can reduce capture effort via their full $360^{\circ}$ field of view, yet the resulting omnipresent visibility invalidates existing partitioning strategies that rely on local camera frustums, causing block-wise optimization to degenerate into global training. Thus, we propose PanoLOG, a two-stage coarse-to-fine framework equipped with a Geometry and Gradient-based Partitioning Strategy tailored for large-scale panoramic 3DGS reconstruction. In the global coarse stage, PanoLOG leverages sky-sphere modeling and panoramic monocular depth supervision for reliable geometry, while in the refinement stage, G$^2$PS builds adaptive bounding volumes via parallax-driven uncertainty and assigns cameras via gradient-based importance scoring. Furthermore, we construct Pano360, the first benchmark on large-scale panoramic dataset for outdoor scene reconstruction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that G$^2$PS achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality while maintaining scalable, block-parallel training. Our models, training code, and dataset are publicly available.

AI.tldr: PanoLOG 是一个两阶段粗到精框架，专为大规模全景3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）重建而设计。它提出了基于几何与梯度的分区策略（G²PS），解决了全景图像全局可见性导致传统局部视锥分区失效的问题，并在全局粗阶段利用天空球建模和全景单目深度监督实现可靠几何，在精化阶段通过视差驱动的不确定性和梯度重要性评分构建自适应包围体。同时构建了首个大规模户外全景数据集Pano360，实验证明了SOTA渲染质量和可扩展的块并行训练。
AI.motivation: 将3DGS扩展到大规模户外场景在数据采集和计算上成本高昂。全景图像虽然能通过360°视场角减少采集工作量，但其全向可见性使得依赖局部相机视锥的传统分区策略失效，导致分块优化退化为全局训练。因此需要一种针对全景图像特性的分区策略和重建框架。
AI.method: 1) 两阶段粗到精框架PanoLOG：全局粗阶段使用天空球建模和全景单目深度监督获得可靠初始几何；精化阶段采用G²PS（Geometry and Gradient-based Partitioning Strategy）构建自适应包围体，通过视差驱动的不确定性进行分区，并基于梯度重要性评分分配相机。2) 构建了首个户外大规模全景数据集Pano360。
AI.result: G²PS在户外大规模场景重建中达到了SOTA渲染质量，同时保持了可扩展的块并行训练能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种针对全景图像特性的可扩展3DGS重建方案，有效解决了全景图像中全局可见性带来的分区退化问题，并提供了首个相关基准数据集。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。具体方案：1) 遥感中的大区域正射影像重建可借鉴PanoLOG的两阶段粗到精框架，先通过卫星影像或无人机全景影像获取粗略地形几何，再利用G²PS分区策略进行分块并行精化，提升大规模地表重建效率。2) 遥感中的多视角立体匹配可引入视差驱动不确定性作为自适应窗口划分依据，适用于大倾角遥感影像的遮挡处理。3) 全景单目深度监督可迁移至遥感中360°环视影像的深度估计，辅助复杂地形（如城市、山区）的稠密重建。

title: LongE2V: Long-Horizon Event-based Video Reconstruction, Prediction, and Frame Interpolation with Video Diffusion Models
summary: Recovering high-quality video from sparse event streams is a challenging task. Regression methods often blur textures, while existing generative models struggle with long-term stability. We propose LongE2V, a novel approach that leverages pre-trained video diffusion priors to jointly handle event-based video reconstruction, prediction, and frame interpolation. By fine-tuning a foundational video model, our approach achieves high data efficiency and superior perceptual quality. We introduce Autoregressive Unrolling and Adaptive Context Switching to mitigate temporal drift in extremely long sequences. We also propose Reencoding Alignment with Cross Residual Correction to ensure precise bidirectional consistency during frame interpolation. Furthermore, Event Voxel Density Augmentation ensures robustness across varying sensor resolutions. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that LongE2V outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all three tasks, exhibiting exceptional temporal coherence and zero-shot generalization. Project page: https://cdfan0627.github.io/LongE2V-page/

AI.tldr: LongE2V利用预训练视频扩散先验，通过自回归展开、自适应上下文切换、重编码对齐与交叉残差校正以及事件体素密度增强等技术，联合处理基于事件的视频重建、预测和帧插值任务，在真实基准上优于现有方法，展现了卓越的时间一致性和零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 从稀疏事件流恢复高质量视频中，回归方法常导致纹理模糊，现有生成模型在长期稳定性方面存在不足，缺乏一种能同时高效处理视频重建、预测和帧插值的统一方法。
AI.method: 1）利用预训练视频扩散先验进行微调，实现高数据效率；2）自回归展开与自适应上下文切换，缓解超长序列的时间漂移；3）重编码对齐与交叉残差校正，确保帧插值中的双向一致性；4）事件体素密度增强，提升对不同传感器分辨率的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在真实世界基准上的大量实验表明，LongE2V在视频重建、预测和帧插值三项任务上均优于最先进方法，展现出卓越的时间一致性和零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LongE2V成功将预训练视频扩散模型适配到事件相机领域，为基于事件的高质量视频生成提供了一种统一、稳定且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。遥感领域的事件相机数据（如高动态范围场景下的卫星或无人机成像）面临类似挑战：稀疏事件流与高质量视频恢复需求。可将LongE2V的自回归展开与自适应上下文切换技术应用于遥感视频超分辨率与去噪；其重编码对齐机制可用于多时相遥感图像的精确配准；事件体素密度增强策略可适配不同空间分辨率的遥感传感器，提升跨平台泛化能力。

title: ZipDepth: Bringing Lightweight Zero-Shot Monocular Depth Anywhere, on Any Device
comment: ECCV 2026. Code: https://github.com/fabiotosi92/ZipDepth - Project page: https://zipdepth.github.io/
summary: Monocular depth estimation has seen remarkable progress through foundation models achieving robust zero-shot generalization, yet their computational demands place them far beyond the reach of embedded and mobile platforms. Lightweight alternatives exist, but have been developed almost exclusively within single-domain, self-supervised paradigms, failing silently under domain shift. We present ZipDepth, a compact monocular depth network that bridges this gap by combining an efficient reparameterizable encoder-decoder with large-scale knowledge distillation from a foundation model over a large multi-domain training set. Comprising just 6.1M parameters, ZipDepth runs at real-time rates from server GPUs to power-constrained devices, achieving the best trade-off between zero-shot accuracy and deployment efficiency among lightweight models across five benchmarks, taking a significant step towards the accuracy of foundation models with 50x more parameters.

AI.tldr: ZipDepth是一个仅6.1M参数的轻量级单目深度估计网络，通过结合高效重参数化编码器-解码器和大规模多领域知识蒸馏，在保持实时推理速度的同时，实现了接近50倍参数量的基础模型的零样本泛化精度。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计基础模型虽泛化能力强，但计算量过大无法部署在嵌入式/移动平台；轻量级模型仅在单一领域自监督下训练，领域迁移时性能严重退化。需要一种兼顾精度与效率的轻量级方案。
AI.method: 设计高效的可重参数化编码器-解码器架构，通过大规模多域数据集上的知识蒸馏将基础模型的能力迁移至轻量级网络，模型参数量仅6.1M。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上，ZipDepth在轻量级模型中实现了最佳的零样本精度与部署效率权衡；以50倍少的参数量达到了接近基础模型的准确度，且能在从服务器GPU到功耗受限设备上实时运行。
AI.conclusion: ZipDepth有效弥合了轻量级模型与基础模型在零样本深度估计上的精度差距，为资源受限平台提供了实用的高泛化能力深度估计方案。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。具体方案：(1) 将ZipDepth的重参数化编码器-解码器架构直接用于遥感单目深度估计任务，利用其轻量级特点适配卫星/无人机等边缘设备；(2) 多域蒸馏策略可引入遥感多源数据（如多光谱、SAR与可见光）进行知识迁移，提升模型对不同传感器域的自适应能力；(3) 可进一步在遥感大场景数据集（如MVS-2D、WHU-RS19）上进行领域微调，针对遥感中特有的弱纹理、大尺度变化等挑战优化性能。

title: Wat3R: Underwater 3D Geometry Learning without Annotations
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/LSXI7/Wat3R
summary: Estimating 3D geometry in underwater environments presents unique challenges due to light attenuation, scattering, and the absence of large-scale, high-quality 3D annotations. Pioneering methods rely on massive dense annotations that are impractical in underwater settings. In this paper, we propose Wat3R, a cross-domain semi-supervised learning framework designed to adapt feed-forward 3D reconstruction models from air to underwater scenes. Uniquely, our method eliminates the need for any annotated underwater data following a teacher-student architecture, that learns robust geometry representations merely on abundant unlabeled real underwater video footage. We also design a cross-view consistency loss that leverages geometric cues from other views to compensate for the information degradation in the current view caused by water attenuation and scattering. Furthermore, considering the lack of comprehensive evaluation benchmarks, we construct Water3D, a diverse dataset covering various water bodies and underwater scenarios, designed for geometric task evaluation. Experimental results demonstrate that Wat3R outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in underwater multi-view depth estimation and point cloud reconstruction. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/LSXI7/Wat3R .

AI.tldr: Wat3R提出了一种跨域半监督学习框架，利用教师-学生架构和无标注水下视频，将空气域的前馈3D重建模型迁移至水下场景，并构建了Water3D数据集用于评估，在多视图深度估计和点云重建上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 水下环境存在光衰减、散射等问题，且缺乏大规模高质量3D标注数据，现有依赖密集标注的方法在水下场景中不切实际，亟需一种无需水下标注的3D几何重建方法。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生半监督学习框架，教师模型在空气域数据上预训练，学生模型通过大量无标注真实水下视频学习鲁棒几何表示；设计了跨视图一致性损失，利用其他视图的几何线索补偿当前视图因水衰减和散射导致的信息退化；构建了Water3D多样化评估数据集。
AI.result: 在水下多视图深度估计和点云重建任务上，Wat3R优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Wat3R无需任何水下标注数据即可有效将空气域3D重建模型迁移至水下场景，跨视图一致性损失能补偿水下信息退化，Water3D数据集为水下几何评估提供了基准。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：85%。1）遥感水下场景（如浅海、沿岸、浑浊水域）可直接应用Wat3R框架进行3D海底地形/目标重建；2）遥感中多角度卫星/无人机影像可借鉴跨视图一致性损失思路，补偿大气散射、云遮挡等引起的单视图信息退化；3）可构建遥感水下/水体相关的无标注视频数据集，训练半监督3D重建模型；4）Water3D的数据集构建策略可迁移至遥感领域中的多类型水体/地表场景评估基准建设。

title: Spatial and Temporal Variability of Terrestrial Water Storage and Their Relationship with Groundwater Level with GRACE, GLDAS and Observations: A Case Study of Murray–Darling Basin
summary: Spatial and temporal patterns of terrestrial water storage (TWS), and their relationship with groundwater levels, were investigated with the Gravity Recovery and Climate Experiment (GRACE) satellite data, the Global Land Data Assimilation System (GLDAS) land surface model results, and climate observations for the Murray–Darling Basin (MDB). The results show that: (1) TWS displays a clear temporal variability: a negative TWS anomaly with a declining trend during 2002–2009, a positive TWS anomaly with a decreasing trend during 2010–2017, and a period of mixed positive and negative TWS anomalies being accompanied by an increasing trend from 2018 to 2025; (2) five dominant cluster patterns were identified that explain the spatial variability of temporal TWS across the MDB; (3) overall, TWS temporal variability is strongly correlated with rainfall, although it is weak at certain locations; (4) TWS is also influenced by evaporation (both actual and potential evapotranspiration, AET and PET) and runoff, and a combined model significantly improves the overall performance in explaining TWS temporal variability; and (5) TWS-derived groundwater storage changes show both similarities and differences in comparison with groundwater level observation changes, reflecting complex hydrogeological processes and the influence of human activities such as groundwater extraction. These findings provide valuable insights to support improved groundwater resource management with GRACE satellite information and land surface models.

AI.tldr: 本文利用GRACE卫星数据、GLDAS陆面模型结果和气候观测数据，研究了Murray-Darling流域（MDB）陆地水储量（TWS）的时空变化特征及其与地下水位的关系。结果显示TWS具有明显的时空变异性，与降雨、蒸散发和径流密切相关，TWS衍生的地下水储量变化与地下水位观测既有相似性也存在差异，反映了复杂的水文地质过程和人类活动影响。
AI.motivation: 探究Murray-Darling流域陆地水储量的时空变化模式及其与地下水位的关系，以支持地下水资源的可持续管理。
AI.method: 结合GRACE卫星重力数据、GLDAS陆面模型模拟结果和气候观测数据，采用时空聚类分析、相关性分析和组合模型等方法，分析TWS的时空特征及其与降雨、蒸散发、径流和地下水位的关系。
AI.result: (1) TWS呈现明显的阶段性变化：2002–2009年负异常且下降趋势、2010–2017年正异常且下降趋势、2018–2025年正负混合异常且上升趋势；(2) 识别出5个主导聚类模式解释TWS空间变异性；(3) TWS与降雨强相关但局部较弱；(4) 蒸散发和径流对TWS有影响，组合模型解释能力显著提升；(5) TWS反演的地下水储量变化与观测数据存在异同。
AI.conclusion: GRACE卫星数据和陆面模型能够有效揭示流域尺度陆地水储量的时空变化规律，为地下水资源管理提供科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该研究本身就是遥感水文交叉的典型案例，改进方向：(1) 引入更高分辨率的遥感数据（如SWOT或Sentinel-1）来提升TWS空间降尺度精度；(2) 结合机器学习方法改进TWS与地下水位的非线性建模关系；(3) 将GRACE数据与InSAR地表形变监测结合，更准确分离地下水储量变化信号；(4) 引入人类用水活动数据（如灌溉抽水量）作为显式输入变量，提升模型对人为因素的刻画能力。

title: S2M-Net: Dynamic Hyperspectral Unmixing Network Integrating Spectral Sequence Mamba and Local Spatial–Spectral Awareness
summary: Hyperspectral unmixing aims to extract pure endmembers and their corresponding abundance from mixed pixels. Existing deep learning-based unmixing methods predominantly rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or Transformer architectures. However, CNNs suffer from limited receptive fields and struggle to capture long-range spectral dependencies across the entire spectral sequence. While Transformers possess global modeling capabilities, they are constrained by quadratic computational complexity and lack the ability to adaptively filter redundant noise in consecutive spectral bands. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a dynamic hyperspectral unmixing network integrating a spectral sequence Mamba with local spatial–spectral awareness. Specifically, the network features a novel asymmetric dual-stream collaborative architecture. The first branch, the spectral sequence Mamba, models hyperspectral data as a one-dimensional continuous sequence and employs the selective state space model to perform global scanning with linear complexity. This adaptively filters redundant spectral bands to accurately extract high-purity global spectral semantics. The second branch, dedicated to local spatial–spectral awareness, uses an attention-augmented CNN to capture local continuous spectral variations and spatial textures, providing fine-grained geometric boundary constraints for abundance estimation. Furthermore, a spatially adaptive gated fusion module is designed to dynamically balance global spectral semantics and local spatial–spectral details according to the pixel mixing complexity of varying spatial regions. Extensive experiments on multiple public hyperspectral datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves significant improvements in unmixing accuracy over comparative methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Mamba的深度高光谱解混网络，利用非对称双流架构（光谱序列Mamba + 局部空间-光谱感知CNN）和自适应门控融合模块，以线性复杂度实现全局光谱建模与局部细节捕捉，提升解混精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的解混方法感受野有限，难以捕捉光谱长程依赖；而Transformer虽有全局建模能力，但计算复杂度呈二次增长且无法自适应滤除连续光谱波段中的冗余噪声。为此，需要一种兼具线性复杂度全局建模与局部细节感知的高光谱解混方法。
AI.method: 提出动态高光谱解混网络（Mamba-based dual-stream network）。①光谱序列Mamba分支：将高光谱数据建模为一维连续序列，利用选择性状态空间模型以线性复杂度进行全局扫描，自适应滤除冗余光谱波段，提取高纯度全局光谱语义。②局部空间-光谱感知分支：采用注意力增强的CNN捕捉局部连续光谱变化和空间纹理，为丰度估计提供精细几何边界约束。③空间自适应门控融合模块：根据不同空间区域的像素混合复杂度，动态平衡全局光谱语义与局部空间-光谱细节。
AI.result: 在多个公开高光谱数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比对比方法在解混精度上取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非对称双流架构结合Mamba的状态空间模型，以线性计算复杂度实现了全局光谱建模，并通过自适应融合机制协同局部细节，有效提升了高光谱解混性能。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：100%。该论文本身就是高光谱遥感解混方法。可改进方向：①当前方法在光谱序列Mamba中仅对光谱维度进行一维序列建模，可进一步扩展为光谱-空间联合的状态空间建模（如2D选择性扫描），以同时捕捉空间邻域的光谱变化；②自适应门控融合模块可引入可学习的光谱先验（如端元光谱库约束），引导融合过程更关注物理可解释性；③可探索将Mamba与稀疏解混或非负矩阵分解等传统方法结合，提升在极端混合场景下的鲁棒性。

title: Spatiotemporal Evolution of Ecological Environment Quality and Driving Factors in the Loess Plateau of Northern Shaanxi
summary: Accurately assessing the spatiotemporal evolution of ecological environment quality (EEQ) on the Loess Plateau of Northern Shaanxi is of great significance for consolidating the ecological security barrier of the Yellow River Basin. Most of the existing research focuses on a single ecological theme, which does not reflect the overall ecological status of the region. In this study, a remote sensing ecological index (RSEI) model was constructed to systematically assess the EEQ from 2000 to 2024. The Theil–Sen estimator, Mann–Kendall test, and Hurst exponent were jointly employed to detect change significance and predict future trends, while the Geodetector model was applied to explore driving factors. The results were as follows: (1) EEQ exhibited a fluctuating but overall upward trend, with the mean RSEI rising from 0.376 in 2000 to 0.545 in 2024—an average annual increase of approximately 0.00569. (2) Spatially, a distinct pattern of “higher in the south, lower in the north and the lowest in the northwest” was observed. Over the 25-year period, the combined proportion of “excellent” and “good” grades increased by roughly 20 percentage points, and the “moderate” grade expanded from 13.61% to 47.12%. (3) Areas showing an improving trend accounted for 91.21% of the total area and highly overlapped with those projected to improve in the future. (4) Single-factor detection revealed that geomorphological type exerted the greatest influence on the spatial heterogeneity of EEQ, with a multi-year mean q-value of 0.701. Interaction detection further indicates that the geomorphology–land use interaction may continue to shape the regional EEQ’s spatial distribution. These findings provide a scientific basis for precise ecological restoration planning and spatial optimization on the Loess Plateau of Northern Shaanxi.

AI.tldr: 本文利用遥感生态指数（RSEI）模型，结合Theil-Sen估计、Mann-Kendall检验、Hurst指数和地理探测器模型，系统评估了2000-2024年陕北黄土高原生态环境质量的时空演变特征。结果表明：EEQ呈波动上升趋势，均值从0.376升至0.545；空间上呈“南高北低、西北最低”格局；改善区占比91.21%；地貌类型是影响EEQ空间异质性的主导因子（多年平均q值0.701），地貌-土地利用交互作用将持续塑造区域EEQ空间分布。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦单一生态主题，不能反映区域整体生态状况；准确评估陕北黄土高原生态环境质量的时空演变对巩固黄河流域生态安全屏障具有重要意义。
AI.method: 构建遥感生态指数（RSEI）模型；采用Theil-Sen估计和Mann-Kendall检验检测变化显著性；使用Hurst指数预测未来趋势；应用地理探测器模型（Geodetector）探索驱动因子。
AI.result: (1) EEQ呈波动上升趋势，均值从0.376升至0.545，年均增长约0.00569；(2) 空间上呈“南高北低、西北最低”格局，“优良”等级占比提升约20个百分点，“中等”等级从13.61%增至47.12%；(3) 改善区占91.21%，与未来改善预测区域高度重叠；(4) 地貌类型主导EEQ空间异质性（多年平均q值0.701），地貌-土地利用交互作用将持续影响分布。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为陕北黄土高原精准生态修复规划和空间优化提供了科学依据。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 引入更高时空分辨率遥感数据（如Sentinel-2或Landsat融合数据）提升RSEI时序分析的精细度；(2) 可考虑加入日光诱导叶绿素荧光（SIF）等新型遥感指标完善RSEI体系；(3) 耦合深度学习模型（如LSTM、CNN）进行EEQ时空预测，提高Hurst指数趋势预测的精度；(4) 增加夜间灯光遥感数据表征人为活动强度，丰富地理探测器的驱动因子维度；(5) 结合GEE平台实现全流程自动化处理，提升方法可迁移性。

title: Automated On-Orbit Absolute Radiometric Calibration: A Preliminary Method and Results
summary: On-orbit absolute radiometric calibration tracks sensor radiometric degradation and ensures accuracy for quantitative applications. Low-cost commercial satellites lack expensive on-board calibration systems, and traditional alternative methods cannot achieve automated, reliable calibration for large sensor fleets with low resource consumption. Pseudo-invariant calibration sites require no ground instruments, but commercial satellites’ heavy imaging schedules hinder frequent PICS observations. The Jilin-1 constellation is a large commercial constellation composed of satellites carrying multispectral imagers with resolution better than 1 m, and it has no on-board calibration system. Thus, an automated calibration method applicable to numerous imagers is needed, one that requires widely available clear-sky ground targets. Using MCD43A2 and MCD12Q1 products, we generate calibration region vectors to transfer the MODIS radiometric reference to Jilin-1. A look-up table (LUT) is constructed for the input parameters of the MODTRAN model. Calibration pixels and model input parameters are then extracted from Jilin-1 imagery using the region vectors, the LUT is interpolated to obtain the at-aperture radiance for each pixel and band, and on-orbit absolute radiometric calibration coefficients are calculated. The proposed method requires no ground-based synchronous experiments, achieves a high level of automation, and does not consume commercial imaging resources. The site calibration validation based on RadCalNet for the JL1GF02F PMS1 sensor shows that the maximum relative difference in the method across all bands is less than 4%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对吉林一号商业卫星星座的无地面同步观测、高自动化、低资源消耗的在轨绝对辐射定标方法。该方法利用MCD43A2和MCD12Q1产品生成定标区域矢量，将MODIS辐射基准传递至吉林一号，通过构建MODTRAN模型LUT查找表从影像中提取定标像元并计算入瞳辐亮度，最终获得定标系数。基于RadCalNet的验证显示所有波段相对差异小于4%。
AI.motivation: 低成本商业卫星缺乏星上定标系统，传统替代方法难以实现大规模卫星星座的自动化、可靠定标且资源消耗低。吉林一号星座无星上定标系统，需要一种适用于大量成像仪、利用广泛可用的晴空地面目标的自动化定标方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用MCD43A2和MCD12Q1产品生成定标区域矢量；2) 将MODIS辐射基准传递至吉林一号卫星；3) 构建MODTRAN模型输入参数的查找表(LUT)；4) 利用区域矢量从吉林一号影像中提取定标像元和模型输入参数；5) 对LUT进行插值，获取每个像元和波段的入瞳辐亮度；6) 计算在轨绝对辐射定标系数。
AI.result: 基于RadCalNet对JL1GF02F PMS1传感器的场地定标验证表明，该方法所有波段的相对差异最大值小于4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需地面同步实验，自动化程度高，且不消耗商业成像资源，适用于缺乏星上定标系统的大规模商业卫星星座的自动化辐射定标。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：90%。该方法是典型的遥感交叉应用，本身即为遥感定标技术。改进方向：1) 可引入国产高光谱传感器（如珠海一号OHS）替代MODIS作为辐射基准，降低对国外数据的依赖；2) 可结合深度学习模型替代LUT插值，提高大气参数反演精度和计算效率；3) 可利用时序分析剔除残余云污染像元，进一步提升定标稳定性；4) 可将方法扩展至SAR卫星的辐射定标，利用MODIS地表参数辅助后向散射系数归一化。

title: Assessing the Potential of EMIT Hyperspectral Data Combined with DEM-Derived Terrain Variables for Predicting Soil As, Cu and Zn Concentrations in a Mountainous Region of Southwest China
summary: Spaceborne imaging spectroscopy has created new opportunities for monitoring soil properties at regional scales. Its use for predicting soil heavy metal concentrations in mountainous environments, however, remains insufficiently tested, especially when EMIT hyperspectral data are used. In this study, EMIT Level-2A surface reflectance data were integrated with DEM-derived terrain variables to estimate soil arsenic (As), copper (Cu), and zinc (Zn) concentrations in Renhuai, Guizhou Province, Southwest China. Only soil samples falling within valid EMIT coverage were used for element-specific modeling, resulting in 139 samples for As, 136 for Cu, and 130 for Zn. To reduce redundancy among predictors, EMIT spectral variables and terrain factors were screened before model construction. Random forest and XGBoost models were then tested using repeated spatial cross-validation. The best-performing model for As combined EMIT predictors with elevation and achieved a validation R2 of 0.460. Model performance was considerably weaker for Cu, with a validation R2 of 0.188. For Zn, the model failed to outperform the mean-based benchmark, producing a negative validation R2 of −0.028. The spatial prediction maps and residual patterns suggested that the EMIT-based prediction showed moderate potential for As, limited predictive value for Cu, and exploratory rather than reliable mapping capability for Zn under the current sample and predictor conditions.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用EMIT高光谱数据结合DEM地形变量，通过随机森林和XGBoost模型预测贵州仁怀山区土壤砷(As)、铜(Cu)、锌(Zn)浓度。结果显示As预测效果中等(R²=0.460)，Cu预测效果较弱(R²=0.188)，Zn预测无效(R²为负值)，表明EMIT数据在山区重金属预测中能力有限。
AI.motivation: 星载成像光谱仪为区域尺度土壤属性监测提供了新机遇，但在山区环境中利用EMIT高光谱数据预测土壤重金属浓度的能力尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 使用EMIT Level-2A地表反射率数据与DEM衍生地形变量，经变量筛选后，采用随机森林和XGBoost模型，通过重复空间交叉验证评估模型性能。
AI.result: As预测验证R²=0.460(结合EMIT与高程)；Cu预测验证R²=0.188；Zn预测验证R²=-0.028(劣于均值基准)。
AI.conclusion: EMIT数据对As具有中等预测潜力，对Cu预测价值有限，对Zn在当前样本和预测条件下仅具探索性而不可靠。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：70%。改进方案：(1)引入多时相EMIT数据以捕捉季节性土壤光谱变化；(2)融合Sentinel-2 MSI或Landsat OLI数据提升空间分辨率；(3)采用深层特征提取方法(如1D-CNN)自动学习光谱-重金属非线性关系；(4)结合地统计学方法(如回归克里金)考虑空间自相关；(5)增加岩性、土地利用分类等辅助变量；(6)采用迁移学习从其他区域预训练模型初始化。

title: Beyond Checkerboards: Advantages of Photogrammetric Camera Calibration for Robust 3D Vision and Novel-View Generation
summary: Imagery is fundamental to modern scientific research, making robust intrinsic camera calibration indispensable for accurate visual inference. The checkerboard-based calibration method has long been favored for its simplicity and ease of deployment and is widely used even in mission-critical computer vision pipelines. However, its limitations in modeling high-precision camera geometry can compromise downstream performance in tasks requiring geometric accuracy. In this work, camera calibration is revisited through the lens of photogrammetric self-calibration (PSC), and it is demonstrated that the PSC consistently outperforms the checkerboard method in both accuracy and precision across a range of vision tasks, including 3D reconstruction with structure from motion (SfM), visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), and novel-view synthesis and reconstruction. Our findings advocate for a paradigm shift toward calibration methods that better reflect the physical and projective properties of camera systems in real-world deployments for critical computer vision applications.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了棋盘格标定法与摄影测量自标定（PSC）方法，实证表明PSC在3D重建、SLAM和新视角合成等视觉任务中精度和准确度均优于传统的棋盘格标定法，主张在关键计算机视觉应用中转向PSC方法。
AI.motivation: 棋盘格标定法虽简单易用，但在高精度相机几何建模方面存在局限，可能影响下游视觉任务的性能。需要重新评估并寻找更优的标定方法。
AI.method: 从摄影测量自标定（PSC）的视角重新审视相机标定问题，系统对比PSC与棋盘格标定法在多种视觉任务（SfM 3D重建、视觉SLAM、新视角合成与重建）中的表现。
AI.result: PSC方法在所有测试的视觉任务（SfM、SLAM、新视角合成与重建）中，在精度和准确度两方面均一致优于棋盘格标定法。
AI.conclusion: 建议在关键计算机视觉应用中实现范式转变，采用更能反映相机系统物理和投影特性的标定方法（即PSC），以替代传统棋盘格标定法。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。遥感领域大量依赖高精度几何标定（如卫星影像3D重建、无人机航测、遥感SLAM），PSC方法可直接替代现有棋盘格标定流程：1）用于遥感影像的摄影测量自检校，提升卫星/无人机平台的内外方位元素解算精度；2）在遥感SfM和密集匹配中提高点云精度；3）与现有遥感标定场结合，利用PSC自适应建模镜头畸变和传感器变形，减少地面控制点依赖。

title: Multi-Modal Multi-Scale Mamba with Frequency and Semantics-Guided Spectral Modeling for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification remains a challenging task due to high spectral redundancy, complex spectral–spatial correlations, and the limited availability of labeled samples. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel framework termed M3-Mamba, which integrates language-guided, multi-level, and Mamba-based spectral modeling for hyperspectral image classification. The proposed M3-Mamba leverages high-level semantic priors derived from multimodal representations to guide discriminative spectral modeling, enabling effective interaction between semantic information and fine-grained spectral features. In addition, a frequency-aware Mamba-based state space module is introduced to efficiently capture long-range spectral dependencies while avoiding the quadratic computational complexity of conventional attention mechanisms. Meanwhile, a text-guided modulation strategy is designed to adaptively reweight spectral responses under semantic guidance, suppressing redundant or noisy bands and enhancing class-relevant spectral responses without compromising spectral fidelity. This semantic-to-spectral modulation allows M3-Mamba to better cope with spectral variability and inter-class confusion. Extensive experiments conducted on four widely used benchmark datasets, including Indian Pines, Pavia University, Salinas, and Houston datasets, demonstrate thatM3-Mamba achieves competitive overall accuracy, average accuracy, and Kappa coefficient under the adopted benchmark settings. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each key component, confirming that the proposed framework demonstrates promising effectiveness for hyperspectral image classification.

AI.tldr: M3-Mamba是一种结合语言引导、多层级和Mamba状态空间模型的高光谱图像分类框架，通过语义先验指导光谱建模、频率感知Mamba模块捕获长程光谱依赖、文本引导调制增强类相关光谱响应，在四个基准数据集上取得竞争性分类性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱冗余高、光谱-空间相关复杂及标注样本有限等挑战，现有方法难以高效捕获长程光谱依赖且计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 提出M3-Mamba框架：(1) 利用多模态表示的高层语义先验指导光谱判别建模；(2) 引入频率感知的Mamba状态空间模块，避免注意力机制二次复杂度；(3) 设计文本引导调制策略，在语义指导下自适应重加权光谱响应，抑制冗余噪声波段。
AI.result: 在Indian Pines、Pavia University、Salinas和Houston四个数据集上取得竞争性的总体精度、平均精度和Kappa系数，消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: M3-Mamba通过语言引导与Mamba的高效序列建模相结合，在高光谱图像分类任务上展现出良好性能与潜力。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方案：(1) 频率感知Mamba模块可进一步扩展为光谱-空间联合建模，引入三维状态空间模型以同时捕获空间邻域信息；(2) 文本引导调制可与遥感领域知识图谱结合，利用地理标签或地物先验增强语义指导；(3) 可探索多模态融合前端（如LiDAR、SAR与HSI联合）以提供更丰富的语义先验；(4) Mamba模块可与卷积或Transformer做轻量化混合设计，提升小样本场景下的泛化能力。

title: WASP-Mamba: A Wavelet-Enhanced Mamba Framework for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation of high-resolution remote sensing (HRRS) imagery is a fundamental task in Earth observation but remains challenging due to severe scale variations and complex boundary structures. Although State Space Models (SSMs), particularly Mamba, have shown strong potential for efficient global modeling with linear complexity, existing methods are still limited in capturing multi-scale context and fine-grained spatial details. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework named WASP-Mamba for HRRS image segmentation. A Mamba-based spatial pyramid pooling module is introduced at the encoder bottleneck to enhance multi-scale feature aggregation and improve robustness to scale variations. In addition, a wavelet-inspired Mamba decoder is designed to decouple and reconstruct low-frequency semantic information and high-frequency details, mitigating boundary degradation caused by conventional upsampling. Extensive experiments on the LoveDA, ISPRS Vaihingen and ISPRS Potsdam datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves 53.90%, 84.32% and 87.06% mIoU, respectively. Compared with recent state-of-the-art methods, WASP-Mamba achieves superior segmentation performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WASP-Mamba框架，采用基于Mamba的空间金字塔池化模块增强多尺度特征聚合，并设计小波启发的Mamba解码器解耦低频语义与高频细节，在LoveDA、Vaihingen和Potsdam数据集上分别达到53.90%、84.32%和87.06% mIoU，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率遥感图像语义分割面临尺度变化大和边界结构复杂两大挑战。现有基于状态空间模型（如Mamba）的方法在多尺度上下文捕获和细粒度空间细节建模方面仍存在局限。
AI.method: 1) 在编码器瓶颈处引入基于Mamba的空间金字塔池化模块（Mamba-SPP），增强多尺度特征聚合和尺度鲁棒性；2) 设计小波启发的Mamba解码器，通过解耦和重构低频语义信息与高频细节，缓解传统上采样导致的边界退化问题。
AI.result: 在LoveDA、ISPRS Vaihingen和ISPRS Potsdam数据集上分别达到53.90%、84.32%和87.06% mIoU，超越近年最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: WASP-Mamba通过Mamba-SPP和Wavelet-Mamba解码器的协同设计，有效解决了多尺度上下文聚合和边界细节保持问题，验证了状态空间模型在遥感分割任务中的优越性。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。改进方向：1) 可将小波启发的Mamba解码器中的小波变换替换为其他多分辨率分析工具（如曲波变换、轮廓波变换）以适应不同地物边界特征；2) Mamba-SPP可与注意力机制（如CBAM）结合进一步优化通道-空间特征重标定；3) 可引入自监督预训练策略（如掩码图像建模）提升小样本场景下的泛化能力；4) 可扩展为多模态遥感数据（如SAR-光学）的联合分割框架。

title: Using Contemporary Global Land Cover Products to Improve Forest Mapping at the National Scale: Case Study of Poland
summary: Using accurate land cover data is essential to monitor land use and cover changes and assess the effectiveness of various environmental policies. This study evaluates the accuracy of contemporary global land cover products with 10 m spatial resolution, including Google’s Dynamic World (GDW), European Space Agency’s World Cover (ESA WC) and Esri Land Cover (ELC) in mapping forested areas in Poland, aiming to test an assumption if the combination of these products may improve forest mapping accuracy compared to any individual product. Three global datasets and their combinations were assessed with the 2022 EU Land Use/Cover Area Frame Survey (LUCAS). A land cover map of Poland (S2GLC PL) for 2021 served as an auxiliary reference data set. Forest cover classification accuracy was evaluated using precision, recall, and F1-score metrics, and spatial agreement of binary forest maps in the thematic global products was measured with the Intersection over Union (IoU) at two various scale levels (country and province). Our results showed that forest mapping accuracy of three global products varies for Poland, with F1-score equal to 72.2% for ELC, 76.9% for ESA WC, and 68.8% for GDW. IoU against S2GLC PL was equal to 82.6%, 82.3% and 75.2%, for ELC, ESA WC and GDW, respectively, and slightly exceeded 70.5% for three global products. A specific combination of binary forest maps from global products, where the output forest area consisted of forests mapped at the same time by all three products and forests mapped at the same time only by GDW and ESA WC yielded better accuracy indicators than any single product and other tested combinations (F1-score equal to 80.4%, and IoU against S2GLC PL equal to 87.1%).

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了三种10米分辨率全球土地覆盖产品（GDW、ESA WC、ELC）在波兰森林制图中的精度，并探索了产品组合提升精度的可能性。结果表明，ESA WC表现最佳（F1=76.9%），而将GDW和ESA WC的共同时相森林区域组合可获得最优效果（F1=80.4%，IoU=87.1%），优于任何单一产品。
AI.motivation: 精确的土地覆盖数据对监测土地利用变化和环境政策效果至关重要，但不同全球产品在区域尺度上的精度差异显著。本研究旨在评估主流高分辨率全球产品在波兰森林制图中的精度，并检验产品组合是否可提升制图精度。
AI.method: 以2022年欧盟LUCAS调查数据为主要参考，辅以波兰本地S2GLC PL数据集，采用精确率、召回率、F1分数和IoU指标，在国家和省份两个尺度上评估GDW、ESA WC、ELC三种10米分辨率产品及其组合方案的森林分类精度。
AI.result: 单一产品中ESA WC精度最高（F1=76.9%），其次为ELC（72.2%）和GDW（68.8%）。IoU对S2GLC PL结果为ELC 82.6%、ESA WC 82.3%、GDW 75.2%，三者联合IoU略超70.5%。最优组合为"GDW与ESA WC共同时相森林区域"，F1达80.4%，IoU达87.1%。
AI.conclusion: 全球产品在区域尺度存在精度差异，通过特定组合策略（取三个产品共同时相森林区域与GDW-ESA WC交集区域的并集）可显著提升森林制图精度，为多源数据融合提供了有效思路。
AI.remote_sensing_cross: 交叉/改进可行性：95%。作为遥感领域土地覆盖分类的实证研究，可改进之处：1) 引入时序信息（如哨兵2号时间序列）区分森林与非森林的物候差异，提升产品组合的时相一致性；2) 将组合策略扩展至中国区域，评估不同气候带下的适用性；3) 引入深度学习融合方法（如注意力机制），自适应学习不同产品的优势区域而非简单逻辑规则组合；4) 增加地形、纹理等辅助特征对组合结果进行后处理校正。

title: SMMNet: A Plug-and-Play Lightweight Detection Framework for UAV Aerial Imagery
summary: Object detection in UAV aerial imagery is challenged by dense small targets, large-scale variation, complex backgrounds, and strict onboard computation limits. To address these issues, this paper proposes SMMNet (Structured-diffusion Mamba Mixture Network), a lightweight plug-and-play detection framework evaluated with YOLO family detectors. SMMNet contains three modules. The Structured Diffusion Feature Extractor (SDFE) uses anisotropic diffusion to preserve boundary-sensitive features during downsampling. The Mamba-driven Receptive-field Context Aggregator (MRCA) performs multi-directional selective state-space scanning to capture long-range context with linear complexity. The Mask-guided Bayesian Box Refinement (MBBR) applies a MAP-inspired confidence-adaptive box update using MobileSAM mask evidence and ELBO-based false-positive filtering. Using YOLOv13-S as the main detector, SMMNet achieves 32.8% mAP@0.5:0.95 and 52.6% mAP@0.5 on VisDrone2019 at 87 FPS on an NVIDIA A800 GPU, improving the YOLOv13-S baseline by 3.6 and 4.5 points, respectively. The added modules reduce throughput compared with the detector-only baseline (168 FPS), but the resulting 87 FPS remains real-time and provides a favorable accuracy–latency trade-off. Three independent-seed runs further show a mean paired gain of 3.60 ± 0.10 mAP on VisDrone2019, 2.53 ± 0.12 mAP on DroneVehicle, and 2.77 ± 0.06 mAP on SeaDronesSee for the YOLOv13-S setting. Additional experiments on DroneVehicle and SeaDronesSee, together with cross-backbone evaluations on YOLOv5/v6/v7/v8/v10/v11/v13 across different UAV benchmarks, show aligned performance trends under matched settings. Edge deployment on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX reaches 30 FPS under TensorRT FP16 inference at 15 W TDP, indicating the suitability of SMMNet for resource-constrained UAV perception.

AI.tldr: SMMNet是一个轻量化、即插即用的无人机航拍目标检测框架，包含三个核心模块：结构化扩散特征提取器（SDFE）、Mamba驱动的感受野上下文聚合器（MRCA）和掩码引导的贝叶斯框精炼模块（MBBR）。在VisDrone2019上以YOLOv13-S为主检测器达到32.8% mAP@0.5:0.95，87 FPS，在Jetson Orin NX上30 FPS，显著提升基线性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机航拍图像目标检测面临密集小目标、大尺度变化、复杂背景及严格机载计算资源限制等多重挑战，现有方法难以在精度与速度间取得良好平衡。
AI.method: SMMNet包含三个模块：1）SDFE：利用各向异性扩散在下采样过程中保留边界敏感特征；2）MRCA：采用Mamba驱动的多方向选择性状态空间扫描，以线性复杂度捕获长程上下文；3）MBBR：基于MAP启发和MobileSAM掩码证据的置信度自适应框精炼，结合ELBO伪阳性过滤。整体以YOLOv13-S为主检测器。
